.growth-visual-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.4fr 1fr;gap:1rem;margin-top:1rem}.growth-visual-card{background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(255,255,255,.045),rgba(255,255,255,.016));border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:18px;padding:1rem;min-height:290px;box-shadow:0 15px 36px rgba(0,0,0,.22);position:relative;overflow:hidden}.growth-visual-card:before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--orange),transparent)}.growth-visual-card.tall{min-height:360px}.growth-card-title{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:.8rem;gap:.6rem}.growth-card-title h3{font-size:.92rem;font-family:'Syne',sans-serif}.growth-card-title span{font-size:.58rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--orange);font-weight:900}.growth-chart-box{height:250px;position:relative}.growth-chart-box.small{height:210px}.growth-milestone-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:.65rem;margin-top:1rem}.growth-milestone{background:rgba(255,255,255,.032);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-radius:14px;padding:.8rem;transition:.25s}.growth-milestone:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);border-color:rgba(232,83,10,.3);background:rgba(232,83,10,.045)}.growth-milestone b{display:block;color:#fff;font-size:.75rem;margin:.2rem 0}.growth-milestone span{font-size:.62rem;color:var(--orange);font-weight:900}.growth-milestone p{font-size:.64rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5}.api-source-note{color:var(--muted2);font-size:.62rem;margin-top:.5rem}
@media(max-width:1100px){.growth-kpi-premium{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}.growth-visual-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.growth-milestone-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}.nav-edit-btn{display:none}}
@media(max-width:700px){.growth-kpi-premium{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:.65rem}.growth-kpi-number{font-size:1.45rem}.growth-visual-card{min-height:260px;padding:.85rem}.growth-chart-box{height:220px}.growth-chart-box.small{height:200px}.growth-milestone-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.mobile-socials .nav-edit-btn{display:inline-flex}.mobile-socials .btn-resume{display:inline-flex}}


/* === STRONG ADMIN IMAGE/RESUME EDIT FIX === */
.admin-modal{width:min(920px,100%)}
.admin-tabs .admin-tab{user-select:none}
.admin-tab small{display:block;font-size:.52rem;opacity:.72;margin-top:.1rem}
.admin-help-line{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.55;margin:.45rem 0 .8rem}
.admin-media-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:.85rem}
.media-edit-toolbar{position:absolute;z-index:999;background:rgba(7,9,15,.92);border:1px solid rgba(232,83,10,.32);border-radius:10px;padding:.35rem;display:none;gap:.32rem;box-shadow:0 10px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.42);backdrop-filter:blur(10px)}
.media-edit-toolbar button{border:none;border-radius:7px;padding:.28rem .52rem;font-size:.58rem;font-weight:900;cursor:pointer;color:#fff;background:var(--orange);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif}
.media-edit-toolbar button.remove{background:rgba(255,80,80,.18);border:1px solid rgba(255,80,80,.28);color:#ff9b9b}
.editing img[data-img-id]{outline:2px dashed rgba(232,83,10,.72);outline-offset:3px;cursor:pointer}
.resume-file-name{font-size:.66rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:.35rem;word-break:break-all}
@media(max-width:700px){.admin-media-row{grid-template-columns:1fr}.admin-actions{position:sticky;bottom:0;background:var(--bg2);padding:.7rem 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}}


/* === FINAL FIX: Always visible save buttons in edit mode === */
.edit-floating-actions{position:fixed;right:18px;bottom:88px;z-index:9998;display:none;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-end;max-width:min(520px,calc(100vw - 28px));}
body.editing .edit-floating-actions{display:flex;}
.edit-floating-actions button{border:none;border-radius:12px;padding:.72rem .95rem;font-weight:900;font-size:.75rem;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--orange),var(--orange2));color:#fff;box-shadow:0 10px 26px rgba(232,83,10,.35);}
.edit-floating-actions button:nth-child(2){background:rgba(255,255,255,.09);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.16);box-shadow:0 10px 26px rgba(0,0,0,.25);}
.edit-floating-actions button:nth-child(3){background:rgba(255,80,80,.14);border:1px solid rgba(255,80,80,.25);box-shadow:0 10px 26px rgba(0,0,0,.25);}
#adminEditBox>.admin-actions:last-child{position:sticky;bottom:-1.1rem;z-index:20;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(12,15,26,.92),var(--bg2));padding:.85rem 0 .45rem;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);}
.admin-save-top{display:flex;gap:.55rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:.75rem 0 1rem;padding:.65rem;border:1px solid rgba(232,83,10,.18);background:rgba(232,83,10,.055);border-radius:12px;}
@media(max-width:700px){.edit-floating-actions{left:10px;right:10px;bottom:72px}.edit-floating-actions button{flex:1;padding:.65rem .5rem;font-size:.67rem}}


/* === ENHANCED DYNAMIC GROWTH DASHBOARD FINAL === */
.growth-enhanced-section{background:radial-gradient(circle at 12% 0%,rgba(232,83,10,.12),transparent 28%),radial-gradient(circle at 92% 18%,rgba(61,127,255,.11),transparent 30%)}
.growth-hero-panel{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:1.2rem;padding:1rem;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-radius:18px;background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(255,255,255,.035),rgba(255,255,255,.012));box-shadow:0 14px 34px rgba(0,0,0,.18)}
.growth-overview-strip{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin:1rem 0;padding:1.15rem 1.25rem;border-radius:18px;border:1px solid rgba(232,83,10,.22);background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(232,83,10,.10),rgba(61,127,255,.045));box-shadow:0 18px 42px rgba(0,0,0,.20)}
.growth-overview-strip span,.growth-insight-card span{display:block;font-size:.58rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.13em;color:var(--orange);font-weight:900;margin-bottom:.25rem}.growth-overview-strip h3{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.05rem;margin-bottom:.25rem}.growth-overview-strip p{color:var(--muted);font-size:.74rem;line-height:1.6}.growth-score-badge{width:112px;height:112px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:conic-gradient(var(--orange) var(--score,80%),rgba(255,255,255,.08) 0);position:relative;flex-shrink:0}.growth-score-badge:after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:8px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08)}.growth-score-badge b,.growth-score-badge small{position:relative;z-index:1}.growth-score-badge b{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.45rem;color:var(--orange)}.growth-score-badge small{font-size:.62rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:800}.growth-visual-grid-enhanced{grid-template-columns:1.25fr 1fr}.growth-insight-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:.8rem;margin-top:1rem}.growth-insight-card{background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(255,255,255,.045),rgba(255,255,255,.018));border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:16px;padding:1rem;min-height:116px;transition:.25s}.growth-insight-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);border-color:rgba(232,83,10,.32);background:rgba(232,83,10,.045)}.growth-insight-card b{display:block;font-size:.84rem;color:#fff;margin:.25rem 0}.growth-insight-card p{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.55}.growth-live-kpis .growth-kpi-card:nth-child(1) .growth-kpi-icon{background:rgba(22,199,106,.12)}.growth-live-kpis .growth-kpi-card:nth-child(2) .growth-kpi-icon{background:rgba(61,127,255,.12)}.growth-live-kpis .growth-kpi-card:nth-child(3) .growth-kpi-icon{background:rgba(157,110,245,.12)}.growth-live-kpis .growth-kpi-card:nth-child(4) .growth-kpi-icon{background:rgba(245,166,35,.12)}
@media(max-width:1100px){.growth-visual-grid-enhanced{grid-template-columns:1fr}.growth-insight-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}}@media(max-width:700px){.growth-overview-strip{align-items:flex-start;flex-direction:column}.growth-score-badge{width:94px;height:94px}.growth-insight-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.growth-hero-panel{padding:.85rem}}



/* =========================================================
   AKASH RESPONSIVE ALIGNMENT PATCH - ALL DEVICES FINAL
   Makes desktop/laptop/tablet/mobile layouts fluid, aligned,
   prevents horizontal overflow, and keeps charts/cards readable.
   ========================================================= */
:root{--page-pad:clamp(14px,2.5vw,40px);--section-pad-y:clamp(22px,4vw,48px);}
html{width:100%;max-width:100%;overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;}
body{width:100%;max-width:100%;overflow-x:hidden;min-width:0;}
img,svg,video,canvas,iframe{max-width:100%;height:auto;}
button,input,select,textarea{max-width:100%;}
.page,.sec,.home-v2,.home-market-sec,.contact-section,.stats-sec,footer{max-width:100%;overflow-x:hidden;}
.sec,.stats-sec,.home-market-sec,.contact-section{padding-left:var(--page-pad)!important;padding-right:var(--page-pad)!important;}

/* Navigation alignment */
nav{width:100%;max-width:100vw;padding-left:var(--page-pad)!important;padding-right:var(--page-pad)!important;}
.nav-tabs{min-width:0;}
.nav-tab{flex:0 0 auto;}
.mobile-drawer{width:100%;}
.soc-n svg{width:16px;height:16px;display:block;}

/* Universal grids must shrink without overflow */
.hero,.home-shell,.stats-grid,.market-kpi-wrap,.market-grid,.growth-kpi-grid,.growth-kpi-premium,.growth-visual-grid,.growth-visual-grid-enhanced,.growth-insight-grid,.growth-milestone-grid,.cert-hero-stats,.certs-grid,.skills-grid,.projects-grid,.awards-grid,.about-grid,.form-grid,.tech-grid,.tech-list-v2,.kpi-strip-v2,.feature-grid-v2,.what-grid-v2{width:100%;max-width:100%;min-width:0;}
.hero > *,.home-shell > *,.home-main,.left-stack,.hero-banner-v2,.feature-card-v2,.growth-visual-card,.contact-form,.info-panel,.profile-glass-card,.thought-card{min-width:0;}

/* Home v2 layout: balanced on desktop, stacked on small screens */
.home-v2{padding:clamp(12px,2vw,24px)!important;}
.home-shell{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(240px,300px) minmax(0,1fr);gap:clamp(12px,2vw,22px);align-items:start;}
.left-stack{min-width:0;}
.profile-card-v2,.glass-v2,.contact-panel-v2,.mini-stats-v2,.hero-banner-v2{max-width:100%;}
.hero-banner-v2{grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1.05fr) minmax(220px,.95fr);}
.hero-title-v2{font-size:clamp(2rem,5vw,4.65rem)!important;word-break:normal;overflow-wrap:anywhere;}
.hero-desc-v2{max-width:65ch;}
.dashboard-3d{max-width:100%;}

/* Main hero fallback */
.hero{grid-template-columns:minmax(240px,300px) minmax(260px,1fr) minmax(280px,380px);gap:clamp(14px,2vw,28px);padding-left:var(--page-pad)!important;padding-right:var(--page-pad)!important;}
.hero-left,.hero-center,.hero-right{min-width:0;}
.hero-name{overflow-wrap:anywhere;}
.hero-desc{max-width:100%;}

/* Cards and text wrapping */
.market-card,.proj,.sk,.cert-card,.award-card,.scard,.gkpi,.growth-kpi-card,.growth-insight-card,.growth-milestone{min-width:0;}
.market-title,.proj-title,.cert-name,.award-title,.tech-chip-name,.info-value,.contact-item-v2 b{overflow-wrap:anywhere;white-space:normal;}
.tags,.chips,.skills-learned-chips,.hero-actions-v2,.hero-ctas{min-width:0;}

/* Chart containers */
.growth-container,.growth-visual-card,.hero-visual-wrap{max-width:100%;overflow:hidden;}
.growth-canvas,.growth-chart-box,.growth-chart-box.small{width:100%!important;max-width:100%;}
canvas{display:block;max-width:100%!important;}

/* Forms */
.contact-form{padding:clamp(16px,3vw,32px)!important;}
.fg-contact input,.fg-contact select,.fg-contact textarea{font-size:16px;} /* avoids iOS zoom */

/* Laptop/tablet */
@media(max-width:1200px){
  .home-shell{grid-template-columns:minmax(220px,280px) minmax(0,1fr);}
  .hero{grid-template-columns:1fr;min-height:auto;align-items:stretch;}
  .hero-left{position:static;order:3;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:1rem;}
  .hero-center{order:1;align-items:center;}
  .hero-right{order:2;align-items:flex-start;}
  .stats-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr))!important;}
  .tech-list-v2{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr))!important;}
  .what-grid-v2{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr))!important;}
  .growth-visual-grid,.growth-visual-grid-enhanced{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;}
}

@media(max-width:980px){
  .home-shell{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;}
  .left-stack{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:1rem;}
  .hero-banner-v2{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;}
  .hero-art-v2{min-height:200px;}
  .kpi-strip-v2,.market-kpi-wrap,.growth-kpi-grid,.growth-kpi-premium,.cert-hero-stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))!important;}
  .feature-grid-v2,.about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;}
  .about-img{max-width:260px;width:100%;margin:auto;}
  .form-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;}
}

/* Mobile */
@media(max-width:700px){
  :root{--page-pad:12px;}
  nav{height:52px!important;gap:.5rem;}
  .nav-logo{width:30px;height:30px;}
  .nav-name{max-width:58vw;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
  .page{padding-top:52px!important;}
  .mobile-drawer{top:52px!important;padding:1rem!important;}

  .home-v2{padding:10px!important;}
  .left-stack{display:flex!important;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;}
  .hero-banner-v2{padding:16px!important;border-radius:18px!important;min-height:auto!important;}
  .hello-v2{font-size:.82rem;}
  .hero-title-v2{font-size:clamp(2rem,12vw,2.7rem)!important;line-height:1.02!important;letter-spacing:-.04em!important;}
  .hero-subtitle-v2{font-size:.95rem!important;}
  .hero-desc-v2{font-size:.82rem!important;line-height:1.65!important;}
  .hero-actions-v2{gap:.5rem;}
  .hero-actions-v2 button,.hero-ctas button,.hero-ctas a{width:100%;justify-content:center;text-align:center;}
  .dashboard-3d{height:170px!important;transform:scale(.92);transform-origin:center;}
  .hero-art-v2{min-height:165px!important;overflow:hidden;}

  .profile-glass-card,.thought-card,.profile-card-v2,.contact-panel-v2{max-width:100%!important;width:100%!important;}
  .profile-img-wrap{width:96px!important;height:96px!important;}
  .card-metrics,.mini-stats-v2{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.4rem;}

  .kpi-strip-v2,.tech-list-v2,.what-grid-v2,.stats-grid,.market-kpi-wrap,.growth-kpi-grid,.growth-kpi-premium,.growth-insight-grid,.growth-milestone-grid,.cert-hero-stats{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;}
  .stats-grid{gap:.75rem!important;}
  .scard{padding:1rem!important;}
  .market-grid,.certs-grid,.skills-grid,.projects-grid,.awards-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;}
  .tech-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;}
  .hero-left{display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
  .hero-right{text-align:left;}
  .hero-name{font-size:2rem!important;line-height:1.08!important;}

  .project-mini{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;}
  .chart-thumb{height:130px!important;}
  .what-card-v2{border-right:0!important;}
  .growth-overview-strip{flex-direction:column!important;align-items:flex-start!important;}
  .growth-chart-box{height:220px!important;}
  .growth-chart-box.small{height:200px!important;}
  .contact-form{border-radius:16px!important;}
  .cwin{width:calc(100vw - 20px)!important;right:10px!important;left:10px!important;height:min(520px,calc(100vh - 92px))!important;bottom:70px!important;}
  .chat-fab{right:14px!important;bottom:14px!important;}
  footer{padding:1rem 12px!important;flex-direction:column;text-align:center;align-items:center;}
}

/* Small phones */
@media(max-width:420px){
  .hero-title-v2{font-size:2rem!important;}
  .name-v2,.card-name{font-size:1.25rem!important;}
  .kpi-v2,.tech-pill-v2,.what-card-v2{align-items:flex-start;}
  .screen-v2{width:190px!important;height:118px!important;right:0!important;}
  .cube-v2{left:0!important;}
  .tool-v2{right:0!important;bottom:5px!important;}
  .pillar-v2{left:35px!important;}
  .profile-card-v2{padding:1rem!important;}
  .admin-edit-fab{right:10px!important;bottom:76px!important;padding:.62rem .82rem!important;}
}

</style>
<script>
/* Responsive helper: recalculates chart/canvas sizes on resize and orientation changes */
(function(){
  function fixResponsiveCharts(){
    try{
      document.querySelectorAll('canvas').forEach(function(c){
        c.style.maxWidth='100%';
        c.style.width='100%';
        if(c.parentElement && !c.parentElement.style.position){c.parentElement.style.position='relative';}
      });
      if(window.Chart && Chart.instances){
        Object.keys(Chart.instances).forEach(function(k){try{Chart.instances[k].resize();}catch(e){}});
      }
    }catch(e){}
  }
  window.addEventListener('load',fixResponsiveCharts);
  window.addEventListener('resize',function(){clearTimeout(window.__akashResizeFix);window.__akashResizeFix=setTimeout(fixResponsiveCharts,120);});
  window.addEventListener('orientationchange',function(){setTimeout(fixResponsiveCharts,250);});
})();
</script>
</head>
<body>
<button class="admin-edit-fab" onclick="openAdminLogin()">✏️ Edit</button>
<div class="edit-mode-badge">Edit Mode Active</div>
<div class="edit-floating-actions" id="editFloatingActions"><button onclick="saveAdminChanges()">💾 Save Permanently</button><button onclick="openAdminLogin()">✏️ Open Edit Panel</button><button onclick="disableInlineEditing&amp;&amp;disableInlineEditing();document.body.classList.remove('editing');this.parentElement.style.display='none';showToast&amp;&amp;showToast('Edit mode closed')">Close Edit</button></div>
<div class="admin-backdrop" id="adminModal" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeAdminModal()">
<div class="admin-modal">
<div class="admin-head"><h3 id="adminTitle">Admin Login</h3><button class="admin-close" onclick="closeAdminModal()">✕</button></div>
<div class="admin-body" id="adminLoginBox">
<p class="admin-note">Login to update portfolio information. Saved changes will stay permanently in this browser using local storage.</p>
<div class="admin-grid">
<div class="admin-field"><label>User ID</label><input autocomplete="username" id="adminUser" placeholder="Enter user id"/></div>
<div class="admin-field"><label>Password</label><input autocomplete="current-password" id="adminPass" placeholder="Enter password" type="password"/></div>
</div>
<div class="admin-actions"><button class="admin-btn admin-primary" onclick="adminLogin()">Login</button><button class="admin-btn admin-secondary" onclick="closeAdminModal()">Cancel</button></div>
</div>
<div class="admin-body" id="adminEditBox" style="display:none">
<div class="admin-save-info">✅ After login, you can directly edit text on the page. Certificate cards will show an Upload Image button. Click Save Permanently to save all changed text, profile data and certificate images in this browser.</div>
<div class="admin-tabs">
<button class="admin-tab active" onclick="adminGoTab('home',this)">Home<small>edit homepage</small></button>
<button class="admin-tab" onclick="adminGoTab('about',this)">About<small>about info</small></button>
<button class="admin-tab" onclick="adminGoTab('skills',this)">Skills<small>skills visual</small></button>
<button class="admin-tab" onclick="adminGoTab('projects',this)">Projects<small>project images</small></button>
<button class="admin-tab" onclick="adminGoTab('experience',this)">Experience<small>job details</small></button>
<button class="admin-tab" onclick="adminGoTab('growth',this)">Growth<small>dashboard</small></button>
<button class="admin-tab" onclick="adminGoTab('certs',this)">Certs<small>cert images</small></button>
<button class="admin-tab" onclick="adminGoTab('awards',this)">Awards<small>award images</small></button>
</div>
<div class="admin-grid">
<div class="admin-field"><label>Name</label><input id="editName"/></div>
<div class="admin-field"><label>Role</label><input id="editRole"/></div>
<div class="admin-field"><label>Email</label><input id="editEmail"/></div>
<div class="admin-field"><label>Phone</label><input id="editPhone"/></div>
<div class="admin-field"><label>Location</label><input id="editLocation"/></div>
<div class="admin-field"><label>LinkedIn</label><input id="editLinkedin"/></div>
<div class="admin-field full"><label>Hero Description</label><textarea id="editDesc"></textarea></div>
<div class="admin-field"><label>Dashboards KPI</label><input id="editDashboards"/></div>
<div class="admin-field"><label>Experience KPI</label><input id="editExperience"/></div>
<div class="admin-field"><label>Rating KPI</label><input id="editRating"/></div>
<div class="admin-field full"><label>Profile Photo</label><input accept="image/*" id="editPhoto" type="file"/><div class="admin-help-line">Upload profile picture from here or click any image on website in edit mode.</div></div>

</div>

</div>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<div class="page" id="page-about">
<section class="sec">
<p class="sec-label">About</p><h2>Data-driven Analyst</h2><div class="sec-bar"></div>
<div class="about-grid">
<div class="about-img">🧑‍💻</div>
<div class="about-body">
<h3 style="font-size:1rem;margin-bottom:.7rem;font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;">Hi, I'm Akash 👋</h3>
<p>Power BI Developer &amp; BI Analyst based in Mumbai, India. I specialize in designing interactive dashboards, building data pipelines, and translating complex datasets into clear, actionable insights that decision-makers can actually use.</p>
<p>My work sits at the intersection of analytics, visualization, and business strategy — helping organizations make smarter, faster decisions backed by real data. I've delivered 50+ dashboards across sales, operations, and customer analytics domains.</p>
<p>Currently open to full-time roles, freelance projects, and exciting collaborations in the BI &amp; Analytics space.</p>
<div class="chips">
<span class="chip">📍 Mumbai, India</span><span class="chip">💼 BI Analyst</span>
<span class="chip">🎓 B.Tech CS</span><span class="chip">⚡ Available Now</span>
<span class="chip">📊 Power BI Expert</span><span class="chip">🐍 Python</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
</div>
<!-- SKILLS -->

<!-- CHATBOT -->
<button class="chat-fab" id="chatFab" onclick="toggleChat()">
<span class="chat-fab-icon">💬</span>
<div class="chat-badge">AI</div>
</button>
<div class="cwin" id="chatWin">
<div class="chat-hdr">
<div class="chat-av">AK</div>
<div><div class="chat-av-name">Akash's AI Assistant</div><div class="chat-av-status">Online now</div></div>
<button class="cclose" onclick="toggleChat()">✕</button>
</div>
<div class="cmsgs" id="cmsgs">
<div class="cmsg bot"><div class="cdot">AK</div><div class="cbubble">Hi there! 👋 I'm Akash's AI assistant. Ask me anything about his skills, projects, experience, certifications, or how to hire him!</div></div>
</div>
<div class="cquick">
<button class="cqbtn" onclick="quickAsk('What are Akash\'s main skills?')">🛠 Skills</button>
<button class="cqbtn" onclick="quickAsk('Tell me about Akash\'s projects')">💼 Work</button>
<button class="cqbtn" onclick="quickAsk('What certifications does Akash have?')">🎓 Certs</button>
<button class="cqbtn" onclick="quickAsk('How can I connect with Akash?')">🔗 Connect</button>
<button class="cqbtn" onclick="quickAsk('I want to hire Akash')">📩 Hire</button>
</div>
<div class="cinput-row">
<input class="cinput" id="chatIn" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')sendChat()" placeholder="Ask anything about Akash..." type="text"/>
<button class="csend" onclick="sendChat()">➤</button>
</div>
</div>
<script>
const OWNER_EMAIL='akashkourav7566@gmail.com';
const OWNER_WHATSAPP='+917509762086';
let chatOpen=false,marketLoaded=false,homeMarketLoaded=false;

// ── THOUGHTS ──
const THOUGHTS=[
  {text:'"Data is the new oil, but insight is the refinery."',author:'— Anonymous'},
  {text:'"Without data, you\'re just another person with an opinion."',author:'— W. Edwards Deming'},
  {text:'"The goal is to turn data into information and information into insight."',author:'— Carly Fiorina'},
  {text:'"In God we trust; all others must bring data."',author:'— W. Edwards Deming'},
  {text:'"Data will talk to you if you\'re willing to listen."',author:'— Jim Bergeson'},
  {text:'"Torture the data long enough and it will confess to anything."',author:'— Ronald Coase'},
  {text:'"The world is one big data problem."',author:'— Andrew McAfee'},
  {text:'"Data beats emotions."',author:'— Sean Rad'},
  {text:'"It is a capital mistake to theorize before one has data."',author:'— Arthur Conan Doyle'},
  {text:'"Numbers have an important story to tell. They rely on you to give them a clear and convincing voice."',author:'— Stephen Few'},
  {text:'"Information is the oil of the 21st century, and analytics is the combustion engine."',author:'— Peter Sondergaard'},
  {text:'"The most valuable commodity I know of is information."',author:'— Gordon Gekko'},
  {text:'"Make it simple, but significant."',author:'— Don Draper'},
  {text:'"Every company has big data in its future, and every company will eventually be in the data business."',author:'— Thomas H. Davenport'},
];
let lastThoughtIdx=-1;
function refreshThought(){
  let idx;do{idx=Math.floor(Math.random()*THOUGHTS.length);}while(idx===lastThoughtIdx&&THOUGHTS.length>1);
  lastThoughtIdx=idx;
  const t=THOUGHTS[idx];
  const textEl=document.getElementById('thoughtText');
  const authEl=document.getElementById('thoughtAuthor');
  textEl.style.opacity='0';authEl.style.opacity='0';
  setTimeout(()=>{textEl.textContent=t.text;authEl.textContent=t.author;textEl.style.transition='opacity .4s';authEl.style.transition='opacity .4s';textEl.style.opacity='1';authEl.style.opacity='1';},220);
}

// ── MOBILE DRAWER ──
function toggleMobileDrawer(){
  const drawer=document.getElementById('mobileDrawer');
  const ham=document.getElementById('navHamburger');
  const isOpen=drawer.classList.toggle('open');
  ham.classList.toggle('open',isOpen);
}
function closeMobileDrawer(){
  document.getElementById('mobileDrawer').classList.remove('open');
  document.getElementById('navHamburger').classList.remove('open');
}

// ── KB ──
const KB={
  name:'Akash Kourav',role:'Power BI Developer & BI Analyst based in Mumbai, India',
  email:'akashkourav7566@gmail.com',phone:'+91 75097 62086',
  about:'Akash Kourav is a Power BI Developer & BI Analyst based in Mumbai, India with 2+ years of experience. He specializes in designing interactive dashboards, building data pipelines, and translating complex datasets into actionable insights. Currently available for full-time roles, freelance projects, and collaborations.',
  skills:'Akash\'s core skills:\n• Power BI & DAX — Expert (95%)\n• SQL / MySQL — Advanced (90%)\n• Tableau — Advanced (85%)\n• Data Modeling — Advanced (88%)\n• Python (Pandas, NumPy) — Intermediate (80%)\n• ETL Pipelines — Advanced\n• Azure / Cloud — Intermediate (70%)\n• Data Storytelling & Stakeholder Management',
  projects:'Key projects:\n1. 📊 Executive Sales Dashboard — Power BI, 3 regions, reduced reporting by 6hrs/week\n2. ⚡ Automated Reporting Pipeline — Python ETL, eliminated 8hrs/week manual work\n3. 📉 Customer Churn Analysis — Tableau, reduced churn 15%\n4. 🏭 Operations Performance Tracker — BigQuery/Looker, SLA dashboard across 5 depts',
  certs:'5 certifications:\n• 🪟 PL-300: Power BI Data Analyst (Microsoft, 2024)\n• 🔍 Google Data Analytics Professional (2023)\n• 📊 Tableau Desktop Specialist (2023)\n• ☁️ AZ-900: Azure Fundamentals (2022)\n• 🐍 Python Essentials 1 & 2 (Cisco, 2022)',
  experience:'Experience:\n• Associate Analyst – BI at XYZ Analytics (2023–Present): 15+ dashboards, 40% effort reduction\n• Data Analyst Intern at ABC Solutions (2022–2023): Tableau, 500K+ row EDA\n• B.Tech CS, University of Mumbai (2018–2022)',
  impact:'Impact:\n• 50+ dashboards built\n• 40% time saved\n• 30% cost savings\n• 60% faster dashboards via SQL optimization\n• 8+ hrs/week saved via automation',
  awards:'Awards:\n• 🏆 Star Performer Award — Q3 2024\n• 🌟 Client Appreciation Letter — zero-revision delivery',
  hire:'To hire or connect with Akash:\n📧 akashkourav7566@gmail.com\n📱 +91 75097 62086\n🔗 linkedin.com/in/akashkourav\n\nOpen to: Full-time roles, Freelance, Collaborations, Mentorship\n\nSay "open contact form" to reach out directly!',
  contact_form:'Opening the contact form now! Fill in your details and Akash will respond within 24 hours. 📩',
};
function getBotReply(msg){
  const m=msg.toLowerCase();
  if(m==='yes'||m.includes('open contact')||m.includes('get in touch')||m.includes('contact form')){setTimeout(()=>{toggleChat();scrollToContact();},400);return KB.contact_form;}
  if(m.includes('skill')||m.includes('tool')||m.includes('technolog'))return KB.skills;
  if(m.includes('project')||m.includes('work')||m.includes('dashboard')||m.includes('portfolio'))return KB.projects;
  if(m.includes('cert')||m.includes('pl-300')||m.includes('credential'))return KB.certs;
  if(m.includes('award')||m.includes('recognition')||m.includes('achiev'))return KB.awards;
  if(m.includes('hire')||m.includes('recruit')||m.includes('available')||m.includes('open to'))return KB.hire;
  if(m.includes('connect')||m.includes('contact')||m.includes('email')||m.includes('reach')||m.includes('whatsapp'))return KB.hire;
  if(m.includes('experience')||m.includes('job')||m.includes('career')||m.includes('company'))return KB.experience;
  if(m.includes('impact')||m.includes('result')||m.includes('saving')||m.includes('stat'))return KB.impact;
  if(m.includes('hello')||m.includes('hi ')||m==='hi'||m==='hello'||m.includes('hey'))return 'Hi! 👋 I\'m Akash\'s AI assistant. Ask me about his skills, projects, certifications, experience, or how to hire him.';
  if(m.includes('location')||m.includes('where')||m.includes('mumbai'))return 'Akash is based in Mumbai, India. Available for remote work globally as well as on-site opportunities in Mumbai.';
  if(m.includes('education')||m.includes('degree')||m.includes('btech'))return 'B.Tech in Computer Science from University of Mumbai (2018–2022). Final year project was a Power BI analytics platform.';
  if(m.includes('about')||m.includes('who is'))return KB.about;
  return 'I can help with:\n• 🛠 Skills & technologies\n• 💼 Projects & portfolio\n• 🎓 Certifications\n• 📋 Work experience\n• 🏆 Awards\n• 📩 How to hire Akash\n\nWhat would you like to know?';
}

// ── NAV ──
function showPage(id,tab,fromMobile){
  document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-tab').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav-tab').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('page-'+id).classList.add('active');
  if(tab&&tab.classList){
    tab.classList.add('active');
    // sync the desktop tab too
    const allDesktop=document.querySelectorAll('.nav-tab');
    const pages=['home','about','skills','projects','experience','growth','market','certs','awards'];
    const idx=pages.indexOf(id);
    if(idx>=0&&allDesktop[idx])allDesktop[idx].classList.add('active');
  }
  window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'});
  if(fromMobile)closeMobileDrawer();
  if(id==='growth')setTimeout(initGrowthChart,120);
  if(id==='market'&&!marketLoaded)loadMarket();
}

// ── TOAST ──
function showToast(msg,dur=3000){
  const t=document.getElementById('toast');t.textContent=msg;t.classList.add('show');
  setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove('show'),dur);
}

// ── LIGHTBOX ──
function openLB(src){document.getElementById('lb-img').src=src;document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.add('open');}
function closeLB(){document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.remove('open');}

// ── SCROLL TO CONTACT ──
function scrollToContact(){
  showPage('home',document.querySelector('.nav-tab'));
  setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById('contactSection').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'}),300);
}

// ── CONTACT FORM ──
async function handleFormSubmit(){
  const name=document.getElementById('f-name').value.trim();
  const mobile=document.getElementById('f-mobile').value.trim();
  const email=document.getElementById('f-email').value.trim();
  const purpose=document.getElementById('f-purpose').value;
  const desc=document.getElementById('f-desc').value.trim();
  if(!name||!email||!purpose){showToast('⚠️ Please fill Name, Email & Purpose');return;}

  const btn=document.getElementById('formSubmitBtn');
  btn.disabled=true;
  btn.textContent='⏳ Sending...';

  const msgBody=`New Contact Request from Portfolio:

Name: ${name}
Mobile: ${mobile||'Not provided'}
Email: ${email}
Purpose: ${purpose}
Message: ${desc||'No message'}

Submitted from Akash Kourav Portfolio`;
  const waMsg=`🔔 *New Portfolio Contact*

*Name:* ${name}
*Mobile:* ${mobile||'N/A'}
*Email:* ${email}
*Purpose:* ${purpose}
*Message:* ${desc||'N/A'}`;
  const waLink=`https://wa.me/${OWNER_WHATSAPP.replace(/\D/g,'')}?text=${encodeURIComponent(waMsg)}`;

  // WhatsApp does not allow any website to send silently without official WhatsApp Cloud API.
  // This opens WhatsApp instantly with all details filled, so the visitor can tap Send.
  let waWindow=null;
  try{waWindow=window.open('', '_blank');}catch(e){}

  try{
    const payload={
      name,
      mobile: mobile || 'Not provided',
      email,
      purpose,
      message: desc || 'No message',
      _subject:`Portfolio Contact: ${purpose} from ${name}`,
      _template:'table',
      _captcha:'false'
    };

    const res=await fetch(`https://formsubmit.co/ajax/${OWNER_EMAIL}`,{
      method:'POST',
      headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Accept':'application/json'},
      body:JSON.stringify(payload)
    });

    if(!res.ok) throw new Error('Email service failed');

    if(waWindow){waWindow.location.href=waLink;}else{window.open(waLink,'_blank');}
    showToast('✅ Details sent to email. WhatsApp message opened with all details.',5200);
  }catch(err){
    if(waWindow){waWindow.location.href=waLink;}else{window.open(waLink,'_blank');}
    const mailtoLink=`mailto:${OWNER_EMAIL}?subject=Portfolio Contact: ${encodeURIComponent(purpose)} from ${encodeURIComponent(name)}&body=${encodeURIComponent(msgBody)}`;
    setTimeout(()=>window.open(mailtoLink,'_blank'),250);
    showToast('⚠️ Email API fallback opened. WhatsApp message also opened.',6000);
  }

  ['f-name','f-mobile','f-email','f-desc'].forEach(id=>{document.getElementById(id).value='';});
  document.getElementById('f-purpose').selectedIndex=0;
  btn.disabled=false;
  btn.textContent='🚀 Send Message';
}

// ── CHATBOT ──
function toggleChat(){
  chatOpen=!chatOpen;
  const w=document.getElementById('chatWin');
  chatOpen?w.classList.add('open'):w.classList.remove('open');
}
function quickAsk(q){
  if(!chatOpen){chatOpen=true;document.getElementById('chatWin').classList.add('open');}
  document.getElementById('chatIn').value=q;sendChat();
}
function sendChat(){
  const inp=document.getElementById('chatIn'),msg=inp.value.trim();
  if(!msg)return;inp.value='';
  appendMsg('user',msg);
  const typingId='t'+Date.now();appendTyping(typingId);
  setTimeout(()=>{removeTyping(typingId);appendMsg('bot',getBotReply(msg));},480+Math.random()*300);
}
function appendMsg(role,text){
  const c=document.getElementById('cmsgs');
  const d=document.createElement('div');d.className='cmsg '+role;
  const dot=document.createElement('div');dot.className='cdot';dot.textContent=role==='bot'?'AK':'👤';
  const b=document.createElement('div');b.className='cbubble';b.textContent=text;
  d.appendChild(dot);d.appendChild(b);c.appendChild(d);c.scrollTop=c.scrollHeight;
}
function appendTyping(id){
  const c=document.getElementById('cmsgs');
  const d=document.createElement('div');d.className='cmsg bot';d.id=id;
  const dot=document.createElement('div');dot.className='cdot';dot.textContent='AK';
  const b=document.createElement('div');b.className='cbubble';
  b.innerHTML='<span class="typing-dots"><span></span><span></span><span></span></span>';
  d.appendChild(dot);d.appendChild(b);c.appendChild(d);c.scrollTop=c.scrollHeight;
}
function removeTyping(id){const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.remove();}

// ── RADAR CHART ──
function initRadarChart(){
  const ctx=document.getElementById('radarChart');if(!ctx)return;
  if(ctx._chartInstance){ctx._chartInstance.destroy();}
  ctx._chartInstance=new Chart(ctx,{
    type:'radar',
    data:{
      labels:['Power BI','SQL','Python','Tableau','Azure','Data Modeling'],
      datasets:[{label:'Proficiency',data:[95,90,80,85,70,88],backgroundColor:'rgba(232,83,10,.12)',borderColor:'#e8530a',borderWidth:2.5,pointBackgroundColor:'#e8530a',pointBorderColor:'#fff',pointBorderWidth:2,pointRadius:4,pointHoverRadius:6}]
    },
    options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:true,plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:{callbacks:{label:c=>' '+c.raw+'%'}}},scales:{r:{min:0,max:100,ticks:{display:false,stepSize:20},grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.05)'},angleLines:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.05)'},pointLabels:{color:'#8892a4',font:{size:10,family:'DM Sans',weight:'600'}}}}}
  });
  setTimeout(()=>document.querySelectorAll('.skill-bar-fill').forEach(bar=>{bar.style.width=bar.dataset.width;}),350);
}

// ── GROWTH DASHBOARD CHARTS + API ──
let growthCharts=[];
function destroyGrowthCharts(){growthCharts.forEach(c=>{try{c.destroy()}catch(e){}});growthCharts=[];}
function chartBaseOptions(extra={}){
  return Object.assign({responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{labels:{color:'#8892a4',usePointStyle:true,pointStyle:'circle',padding:12,font:{family:'DM Sans',size:11}}},tooltip:{backgroundColor:'rgba(7,9,15,.96)',borderColor:'rgba(232,83,10,.22)',borderWidth:1,titleColor:'#fff',bodyColor:'#dfe6f2',padding:10,titleFont:{weight:'bold',family:'DM Sans'}}},scales:{y:{ticks:{color:'#50596b',font:{size:10}},grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.035)'},beginAtZero:true},x:{ticks:{color:'#50596b',font:{size:11}},grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.025)'}}}},extra);
}
function initGrowthChart(){
  if(!document.getElementById('growthTrendChart'))return;
  destroyGrowthCharts();
  const trend=document.getElementById('growthTrendChart');
  growthCharts.push(new Chart(trend,{type:'line',data:{labels:['2021','2022','2023','2024','2025'],datasets:[
    {label:'Skills',data:[2,5,8,10,12],borderColor:'#e8530a',backgroundColor:'rgba(232,83,10,.10)',borderWidth:2.6,fill:true,tension:.42,pointBackgroundColor:'#e8530a',pointRadius:4},
    {label:'Dashboards',data:[3,10,22,38,50],borderColor:'#3d7fff',backgroundColor:'rgba(61,127,255,.07)',borderWidth:2.6,fill:true,tension:.42,pointBackgroundColor:'#3d7fff',pointRadius:4},
    {label:'Automation %',data:[0,8,20,42,60],borderColor:'#16c76a',backgroundColor:'rgba(22,199,106,.07)',borderWidth:2.6,fill:true,tension:.42,pointBackgroundColor:'#16c76a',pointRadius:4}
  ]},options:chartBaseOptions()}));

  const ready=document.getElementById('growthReadinessChart');
  growthCharts.push(new Chart(ready,{type:'doughnut',data:{labels:['Power BI','SQL','DAX','Azure','Python','To Improve'],datasets:[{data:[95,90,88,70,80,8],backgroundColor:['#e8530a','#ff7a2f','#3d7fff','#9d6ef5','#16c76a','rgba(255,255,255,.07)'],borderColor:'rgba(7,9,15,.9)',borderWidth:3,hoverOffset:8}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,cutout:'68%',plugins:{legend:{position:'bottom',labels:{color:'#8892a4',usePointStyle:true,pointStyle:'circle',font:{size:10,family:'DM Sans'}}},tooltip:{backgroundColor:'rgba(7,9,15,.96)',borderColor:'rgba(232,83,10,.22)',borderWidth:1}}}}));

  const skill=document.getElementById('growthSkillChart');
  growthCharts.push(new Chart(skill,{type:'bar',data:{labels:['PBI','SQL','DAX','Python','Azure','Tableau'],datasets:[{label:'Skill %',data:[95,90,88,80,70,85],backgroundColor:['#e8530a','#f26b2a','#ff8c52','#3d7fff','#9d6ef5','#16c76a'],borderRadius:8,barThickness:18}]},options:chartBaseOptions({plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{y:{max:100,ticks:{color:'#50596b'},grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.035)'}},x:{ticks:{color:'#8892a4'},grid:{display:false}}}})}));

  const impact=document.getElementById('growthImpactChart');
  growthCharts.push(new Chart(impact,{type:'polarArea',data:{labels:['Time Saved','Cost Saving','Quality','Adoption'],datasets:[{data:[60,30,85,75],backgroundColor:['rgba(232,83,10,.78)','rgba(61,127,255,.72)','rgba(22,199,106,.72)','rgba(157,110,245,.72)'],borderColor:'rgba(255,255,255,.12)',borderWidth:1}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{position:'bottom',labels:{color:'#8892a4',usePointStyle:true,font:{size:10,family:'DM Sans'}}}},scales:{r:{ticks:{display:false},grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.06)'}}}}}));
}

async function refreshGrowthAPI(){
  const status=document.getElementById('growthApiStatus');
  const updated=document.getElementById('growthUpdated');
  if(status)status.textContent='● API Loading...';
  try{
    const user=(document.querySelector('a[href*="github.com/"]')?.href.split('github.com/')[1]||'akashkourav').replace('/','').trim();
    const res=await fetch('https://api.github.com/users/'+encodeURIComponent(user),{cache:'no-store'});
    if(!res.ok)throw new Error('API unavailable');
    const profile=await res.json();
    const repos=profile.public_repos||12;
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-growth-kpi="repos"]').forEach(el=>el.textContent=repos+'+');
    const trend=document.getElementById('repoTrend');if(trend)trend.textContent='API';
    if(status)status.textContent='● API Connected';
    if(updated)updated.textContent='GitHub API';
    localStorage.setItem('akash_growth_api_cache',JSON.stringify({repos,updated:new Date().toISOString()}));
    showToast('✅ Growth dashboard updated from API');
  }catch(err){
    if(status)status.textContent='● Local Data';
    if(updated)updated.textContent='Local Saved Data';
    showToast('⚠️ API unavailable, showing local portfolio data');
  }
  initGrowthChart();
}
function applyGrowthCache(){
  try{const c=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('akash_growth_api_cache')||'null');if(c&&c.repos){document.querySelectorAll('[data-growth-kpi="repos"]').forEach(el=>el.textContent=c.repos+'+');}}
  catch(e){}
}
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{applyGrowthCache();setTimeout(initGrowthChart,250);});

// ── MARKET ──
const FALLBACK_ARTICLES=[
  {category:'POWER BI',title:'Power BI Copilot Improves Report Creation Speed',summary:'AI-assisted report creation and smarter dashboard narratives continue to improve analyst productivity.',url:'https://powerbi.microsoft.com/blog',date:'May 2026'},
  {category:'FABRIC',title:'Microsoft Fabric OneLake Gains Stronger Governance Features',summary:'Fabric updates focus on unified governance, data lineage and better lakehouse operations for analytics teams.',url:'https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/fabric',date:'May 2026'},
  {category:'CLOUD',title:'Azure Analytics Workloads Shift Toward Serverless Patterns',summary:'Serverless and scalable cloud analytics remain a key trend for BI and data engineering teams.',url:'https://azure.microsoft.com/blog',date:'May 2026'},
  {category:'AI & ML',title:'AI-Powered Data Storytelling Becomes a BI Standard',summary:'Organizations are combining dashboards with LLM-powered explanations to create faster business insights.',url:'https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-foundry',date:'May 2026'},
  {category:'POWER BI',title:'Power BI Semantic Model Optimization Gets More Attention',summary:'Performance tuning, model size reduction and DAX optimization are becoming key skills for BI developers.',url:'https://powerbi.microsoft.com/blog',date:'May 2026'},
  {category:'FABRIC',title:'Fabric Data Engineering Pipelines Continue to Expand',summary:'Notebook, pipeline and lakehouse improvements are helping teams simplify end-to-end analytics workflows.',url:'https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/fabric/data-engineering/',date:'May 2026'},
  {category:'CLOUD',title:'Azure Data Factory and Synapse Integration Use Cases Grow',summary:'ETL and ELT workloads continue moving toward managed cloud orchestration and automated data refresh.',url:'https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/data-factory/',date:'May 2026'},
  {category:'AI & ML',title:'Predictive Analytics Skills Rise in BI Job Descriptions',summary:'BI roles increasingly ask for Python, ML basics and AI-driven forecasting with dashboard integration.',url:'https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/machine-learning/',date:'May 2026'},
  {category:'POWER BI',title:'Direct Lake and Composite Models Improve Large Data Reporting',summary:'Modern Power BI architectures are focusing on lower latency reporting over enterprise-scale datasets.',url:'https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/power-bi/',date:'May 2026'},
  {category:'FABRIC',title:'Real-Time Intelligence Use Cases Expand in Microsoft Fabric',summary:'Streaming dashboards, event-driven analytics and real-time monitoring are becoming more common for operations teams.',url:'https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/fabric/real-time-intelligence/',date:'May 2026'}
];
const catColors={'POWER BI':'#e8530a','FABRIC':'#9d6ef5','CLOUD':'#3d7fff','AI & ML':'#16c76a'};

function getLatestMarketDate(articles){
  const dates=(articles||[]).map(a=>a.date).filter(Boolean);
  return dates[0]||new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-IN',{month:'short',year:'numeric'});
}
function updateMarketDashboard(articles,source){
  const list=(articles||[]).slice(0,10);
  const cats=[...new Set(list.map(a=>a.category).filter(Boolean))];
  const latest=getLatestMarketDate(list);
  const countEl=document.getElementById('marketKpiCount'); if(countEl) countEl.textContent=list.length;
  const dateEl=document.getElementById('marketKpiDate'); if(dateEl) dateEl.textContent=latest;
  const catEl=document.getElementById('marketKpiCategories'); if(catEl) catEl.textContent=cats.length;
  const srcEl=document.getElementById('marketKpiSource'); if(srcEl) srcEl.textContent=source||'Live';
  const srcSub=document.getElementById('marketKpiSourceSub'); if(srcSub) srcSub.textContent=source==='Local'?'Showing saved fallback updates':'Latest refresh applied';
  const overview=document.getElementById('marketOverviewText');
  if(overview) overview.textContent=`Showing ${list.length} recent updates. Latest update date: ${latest}. Covered areas: ${cats.join(', ') || 'Power BI, Fabric, Cloud, AI/ML'}.`;
  const pill=document.getElementById('marketOverviewPill'); if(pill) pill.textContent=`${list.length} Updates · ${latest}`;
}

function renderMarketInto(containerId,articles){
  const feed=document.getElementById(containerId);
  if(!articles||!articles.length){feed.innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);text-align:center;padding:2rem;">No updates found. Try refreshing.</p>';return;}
  const grid=document.createElement('div');grid.className='market-grid';
  articles.slice(0,10).forEach(a=>{
    const color=catColors[a.category]||'var(--orange)';
    const card=document.createElement('a');card.className='market-card';card.href=a.url||'#';card.target='_blank';card.rel='noopener noreferrer';
    card.innerHTML=`<div class="market-tag" style="color:${color}">● ${a.category}</div><div class="market-title">${a.title}</div><div class="market-desc">${a.summary}</div><div class="market-date">📅 ${a.date||'Latest'}</div>`;
    grid.appendChild(card);
  });
  feed.innerHTML='';feed.appendChild(grid);
}

async function loadMarketData(force){
  const today=new Date().toDateString(),cacheKey='mkt_'+today;
  if(!force){const c=sessionStorage.getItem(cacheKey);if(c)return JSON.parse(c);}
  try{
    const res=await fetch('https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','anthropic-version':'2023-06-01','anthropic-dangerous-direct-browser-access':'true'},body:JSON.stringify({model:'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',max_tokens:1200,tools:[{type:'web_search_20250305',name:'web_search'}],system:'Return ONLY a valid JSON array, no markdown, no preamble.',messages:[{role:'user',content:'Search for 10 latest news articles this week about Power BI updates, Microsoft Fabric, Azure cloud, AI/ML for data analytics. Return ONLY JSON array: [{"category":"POWER BI","title":"...","summary":"...","url":"https://...","date":"..."},...] Categories must be one of: POWER BI, FABRIC, CLOUD, AI & ML'}]})});
    if(!res.ok)throw new Error('api');
    const data=await res.json();
    const text=data.content.map(b=>b.type==='text'?b.text:'').join('');
    const match=text.match(/\[[\s\S]*\]/);
    const articles=JSON.parse(match?match[0]:text);
    sessionStorage.setItem(cacheKey,JSON.stringify(articles));
    sessionStorage.setItem(cacheKey+'_source','API');
    return articles.slice(0,10);
  }catch{sessionStorage.setItem(cacheKey+'_source','Local');return FALLBACK_ARTICLES.slice(0,10);}
}

async function loadHomeMarket(force=false){
  if(!force&&homeMarketLoaded)return;homeMarketLoaded=true;
  document.getElementById('homeMarketFeed').innerHTML='<div class="market-loading"><div class="market-spinner"></div>Fetching latest updates...</div>';
  const articles=await loadMarketData(force);renderMarketInto('homeMarketFeed',articles);
}

async function loadMarket(force=false){
  marketLoaded=true;
  document.getElementById('marketFeed').innerHTML='<div class="market-loading"><div class="market-spinner"></div>Fetching latest updates...</div>';
  const articles=await loadMarketData(force);updateMarketDashboard(articles,sessionStorage.getItem('mkt_'+new Date().toDateString()+'_source')||'Live');renderMarketInto('marketFeed',articles);
  const feed=document.getElementById('marketFeed');
  const rb=document.createElement('button');
  rb.style.cssText='display:block;margin:1.5rem auto 0;background:rgba(232,83,10,.09);border:1px solid rgba(232,83,10,.22);color:var(--orange);padding:.45rem 1.2rem;border-radius:7px;font-family:DM Sans,sans-serif;font-size:.71rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;';
  rb.textContent='🔄 Refresh Updates';rb.onclick=()=>{marketLoaded=false;loadMarket(true);};
  feed.appendChild(rb);
}

// ── INIT ──
window.addEventListener('load',()=>{
  initRadarChart();
  loadHomeMarket();
  refreshThought();
});


/* ── ADMIN EDIT + LOCAL PERMANENT SAVE ── */
const ADMIN_ID='Akash7566';
const ADMIN_PASS='Akash7566';
const ADMIN_STORE='akash_portfolio_saved_profile_v1';

function getText(selector){const el=document.querySelector(selector);return el?el.textContent.replace('✓','').trim():'';}
function setText(selector,value){document.querySelectorAll(selector).forEach(el=>{if(value!==undefined&&value!==null)el.textContent=value;});}
function setLink(selector,attr,value,prefix=''){document.querySelectorAll(selector).forEach(el=>{if(value)el.setAttribute(attr,prefix+value);});}
function openAdminLogin(){
  document.getElementById('adminModal').classList.add('open');
  document.getElementById('adminLoginBox').style.display='block';
  document.getElementById('adminEditBox').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('adminTitle').textContent='Admin Login';
  document.getElementById('adminUser').value='';
  document.getElementById('adminPass').value='';
}
function closeAdminModal(){document.getElementById('adminModal').classList.remove('open');}
function adminLogin(){
  const u=document.getElementById('adminUser').value.trim();
  const p=document.getElementById('adminPass').value.trim();
  if(u!==ADMIN_ID||p!==ADMIN_PASS){showToast('❌ Wrong User ID or Password');return;}
  document.body.classList.add('editing');
  document.getElementById('adminLoginBox').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('adminEditBox').style.display='block';
  document.getElementById('adminTitle').textContent='Edit Portfolio Information';
  fillAdminForm();
  showToast('✅ Edit mode enabled');
}
function fillAdminForm(){
  const data=getSavedPortfolioData();
  document.getElementById('editName').value=data.name||getText('.name-v2')||'Akash Kourav';
  document.getElementById('editRole').value=data.role||getText('.role-v2')||getText('.hero-subtitle-v2');
  document.getElementById('editEmail').value=data.email||'akashkourav7566@gmail.com';
  document.getElementById('editPhone').value=data.phone||'+91 75097 62086';
  document.getElementById('editLocation').value=data.location||'Mumbai, India';
  document.getElementById('editLinkedin').value=data.linkedin||'linkedin.com/in/akashkourav';
  document.getElementById('editDesc').value=data.desc||getText('.hero-desc-v2');
  document.getElementById('editDashboards').value=data.dashboards||'50+';
  document.getElementById('editExperience').value=data.experience||'2+';
  document.getElementById('editRating').value=data.rating||'5★';
}
function getSavedPortfolioData(){try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(ADMIN_STORE)||'{}')}catch(e){return {}}}
function applyPortfolioData(data){
  if(!data)return;
  setText('.name-v2',data.name?data.name+' ':undefined); if(data.name){const n=document.querySelector('.name-v2'); if(n&&!n.querySelector('.verified')) n.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend','<span class="verified">✓</span>');}
  setText('.nav-name',data.name); setText('.card-name',data.name); setText('.hero-title-v2',data.name?data.name.split(' ')[0]+' '+(data.name.split(' ').slice(1).join(' ')||''):undefined);
  if(data.role){setText('.role-v2',data.role);setText('.hero-subtitle-v2',data.role);setText('.card-role',data.role);}
  if(data.desc)setText('.hero-desc-v2',data.desc);
  if(data.email){document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="mailto:"]').forEach(a=>a.href='mailto:'+data.email);document.querySelectorAll('.contact-email,.info-email').forEach(e=>e.textContent=data.email);}
  if(data.phone){document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="tel:"]').forEach(a=>a.href='tel:'+data.phone.replace(/\s/g,''));document.querySelectorAll('.contact-phone,.info-phone').forEach(e=>e.textContent=data.phone);}
  if(data.linkedin){let url=data.linkedin.startsWith('http')?data.linkedin:'https://'+data.linkedin;document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="linkedin.com"]').forEach(a=>a.href=url);document.querySelectorAll('.contact-linkedin,.info-linkedin').forEach(e=>e.textContent=data.linkedin.replace(/^https?:\/\//,''));}
  if(data.location){document.querySelectorAll('.contact-location,.info-location').forEach(e=>e.textContent=data.location);}
  if(data.dashboards){document.querySelectorAll('[data-kpi="dashboards"], .metric-dashboard').forEach(e=>e.textContent=data.dashboards);}
  if(data.experience){document.querySelectorAll('[data-kpi="experience"], .metric-experience').forEach(e=>e.textContent=data.experience);}
  if(data.rating){document.querySelectorAll('[data-kpi="rating"], .metric-rating').forEach(e=>e.textContent=data.rating);}
  if(data.photo){document.querySelectorAll('img.profile-photo-v2,.profile-photo,.pimg').forEach(img=>img.src=data.photo);}
}
function saveAdminChanges(){
  const data={name:editName.value.trim(),role:editRole.value.trim(),email:editEmail.value.trim(),phone:editPhone.value.trim(),location:editLocation.value.trim(),linkedin:editLinkedin.value.trim(),desc:editDesc.value.trim(),dashboards:editDashboards.value.trim(),experience:editExperience.value.trim(),rating:editRating.value.trim()};
  const file=document.getElementById('editPhoto').files[0];
  const finish=(photo)=>{if(photo)data.photo=photo;else data.photo=getSavedPortfolioData().photo||'';localStorage.setItem(ADMIN_STORE,JSON.stringify(data));applyPortfolioData(data);showToast('✅ Saved permanently in this browser');closeAdminModal();};
  if(file){const reader=new FileReader();reader.onload=e=>finish(e.target.result);reader.readAsDataURL(file);}else finish();
}
function resetAdminChanges(){
  if(confirm('Remove all saved edits from this browser?')){localStorage.removeItem(ADMIN_STORE);showToast('Saved edits removed. Refresh page to see original code.');closeAdminModal();}
}
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{applyPortfolioData(getSavedPortfolioData());});



/* ── ADVANCED INLINE EDITOR: ALL SECTIONS + CERTIFICATE IMAGES ── */
const INLINE_STORE='akash_portfolio_inline_edits_v3';
const CERT_IMG_STORE='akash_portfolio_cert_images_v3';
const EDITABLE_SELECTOR='.page h1,.page h2,.page h3,.page p,.page li,.page .sec-label,.page .sec-sub,.page .proj-title,.page .proj-desc,.page .proj-type,.page .exp-title,.page .exp-company,.page .exp-period,.page .award-title,.page .award-desc,.page .cert-org,.page .cert-name,.page .cert-year,.page .cert-level,.page .cert-card-badge,.page .gkpi-val,.page .gkpi-label,.page .gkpi-sub,.page .timeline-card b,.page .timeline-card span,.page .timeline-card p,.page .sl-chip,.page .tech-chip-name,.page .tech-chip-level,.page .what-title,.page .what-desc,.page .market-title,.page .market-desc,.page .hero-desc-v2,.page .hero-subtitle-v2,.page .name-v2,.page .role-v2,.page .home-skill-name,.page .home-skill-percent';
function safeJSON(key){try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key)||'{}')}catch(e){return {}}}
function prepareInlineEditor(){
  const nodes=[...document.querySelectorAll(EDITABLE_SELECTOR)].filter(el=>!el.closest('nav')&&!el.closest('.admin-modal')&&!el.closest('.mobile-drawer')&&!el.closest('.chat-hdr')&&!el.closest('.cwin'));
  nodes.forEach((el,i)=>{if(!el.dataset.inlineId)el.dataset.inlineId='inline_'+i;});
  injectCertUploadButtons();
}
function applyInlineEdits(){
  prepareInlineEditor();
  const data=safeJSON(INLINE_STORE);
  Object.entries(data).forEach(([id,html])=>{const el=document.querySelector(`[data-inline-id="${id}"]`);if(el)el.innerHTML=html;});
  applyCertImages();
}
function enableInlineEditing(){
  prepareInlineEditor();
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-inline-id]').forEach(el=>{el.setAttribute('contenteditable','true');el.spellcheck=false;});
  document.querySelectorAll('.cert-upload-btn').forEach(b=>b.style.display='block');
}
function disableInlineEditing(){
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-inline-id]').forEach(el=>el.removeAttribute('contenteditable'));
}
function saveInlineEdits(){
  prepareInlineEditor();
  const data={};
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-inline-id]').forEach(el=>{data[el.dataset.inlineId]=el.innerHTML.trim();});
  localStorage.setItem(INLINE_STORE,JSON.stringify(data));
  return data;
}
function injectCertUploadButtons(){
  document.querySelectorAll('.cert-card').forEach((card,i)=>{
    if(card.querySelector('.cert-upload-btn'))return;
    const btn=document.createElement('button');btn.type='button';btn.className='cert-upload-btn';btn.textContent='📷 Upload Image';
    const input=document.createElement('input');input.type='file';input.accept='image/*';input.style.display='none';
    btn.onclick=(ev)=>{ev.stopPropagation();input.click();};
    input.onchange=()=>{const f=input.files[0];if(!f)return;const r=new FileReader();r.onload=e=>{setCertImage(i,e.target.result);showToast('✅ Certificate image updated. Click Save Permanently.');};r.readAsDataURL(f);};
    card.style.position='relative';card.appendChild(btn);card.appendChild(input);
  });
}
function setCertImage(index,src){
  const card=document.querySelectorAll('.cert-card')[index];if(!card)return;
  const wrap=card.querySelector('.cert-wrap');if(!wrap)return;
  wrap.innerHTML=`<img class="cert-img" src="${src}" alt="Certificate image" onclick="openLB('${src}')">`;
  const imgs=safeJSON(CERT_IMG_STORE);imgs[index]=src;localStorage.setItem(CERT_IMG_STORE,JSON.stringify(imgs));
  injectCertUploadButtons();
}
function applyCertImages(){
  injectCertUploadButtons();
  const imgs=safeJSON(CERT_IMG_STORE);
  Object.entries(imgs).forEach(([i,src])=>setCertImage(Number(i),src));
}
function clearAdvancedSavedData(){
  localStorage.removeItem(INLINE_STORE);localStorage.removeItem(CERT_IMG_STORE);
}
const _oldAdminLogin=adminLogin;
adminLogin=function(){_oldAdminLogin(); if(document.body.classList.contains('editing'))enableInlineEditing();};
const _oldSaveAdminChanges=saveAdminChanges;
saveAdminChanges=function(){saveInlineEdits(); _oldSaveAdminChanges(); setTimeout(portfolioSavedSuccess,120);};
const _oldResetAdminChanges=resetAdminChanges;
resetAdminChanges=function(){if(confirm('Remove all saved portfolio edits, page text and certificate images from this browser?')){localStorage.removeItem(ADMIN_STORE);clearAdvancedSavedData();showToast('Saved edits removed. Refresh page to see original code.');closeAdminModal();}};
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>setTimeout(applyInlineEdits,80));
window.addEventListener('load',()=>setTimeout(applyInlineEdits,350));

function syncHomeSkillsVisual(){
  const rows=[...document.querySelectorAll('[data-skill-row]')];
  const vals=[];
  rows.forEach(row=>{
    const pctEl=row.querySelector('.home-skill-percent');
    const fill=row.querySelector('.home-skill-fill');
    let val=parseInt((pctEl?.textContent||'0').replace(/[^0-9]/g,''),10);
    if(!Number.isFinite(val)) val=0;
    val=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,val));
    if(pctEl && !pctEl.textContent.includes('%')) pctEl.textContent=val+'%';
    if(fill) fill.style.width=val+'%';
    vals.push(val);
  });
  const poly=document.getElementById('homeRadarPoly');
  const dots=document.getElementById('homeRadarDots');
  if(poly && vals.length>=6){
    const cx=160, cy=125, r=83;
    const angles=[-90,-30,30,90,150,210];
    const pts=angles.map((a,i)=>{const rad=a*Math.PI/180;const rr=r*(vals[i]/100);return [cx+Math.cos(rad)*rr,cy+Math.sin(rad)*rr];});
    poly.setAttribute('points',pts.map(p=>p.map(n=>n.toFixed(1)).join(',')).join(' '));
    if(dots) dots.innerHTML=pts.map(p=>`<circle class="radar-dot-home" cx="${p[0].toFixed(1)}" cy="${p[1].toFixed(1)}" r="5"></circle>`).join('');
  }
}
function portfolioSavedSuccess(){
  syncHomeSkillsVisual();
  applyInlineEdits();
  disableInlineEditing();
  document.body.classList.remove('editing');
  closeAdminModal();
  showToast('✅ Saved successfully! Portfolio details and visuals updated.');
}
document.addEventListener('input',e=>{if(e.target.closest('[data-skill-row]'))syncHomeSkillsVisual();});
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>setTimeout(syncHomeSkillsVisual,500));
window.addEventListener('load',()=>setTimeout(syncHomeSkillsVisual,700));

/* ===== FINAL FIX: WORKING EDIT SAVE + LIVE REFLECTION ===== */
(function(){
  const ADMIN_STORE_FIXED = 'akash_portfolio_saved_profile_v1';
  function qsa(sel){ return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(sel)); }
  function byId(id){ return document.getElementById(id); }
  function cleanPhone(phone){ return (phone || '').replace(/[^0-9+]/g,''); }
  function linkedinUrl(v){ return !v ? '' : (v.startsWith('http') ? v : 'https://' + v.replace(/^\/+/,'')); }
  function text(el,val){ if(el && val !== undefined && val !== null && val !== '') el.textContent = val; }
  function setContactValue(label,value){
    if(!value) return;
    qsa('.contact-item-v2').forEach(item=>{
      const small=item.querySelector('small'), b=item.querySelector('b');
      if(small && b && small.textContent.trim().toLowerCase()===label.toLowerCase()) b.textContent=value;
    });
  }
  function setHomeKpiByLabel(labelText,value){
    if(!value) return;
    qsa('.kpi-v2,.mini-stat-v2').forEach(kpi=>{
      const label=kpi.querySelector('span'), b=kpi.querySelector('b');
      if(label && b && label.textContent.toLowerCase().includes(labelText.toLowerCase())) b.textContent=value;
    });
  }
  window.applyPortfolioData=function(data){
    if(!data) return;
    if(data.name){
      qsa('.name-v2').forEach(el=>{el.innerHTML=data.name+' <span class="verified">✓</span>';});
      qsa('.nav-name,.card-name').forEach(el=>text(el,data.name));
      const parts=data.name.split(/\s+/), first=parts.shift()||data.name, last=parts.join(' ');
      qsa('.hero-title-v2').forEach(el=>{el.innerHTML=first+(last?' <span class="gradient-text-v2">'+last+'</span>':'');});
    }
    if(data.role){ qsa('.role-v2,.hero-subtitle-v2,.card-role').forEach(el=>text(el,data.role)); }
    if(data.desc) qsa('.hero-desc-v2').forEach(el=>text(el,data.desc));
    if(data.email){ qsa('a[href^="mailto:"]').forEach(a=>a.href='mailto:'+data.email); setContactValue('Email',data.email); qsa('.contact-email,.info-email').forEach(el=>text(el,data.email)); }
    if(data.phone){ qsa('a[href^="tel:"]').forEach(a=>a.href='tel:'+cleanPhone(data.phone)); qsa('a[href*="wa.me"]').forEach(a=>a.href='https://wa.me/'+cleanPhone(data.phone).replace(/^\+/,'')); setContactValue('Phone',data.phone); qsa('.contact-phone,.info-phone').forEach(el=>text(el,data.phone)); }
    if(data.location){ setContactValue('Location',data.location); qsa('.contact-location,.info-location').forEach(el=>text(el,data.location)); }
    if(data.linkedin){ const url=linkedinUrl(data.linkedin), display=data.linkedin.replace(/^https?:\/\//,''); qsa('a[href*="linkedin.com"]').forEach(a=>a.href=url); setContactValue('LinkedIn',display); qsa('.contact-linkedin,.info-linkedin').forEach(el=>text(el,display)); }
    if(data.dashboards) setHomeKpiByLabel('dashboard',data.dashboards);
    if(data.experience) setHomeKpiByLabel('years',data.experience);
    if(data.rating) setHomeKpiByLabel('rating',data.rating);
    if(data.photo) qsa('img.profile-photo-v2,img.profile-photo,img.pimg').forEach(img=>{img.src=data.photo;});
  };
  window.saveAdminChanges=function(){
    const data={
      name:(byId('editName')?.value||'').trim(), role:(byId('editRole')?.value||'').trim(), email:(byId('editEmail')?.value||'').trim(),
      phone:(byId('editPhone')?.value||'').trim(), location:(byId('editLocation')?.value||'').trim(), linkedin:(byId('editLinkedin')?.value||'').trim(),
      desc:(byId('editDesc')?.value||'').trim(), dashboards:(byId('editDashboards')?.value||'').trim(), experience:(byId('editExperience')?.value||'').trim(), rating:(byId('editRating')?.value||'').trim()
    };
    let oldData={}; try{oldData=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(ADMIN_STORE_FIXED)||'{}')}catch(e){}
    const file=byId('editPhoto')?.files?.[0];
    const finish=(photo)=>{
      data.photo=photo||oldData.photo||'';
      localStorage.setItem(ADMIN_STORE_FIXED,JSON.stringify(data));
      window.applyPortfolioData(data);
      if(typeof window.prepareInlineEditor==='function') window.prepareInlineEditor();
      if(typeof window.saveInlineEdits==='function') window.saveInlineEdits();
      if(typeof window.syncHomeSkillsVisual==='function') window.syncHomeSkillsVisual();
      if(typeof window.disableInlineEditing==='function') window.disableInlineEditing();
      document.body.classList.remove('editing');
      if(typeof window.closeAdminModal==='function') window.closeAdminModal();
      if(typeof window.showToast==='function') window.showToast('✅ Saved successfully! Portfolio details updated.');
    };
    if(file){ const reader=new FileReader(); reader.onload=e=>finish(e.target.result); reader.readAsDataURL(file); } else finish();
  };
  window.adminLogin=function(){
    const u=byId('adminUser')?.value.trim(), p=byId('adminPass')?.value.trim();
    if(u!=='Akash7566'||p!=='Akash7566'){ if(typeof showToast==='function') showToast('❌ Wrong User ID or Password'); return; }
    document.body.classList.add('editing');
    byId('adminLoginBox').style.display='none'; byId('adminEditBox').style.display='block'; byId('adminTitle').textContent='Edit Portfolio Information';
    if(typeof fillAdminForm==='function') fillAdminForm();
    if(typeof enableInlineEditing==='function') enableInlineEditing();
    if(typeof showToast==='function') showToast('✅ Edit mode enabled. Change form fields or click any page text.');
  };
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{let saved={};try{saved=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(ADMIN_STORE_FIXED)||'{}')}catch(e){} setTimeout(()=>window.applyPortfolioData(saved),150);});
  window.addEventListener('load',()=>{let saved={};try{saved=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(ADMIN_STORE_FIXED)||'{}')}catch(e){} setTimeout(()=>window.applyPortfolioData(saved),700);});
})();

</script>
<script>
/* === FINAL ADMIN TAB + MEDIA EDIT FIX === */
(function(){
  const IMG_STORE='akash_portfolio_all_images_v7';
  const RESUME_STORE='akash_portfolio_resume_v7';
  const PROFILE_STORE='akash_portfolio_saved_profile_v1';
  const PLACEHOLDER='data:image/svg+xml;charset=UTF-8,'+encodeURIComponent('<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="600" height="360"><rect width="600" height="360" fill="#101422"/><rect x="24" y="24" width="552" height="312" rx="24" fill="#0c0f1a" stroke="#e8530a" stroke-opacity=".45"/><text x="300" y="170" fill="#e8530a" font-family="Arial" font-size="26" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">Image Removed</text><text x="300" y="205" fill="#8892a4" font-family="Arial" font-size="15" text-anchor="middle">Edit mode → upload again</text></svg>');
  const pageMap={home:'home',about:'about',skills:'skills',projects:'projects',experience:'experience',growth:'growth',certs:'certs',awards:'awards'};
  function qs(s,r=document){return r.querySelector(s)}
  function qsa(s,r=document){return Array.from(r.querySelectorAll(s))}
  function toast(m){ if(window.showToast) showToast(m); else alert(m); }
  function safe(k){try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(k)||'{}')}catch(e){return {}}}
  function save(k,v){localStorage.setItem(k,JSON.stringify(v))}
  function pageButton(page){return qsa('.nav-tab').find(b=>((b.textContent||'').toLowerCase().includes(page==='certs'?'cert':page)))||null;}
  function openFile(accept,cb){const i=document.createElement('input');i.type='file';i.accept=accept;i.onchange=()=>{const f=i.files&&i.files[0];if(!f)return;const r=new FileReader();r.onload=e=>cb(e.target.result,f.name);r.readAsDataURL(f)};i.click();}

  window.adminGoTab=function(tab,btn){
    const page=pageMap[tab]||tab;
    qsa('.admin-tab').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
    if(btn) btn.classList.add('active');
    document.body.classList.add('editing');
    if(window.showPage) showPage(page,pageButton(page));
    if(window.enableInlineEditing) enableInlineEditing();
    ensureMediaEditor();
    // Keep save option available after moving to any section
    closeAdminModal();
    const fa=document.getElementById('editFloatingActions'); if(fa) fa.style.display='flex';
    setTimeout(()=>window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'}),80);
    toast('✅ '+page.toUpperCase()+' opened in edit mode. Use bottom Save Permanently button after changes.');
  };

  function assignImageIds(){let n=0;qsa('img').forEach(img=>{if(img.closest('.admin-modal')||img.id==='lb-img')return;if(!img.dataset.imgId){let hint='image';if(img.matches('.profile-photo-v2,.profile-photo,.pimg'))hint='profile';else if(img.closest('.cert-card'))hint='certificate';else if(img.closest('.proj,.projects-grid'))hint='project';else if(img.closest('.award-card,.awards-grid'))hint='award';img.dataset.imgId=hint+'-'+(n++);} });}
  function applyStoredImages(){assignImageIds();const data=safe(IMG_STORE);qsa('img[data-img-id]').forEach(img=>{if(data[img.dataset.imgId])img.src=data[img.dataset.imgId]});const prof=safe(PROFILE_STORE).photo;if(prof)qsa('img.profile-photo-v2,img.profile-photo,img.pimg').forEach(i=>i.src=prof)}
  function storeImage(img,src){assignImageIds();const data=safe(IMG_STORE);data[img.dataset.imgId]=src;save(IMG_STORE,data);img.src=src;if(img.matches('.profile-photo-v2,.profile-photo,.pimg')){const p=safe(PROFILE_STORE);p.photo=src;save(PROFILE_STORE,p);qsa('img.profile-photo-v2,img.profile-photo,img.pimg').forEach(i=>i.src=src)}}
  function toolbar(){let tb=qs('#mediaEditToolbar');if(tb)return tb;tb=document.createElement('div');tb.id='mediaEditToolbar';tb.className='media-edit-toolbar';tb.innerHTML='<button type="button" data-act="change">📷 Change Image</button><button type="button" class="remove" data-act="remove">🗑 Remove Image</button>';document.body.appendChild(tb);return tb;}
  function positionToolbar(img){const tb=toolbar();const r=img.getBoundingClientRect();tb.dataset.target=img.dataset.imgId;tb.style.display='flex';tb.style.left=Math.max(8,window.scrollX+r.left+8)+'px';tb.style.top=Math.max(8,window.scrollY+r.top+8)+'px'}
  function mediaClick(e){if(!document.body.classList.contains('editing'))return;const b=e.target.closest('#mediaEditToolbar button');if(b){e.preventDefault();e.stopPropagation();const id=toolbar().dataset.target;const img=qs('img[data-img-id="'+CSS.escape(id)+'"]');if(!img)return;if(b.dataset.act==='remove'){storeImage(img,PLACEHOLDER);toast('🗑️ Image removed. Click Save Permanently.')}else{openFile('image/*',src=>{storeImage(img,src);toast('✅ Image changed. Click Save Permanently.')})}return;}const img=e.target.closest('img[data-img-id]');if(img&&!img.closest('.admin-modal')){e.preventDefault();e.stopPropagation();positionToolbar(img)}}
  window.ensureMediaEditor=function(){assignImageIds();applyStoredImages();toolbar();document.removeEventListener('click',mediaClick,true);document.addEventListener('click',mediaClick,true)};

  window.uploadResumeAdmin=function(){openFile('.pdf,.doc,.docx',(src,name)=>{save(RESUME_STORE,{src,name});applyResume();toast('✅ Resume uploaded. Click Save Permanently.')})};
  window.removeResumeAdmin=function(){localStorage.removeItem(RESUME_STORE);applyResume();toast('🗑️ Resume removed.')};
  window.applyResume=function(){const d=safe(RESUME_STORE);const label=qs('#resumeFileName');if(label)label.textContent=d.name?'Uploaded: '+d.name:'No resume uploaded';qsa('.btn-resume,a.btn-resume,button.btn-resume').forEach(el=>{if(d.src){el.onclick=function(){const a=document.createElement('a');a.href=d.src;a.download=d.name||'Akash_Resume.pdf';a.click()};el.innerHTML='⬇ Resume'}else{el.onclick=function(){toast('📄 Resume not uploaded. Login as admin and upload resume.')}}})};

  const oldLogin=window.adminLogin;
  window.adminLogin=function(){ if(oldLogin) oldLogin(); if(document.body.classList.contains('editing')){ensureMediaEditor();applyResume();qsa('.admin-tab').forEach(b=>{b.style.pointerEvents='auto';});} };
  const oldSave=window.saveAdminChanges;
  window.saveAdminChanges=function(){
    const resume=qs('#editResume')?.files?.[0];
    const run=()=>{if(window.saveInlineEdits)saveInlineEdits();applyStoredImages();applyResume();if(oldSave)oldSave();else{document.body.classList.remove('editing');closeAdminModal();toast('✅ Saved successfully.')}};
    if(resume){const r=new FileReader();r.onload=e=>{save(RESUME_STORE,{src:e.target.result,name:resume.name});run()};r.readAsDataURL(resume)}else run();
  };
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>setTimeout(()=>{applyStoredImages();applyResume();toolbar()},400));
  window.addEventListener('load',()=>setTimeout(()=>{applyStoredImages();applyResume();toolbar()},800));
})();
</script>
<script>
/* === FINAL FIX: reopen edit panel directly while in edit mode + keep save visible === */
(function(){
  const oldOpen = window.openAdminLogin;
  window.openAdminLogin = function(){
    if(oldOpen) oldOpen();
    setTimeout(()=>{
      if(document.body.classList.contains('editing')){
        const login=document.getElementById('adminLoginBox'), edit=document.getElementById('adminEditBox'), title=document.getElementById('adminTitle');
        if(login&&edit){login.style.display='none'; edit.style.display='block';}
        if(title) title.textContent='Edit Portfolio Information';
        if(window.fillAdminForm) fillAdminForm();
        if(window.ensureMediaEditor) ensureMediaEditor();
      }
    },30);
  };
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{
    const fa=document.getElementById('editFloatingActions');
    if(fa && document.body.classList.contains('editing')) fa.style.display='flex';
  });
})();
</script>
<style id="ak-add-more-edit-style">
.admin-add-more-bar{display:none;gap:.6rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:0 0 1rem 0;align-items:center}
body.editing .admin-add-more-bar{display:flex}
.admin-add-more-btn,.admin-remove-item-btn{border:none;border-radius:10px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--orange),var(--orange2));color:#fff;font-weight:800;font-size:.72rem;padding:.55rem .9rem;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(232,83,10,.22)}
.admin-add-more-btn:hover,.admin-remove-item-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}
.admin-remove-item-btn{display:none;position:absolute;right:.65rem;top:.65rem;z-index:20;background:#e11d48;padding:.35rem .58rem;font-size:.62rem}
body.editing [data-extra-id]{position:relative;outline:1px dashed rgba(232,83,10,.35);outline-offset:3px}
body.editing [data-extra-id] .admin-remove-item-btn{display:block}
body.editing [data-extra-id] [contenteditable="true"]{outline:1.5px dashed rgba(232,83,10,.65);outline-offset:3px;border-radius:6px;cursor:text}
.ak-extra-img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;cursor:pointer;border-radius:inherit}
</style>
<script id="ak-add-more-edit-script">
(function(){
  const EXTRA_STORE='akash_extra_edit_items_v3';
  const IMG_PLACEHOLDER='data:image/svg+xml;charset=UTF-8,'+encodeURIComponent(`<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="900" height="520" viewBox="0 0 900 520"><defs><linearGradient id="g" x1="0" x2="1"><stop stop-color="#111827"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#1f2937"/></linearGradient></defs><rect width="900" height="520" rx="28" fill="url(#g)"/><circle cx="450" cy="215" r="58" fill="#e8530a" opacity=".22"/><path d="M390 275l45-45 35 34 28-28 58 59H344z" fill="#e8530a" opacity=".75"/><text x="450" y="365" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e5e7eb" font-family="Arial" font-size="30" font-weight="700">Click in Edit Mode to Change Image</text></svg>`);
  const $=(s,r=document)=>r.querySelector(s), $$=(s,r=document)=>Array.from(r.querySelectorAll(s));
  const read=()=>{try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(EXTRA_STORE)||'{"projects":[],"experience":[],"certs":[],"awards":[]}')}catch(e){return {projects:[],experience:[],certs:[],awards:[]}}};
  const write=(d)=>localStorage.setItem(EXTRA_STORE,JSON.stringify(d));
  const toast=(m)=>{ if(typeof window.showToast==='function') window.showToast(m); else alert(m); };
  const id=()=> 'x'+Date.now().toString(36)+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,7);
  function esc(s){return String(s||'').replace(/[&<>"]/g,c=>({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;'}[c]));}
  function makeProject(o){return `<div class="proj" data-extra-type="projects" data-extra-id="${o.id}"><button class="admin-remove-item-btn" onclick="akRemoveExtraItem('projects','${o.id}')">Remove</button><div class="cert-wrap" style="height:135px;margin-bottom:.8rem;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04)"><img class="ak-extra-img" src="${esc(o.img||IMG_PLACEHOLDER)}" alt="Project image"></div><div class="proj-type" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.type||'Power BI · SQL · Analytics')}</div><div class="proj-title" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.title||'New Project Title')}</div><p class="proj-desc" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.desc||'Add project details, impact, tools used and business value here.')}</p></div>`}
  function makeExp(o){return `<div class="exp-item" data-extra-type="experience" data-extra-id="${o.id}"><button class="admin-remove-item-btn" onclick="akRemoveExtraItem('experience','${o.id}')">Remove</button><div class="exp-dot" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.icon||'💼')}</div><div class="exp-card"><div class="exp-header"><div class="exp-title" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.title||'New Job Title')}</div><div class="exp-period" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.period||'2025 – Present')}</div></div><div class="exp-company" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.company||'🏢 Company Name, Location')}</div><ul class="exp-bullets"><li contenteditable="true">${esc(o.b1||'Add your key responsibility or achievement here')}</li><li contenteditable="true">${esc(o.b2||'Add measurable impact like time saved, cost reduced, dashboards created')}</li><li contenteditable="true">${esc(o.b3||'Add tools used such as Power BI, SQL, Python, Azure')}</li></ul></div></div>`}
