  function makeCert(o){return `<div class="cert-card" data-extra-type="certs" data-extra-id="${o.id}"><button class="admin-remove-item-btn" onclick="akRemoveExtraItem('certs','${o.id}')">Remove</button><div class="cert-card-badge" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.badge||'2025')}</div><div class="cert-wrap"><img class="cert-img ak-extra-img" src="${esc(o.img||IMG_PLACEHOLDER)}" alt="Certificate image"></div><div class="cert-body"><div class="cert-org" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.org||'🏢 Organization')}</div><div class="cert-name" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.name||'New Certificate Name')}</div><div class="cert-meta"><span class="cert-year" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.year||'✦ Month 2025')}</span><span class="cert-level" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.level||'Level')}</span></div></div></div>`}
  function makeAward(o){return `<div class="award-card" data-extra-type="awards" data-extra-id="${o.id}"><button class="admin-remove-item-btn" onclick="akRemoveExtraItem('awards','${o.id}')">Remove</button><div class="award-wrap"><img class="ak-extra-img" src="${esc(o.img||IMG_PLACEHOLDER)}" alt="Award image"></div><div class="award-body"><div class="award-badge" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.badge||'🏆 Recognition')}</div><div class="award-title" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.title||'New Award Title')}</div><div class="award-desc" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.desc||'Add award/appreciation details and impact here.')}</div></div></div>`}
  const makers={projects:makeProject,experience:makeExp,certs:makeCert,awards:makeAward};
  const selectors={projects:'.projects-grid',experience:'.exp-timeline',certs:'.certs-grid',awards:'.awards-grid'};
  function ensureAddBars(){
    Object.entries(selectors).forEach(([type,sel])=>{
      const container=$(sel); if(!container) return;
      if(container.previousElementSibling && container.previousElementSibling.classList && container.previousElementSibling.classList.contains('admin-add-more-bar')) return;
      const bar=document.createElement('div'); bar.className='admin-add-more-bar';
      const label={projects:'Project',experience:'Experience',certs:'Certificate',awards:'Award'}[type];
      bar.innerHTML=`<button type="button" class="admin-add-more-btn" onclick="akAddExtraItem('${type}')">➕ Add More ${label}</button><span style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:700">Visible only in Edit Mode</span>`;
      container.parentNode.insertBefore(bar,container);
    });
  }
  function renderExtras(){
    const data=read();
    Object.keys(selectors).forEach(type=>{
      const c=$(selectors[type]); if(!c) return;
      $$(`[data-extra-type="${type}"]`,c).forEach(e=>e.remove());
      (data[type]||[]).forEach(o=>c.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend',makers[type](o)));
    });
    if(typeof window.assignImageIds==='function') window.assignImageIds();
  }
  function captureExtras(){
    const data={projects:[],experience:[],certs:[],awards:[]};
    $$('[data-extra-type]').forEach(el=>{
      const type=el.dataset.extraType, obj={id:el.dataset.extraId};
      if(type==='projects'){obj.img=$('img',el)?.src||''; obj.type=$('.proj-type',el)?.innerText.trim(); obj.title=$('.proj-title',el)?.innerText.trim(); obj.desc=$('.proj-desc',el)?.innerText.trim();}
      if(type==='experience'){obj.icon=$('.exp-dot',el)?.innerText.trim(); obj.title=$('.exp-title',el)?.innerText.trim(); obj.period=$('.exp-period',el)?.innerText.trim(); obj.company=$('.exp-company',el)?.innerText.trim(); const lis=$$('li',el); obj.b1=lis[0]?.innerText.trim(); obj.b2=lis[1]?.innerText.trim(); obj.b3=lis[2]?.innerText.trim();}
      if(type==='certs'){obj.img=$('img',el)?.src||''; obj.badge=$('.cert-card-badge',el)?.innerText.trim(); obj.org=$('.cert-org',el)?.innerText.trim(); obj.name=$('.cert-name',el)?.innerText.trim(); obj.year=$('.cert-year',el)?.innerText.trim(); obj.level=$('.cert-level',el)?.innerText.trim();}
      if(type==='awards'){obj.img=$('img',el)?.src||''; obj.badge=$('.award-badge',el)?.innerText.trim(); obj.title=$('.award-title',el)?.innerText.trim(); obj.desc=$('.award-desc',el)?.innerText.trim();}
      if(data[type]) data[type].push(obj);
    });
    write(data);
  }
  window.akAddExtraItem=function(type){
    if(!document.body.classList.contains('editing')) return toast('Please login and enable Edit Mode first.');
    const data=read(); data[type]=data[type]||[]; data[type].push({id:id()}); write(data); renderExtras(); ensureAddBars(); toast('✅ New item added. Edit it and click Save Permanently.');
  };
  window.akRemoveExtraItem=function(type,itemId){
    if(!document.body.classList.contains('editing')) return;
    if(!confirm('Remove this item?')) return;
    const data=read(); data[type]=(data[type]||[]).filter(x=>x.id!==itemId); write(data); renderExtras(); toast('🗑️ Item removed. Click Save Permanently.');
  };
  const oldSave=window.saveAdminChanges;
  window.saveAdminChanges=function(){ captureExtras(); if(oldSave) oldSave(); else toast('✅ Saved permanently.'); setTimeout(()=>{renderExtras();ensureAddBars();},200); };
  const oldGo=window.adminGoTab;
  window.adminGoTab=function(page,btn){ if(oldGo) oldGo(page,btn); setTimeout(()=>{ensureAddBars();renderExtras();},80); };
  document.addEventListener('click',function(e){
    if(!document.body.classList.contains('editing')) return;
    const img=e.target.closest('.ak-extra-img'); if(!img) return;
    e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation();
    const action=confirm('Click OK to change image. Click Cancel to remove image.');
    if(action){ const input=document.createElement('input'); input.type='file'; input.accept='image/*'; input.onchange=()=>{const f=input.files[0]; if(!f)return; const r=new FileReader(); r.onload=ev=>{img.src=ev.target.result; captureExtras(); toast('✅ Image updated. Click Save Permanently.');}; r.readAsDataURL(f);}; input.click(); }
    else { img.src=IMG_PLACEHOLDER; captureExtras(); toast('🗑️ Image removed. Click Save Permanently.'); }
  },true);
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{ensureAddBars();renderExtras();});
  setTimeout(()=>{ensureAddBars();renderExtras();},600);
})();
</script>
<style id="ak-final-tabs-details-skill-remove-style">
/* === FINAL FIX: correct edit-tab details + skill add/remove + base remove === */
.ak-section-edit-helper{
  display:none;margin:.8rem 0 1rem;padding:.75rem .85rem;border-radius:14px;
  border:1px solid rgba(232,83,10,.22);background:rgba(232,83,10,.065);
  color:#d9e2ef;font-size:.74rem;line-height:1.6
}
.ak-section-edit-helper b{color:var(--orange)}
body.editing .ak-base-remove-btn{display:block}
.ak-base-remove-btn{
  display:none;position:absolute;right:.65rem;top:.65rem;z-index:30;border:none;border-radius:10px;
  background:#e11d48;color:white;font-weight:800;font-size:.62rem;padding:.35rem .58rem;cursor:pointer;
  box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(225,29,72,.25)
}
body.editing .sk,body.editing .proj,body.editing .exp-item,body.editing .cert-card,body.editing .award-card{
  position:relative;outline:1px dashed rgba(232,83,10,.28);outline-offset:3px
}
body.editing .ak-section-active-hint{box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(232,83,10,.25),0 16px 40px rgba(232,83,10,.12)}
.ak-hidden-by-admin{display:none!important}
.ak-edit-current-tab{
  display:none;position:fixed;left:18px;bottom:86px;z-index:650;background:rgba(7,9,15,.96);
  border:1px solid rgba(232,83,10,.28);border-radius:14px;padding:.65rem .85rem;
  color:#edf0f7;font-size:.72rem;box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.45);max-width:300px
}
body.editing .ak-edit-current-tab{display:block}
.ak-edit-current-tab strong{color:var(--orange)}
.ak-skills-add-note{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:700}
</style>
<div class="ak-edit-current-tab" id="akEditCurrentTab"><strong>Edit Mode:</strong> Home<br/><span>Click text/images to edit. Use Save Permanently.</span></div>
<script id="ak-final-tabs-details-skill-remove-script">
(function(){
  const SKILL_STORE='akash_extra_skills_v1';
  const REMOVED_STORE='akash_removed_base_items_v1';
  const PAGE_LABELS={
    home:['Home','Edit hero name, role, profile photo, contact chips, KPIs and homepage visuals.'],
    about:['About','Edit about text, profile/about image and personal summary details.'],
    skills:['Skills','Edit existing skills, add more skill cards, or remove old skills.'],
    projects:['Projects','Edit project title/type/description/images, add projects, or remove projects.'],
    experience:['Experience','Edit job title, company, duration and bullet points, add/remove experience.'],
    growth:['Growth','Edit KPI numbers, labels and dashboard visual text.'],
    market:['Market','Edit market/news cards and refresh labels.'],
    certs:['Certificates','Edit certificate name, organization, year, level and certificate images.'],
    awards:['Awards','Edit award title/description/images, add awards, or remove awards.']
  };
  const BASE_SELECTORS={
    skills:'.skills-grid .sk',
    projects:'.projects-grid .proj',
    experience:'.exp-timeline .exp-item',
    certs:'.certs-grid .cert-card',
    awards:'.awards-grid .award-card'
  };
  const CONTAINERS={skills:'.skills-grid',projects:'.projects-grid',experience:'.exp-timeline',certs:'.certs-grid',awards:'.awards-grid'};
  const $=(s,r=document)=>r.querySelector(s), $$=(s,r=document)=>Array.from(r.querySelectorAll(s));
  function toast(m){ if(typeof window.showToast==='function') window.showToast(m); else alert(m); }
  function read(key,fallback){try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key)||JSON.stringify(fallback))}catch(e){return fallback}}
  function write(key,val){localStorage.setItem(key,JSON.stringify(val))}
  function esc(s){return String(s||'').replace(/[&<>"]/g,c=>({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;'}[c]));}
  function id(){return 'skill_'+Date.now().toString(36)+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,6)}
  function safeShowPage(page){
    const nav=[...document.querySelectorAll('.nav-tab')].find(b=>(b.textContent||'').toLowerCase().includes(page==='certs'?'cert':page));
    if(typeof window.showPage==='function'){ window.showPage(page,nav||null); }
    else{
      $$('.page').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));
      const pg=$('#page-'+page); if(pg) pg.classList.add('active');
      $$('.nav-tab,.mobile-nav-tab').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
      if(nav) nav.classList.add('active');
    }
    $$('.mobile-nav-tab').forEach(b=>{
      const t=(b.textContent||'').toLowerCase();
      b.classList.toggle('active', t.includes(page==='certs'?'cert':page));
    });
  }
  function ensureHelper(){
    const editBox=$('#adminEditBox'); if(!editBox) return null;
    let helper=$('#akSectionEditHelper');
    if(!helper){
      helper=document.createElement('div');
      helper.id='akSectionEditHelper';
      helper.className='ak-section-edit-helper';
      const tabs=editBox.querySelector('.admin-tabs');
      if(tabs) tabs.insertAdjacentElement('afterend',helper);
      else editBox.insertBefore(helper,editBox.firstChild);
    }
    return helper;
  }
  function updateHelper(page){
    const [label,msg]=PAGE_LABELS[page]||PAGE_LABELS.home;
    const helper=ensureHelper();
    if(helper){ helper.style.display='block'; helper.innerHTML=`<b>${label} edit:</b> ${msg}<br>Click this tab to open that website section. Floating Save button remains visible.`; }
    const badge=$('#akEditCurrentTab');
    if(badge) badge.innerHTML=`<strong>Edit Mode:</strong> ${label}<br><span>${msg}</span>`;
    $$('.admin-tab').forEach(b=>{
      const txt=(b.textContent||'').toLowerCase();
      b.classList.toggle('active', txt.includes(page==='certs'?'cert':page));
    });
  }
  function keepEditMode(){
    document.body.classList.add('editing');
    const fa=$('#editFloatingActions'); if(fa) fa.style.display='flex';
    if(typeof window.enableInlineEditing==='function') window.enableInlineEditing();
    if(typeof window.ensureMediaEditor==='function') window.ensureMediaEditor();
    ensureAddBars();
    ensureBaseRemoveButtons();
    applyRemovedBaseItems();
    renderSkillExtras();
  }
  window.adminGoTab=function(page,btn){
    page=page||'home';
    updateHelper(page);
    safeShowPage(page);
    keepEditMode();
    const modal=$('#adminModal'); if(modal) modal.classList.remove('open');
    setTimeout(()=>{
      const pg=$('#page-'+page);
      if(pg) window.scrollTo({top:Math.max(0,pg.offsetTop-60),behavior:'smooth'});
    },60);
    toast('✅ '+(PAGE_LABELS[page]?.[0]||page)+' opened in edit mode. Edit details and click Save Permanently.');
  };
  const oldOpen=window.openAdminLogin;
  window.openAdminLogin=function(){
    if(document.body.classList.contains('editing')){
      const modal=$('#adminModal'), login=$('#adminLoginBox'), edit=$('#adminEditBox'), title=$('#adminTitle');
      if(modal) modal.classList.add('open');
      if(login) login.style.display='none';
      if(edit) edit.style.display='block';
      if(title) title.textContent='Edit Portfolio Information';
      updateHelper((document.querySelector('.page.active')?.id||'page-home').replace('page-',''));
      ensureAddBars(); ensureBaseRemoveButtons(); renderSkillExtras();
      return;
    }
    if(oldOpen) oldOpen(); else { const modal=$('#adminModal'); if(modal) modal.classList.add('open'); }
    updateHelper('home');
  };
  const oldLogin=window.adminLogin;
  window.adminLogin=function(){
    const before=document.body.classList.contains('editing');
    if(oldLogin) oldLogin();
    if(document.body.classList.contains('editing')||before){
      updateHelper((document.querySelector('.page.active')?.id||'page-home').replace('page-',''));
      keepEditMode();
      const fa=$('#editFloatingActions'); if(fa) fa.style.display='flex';
    }
  };

  function makeSkill(o){
    const tags=(o.tags&&o.tags.length?o.tags:['Power BI','SQL','Dashboard']).map(t=>`<span class="tag" contenteditable="true">${esc(t)}</span>`).join('');
    return `<div class="sk" data-skill-extra-id="${esc(o.id)}"><button class="admin-remove-item-btn" onclick="akRemoveSkillExtra('${esc(o.id)}')">Remove</button><span class="sk-icon" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.icon||'🛠️')}</span><div class="sk-title" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.title||'New Skill')}</div><div class="tags">${tags}</div></div>`;
  }
  function readSkills(){return read(SKILL_STORE,[])}
  function saveSkills(d){write(SKILL_STORE,d)}
  window.akAddSkillExtra=function(){
    if(!document.body.classList.contains('editing')) return toast('Please login first.');
    const data=readSkills(); data.push({id:id(),icon:'🛠️',title:'New Skill',tags:['Skill 1','Skill 2','Skill 3']}); saveSkills(data);
    renderSkillExtras(); keepEditMode(); toast('✅ Skill added. Edit it and click Save Permanently.');
  };
  window.akRemoveSkillExtra=function(itemId){
    if(!document.body.classList.contains('editing')) return;
    if(!confirm('Remove this skill?')) return;
    saveSkills(readSkills().filter(x=>x.id!==itemId));
    renderSkillExtras(); toast('🗑️ Skill removed. Click Save Permanently.');
  };
  function captureSkillExtras(){
    const data=[];
    $$('[data-skill-extra-id]').forEach(el=>{
      data.push({
        id:el.dataset.skillExtraId,
        icon:$('.sk-icon',el)?.innerText.trim()||'🛠️',
        title:$('.sk-title',el)?.innerText.trim()||'New Skill',
        tags:$$('.tag',el).map(t=>t.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean)
      });
    });
    saveSkills(data);
  }
  function renderSkillExtras(){
    const c=$(CONTAINERS.skills); if(!c) return;
    $$('[data-skill-extra-id]',c).forEach(e=>e.remove());
    readSkills().forEach(o=>c.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend',makeSkill(o)));
    if(document.body.classList.contains('editing') && typeof window.enableInlineEditing==='function') window.enableInlineEditing();
  }
  function ensureAddBars(){
    const skillContainer=$(CONTAINERS.skills);
    if(skillContainer && !(skillContainer.previousElementSibling&&skillContainer.previousElementSibling.classList.contains('admin-add-more-bar')&&skillContainer.previousElementSibling.dataset.skillBar==='1')){
      const bar=document.createElement('div');
      bar.className='admin-add-more-bar';
      bar.dataset.skillBar='1';
      bar.innerHTML=`<button type="button" class="admin-add-more-btn" onclick="akAddSkillExtra()">➕ Add More Skill</button><span class="ak-skills-add-note">Visible only in Edit Mode</span>`;
      skillContainer.parentNode.insertBefore(bar,skillContainer);
    }
  }
  function baseKey(type,el){
    const list=$$(BASE_SELECTORS[type]).filter(x=>!x.dataset.extraId && !x.dataset.skillExtraId);
    return type+'_'+list.indexOf(el);
  }
  function ensureBaseRemoveButtons(){
    Object.entries(BASE_SELECTORS).forEach(([type,sel])=>{
      $$(sel).forEach(el=>{
        if(el.dataset.extraId || el.dataset.skillExtraId) return;
        if(!el.dataset.baseRemoveKey) el.dataset.baseRemoveKey=baseKey(type,el);
        if(!$('.ak-base-remove-btn',el)){
          const b=document.createElement('button');
          b.type='button'; b.className='ak-base-remove-btn'; b.textContent='Remove';
          b.onclick=function(ev){
            ev.preventDefault(); ev.stopPropagation();
            if(!document.body.classList.contains('editing')) return;
            if(!confirm('Remove this existing item from website?')) return;
            const removed=read(REMOVED_STORE,{});
            removed[el.dataset.baseRemoveKey]=true;
            write(REMOVED_STORE,removed);
            el.classList.add('ak-hidden-by-admin');
            toast('🗑️ Item removed. Click Save Permanently.');
            if(typeof window.syncHomeSkillsVisual==='function') setTimeout(window.syncHomeSkillsVisual,100);
          };
          el.insertAdjacentElement('afterbegin',b);
        }
      });
    });
  }
  function applyRemovedBaseItems(){
    const removed=read(REMOVED_STORE,{});
    Object.entries(BASE_SELECTORS).forEach(([type,sel])=>{
      $$(sel).forEach(el=>{
        if(el.dataset.extraId || el.dataset.skillExtraId) return;
        if(!el.dataset.baseRemoveKey) el.dataset.baseRemoveKey=baseKey(type,el);
        el.classList.toggle('ak-hidden-by-admin', !!removed[el.dataset.baseRemoveKey]);
      });
    });
  }
  window.akRestoreRemovedItems=function(){
    if(!confirm('Restore all removed existing items?')) return;
    localStorage.removeItem(REMOVED_STORE);
    applyRemovedBaseItems();
    toast('✅ Removed items restored.');
  };

  const oldSave=window.saveAdminChanges;
  window.saveAdminChanges=function(){
    captureSkillExtras();
    if(typeof window.saveInlineEdits==='function') window.saveInlineEdits();
    if(oldSave) oldSave(); else toast('✅ Saved successfully.');
    setTimeout(()=>{
      applyRemovedBaseItems(); renderSkillExtras(); ensureAddBars(); ensureBaseRemoveButtons();
      if(typeof window.syncHomeSkillsVisual==='function') window.syncHomeSkillsVisual();
    },250);
  };
  const oldReset=window.resetAdminChanges;
  window.resetAdminChanges=function(){
    if(confirm('Reset saved profile/text edits and restore removed items?')){
      localStorage.removeItem(SKILL_STORE);
      localStorage.removeItem(REMOVED_STORE);
      if(oldReset) oldReset();
      else location.reload();
    }
  };

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{
    ensureHelper(); ensureAddBars(); renderSkillExtras(); ensureBaseRemoveButtons(); applyRemovedBaseItems();
    updateHelper('home');
    const editBox=$('#adminEditBox');
    if(editBox && !$('#akRestoreRemovedBtn')){
      const actions=editBox.querySelector('.admin-actions:last-child');
      if(actions){
        const btn=document.createElement('button');
        btn.type='button'; btn.id='akRestoreRemovedBtn'; btn.className='admin-btn admin-secondary';
        btn.textContent='Restore Removed Items';
        btn.onclick=window.akRestoreRemovedItems;
        actions.appendChild(btn);
      }
    }
  });
  window.addEventListener('load',()=>setTimeout(()=>{ensureAddBars();renderSkillExtras();ensureBaseRemoveButtons();applyRemovedBaseItems();},500));
})();
</script>
<script>
/* ===== SKILLS PREVIEW MODE FIX =====
   Add/remove skills updates all visible skill areas immediately as PREVIEW.
   Nothing is written permanently until Save Permanently is clicked.
*/
(function(){
  const SKILL_STORE='akash_extra_skills_v1';
  const REMOVED_STORE='akash_removed_base_items_v1';
  let draftSkills=null;
  let draftRemoved=null;
  let skillsDirty=false;
  let skipRevert=false;

  const $=(s,r=document)=>r.querySelector(s);
  const $$=(s,r=document)=>Array.from(r.querySelectorAll(s));
  const read=(k,d)=>{try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(k)||JSON.stringify(d))}catch(e){return d}};
  const write=(k,v)=>localStorage.setItem(k,JSON.stringify(v));
  const uid=()=> 'skill_'+Date.now().toString(36)+'_'+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,7);
  const toast=(m)=> typeof showToast==='function' ? showToast(m) : alert(m);
  const esc=(s)=>String(s??'').replace(/[&<>'"]/g,c=>({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;',"'":'&#39;','"':'&quot;'}[c]));

  function ensureDraft(){
    if(!draftSkills) draftSkills=read(SKILL_STORE,[]).map(x=>({...x,tags:[...(x.tags||[])]}));
    if(!draftRemoved) draftRemoved={...read(REMOVED_STORE,{})};
  }
  function resetDraftFromSaved(){
    draftSkills=read(SKILL_STORE,[]).map(x=>({...x,tags:[...(x.tags||[])]}));
    draftRemoved={...read(REMOVED_STORE,{})};
    skillsDirty=false;
  }
  function skillContainer(){return $('.skills-grid');}
  function makeSkill(o){
    const tags=(o.tags&&o.tags.length?o.tags:['Skill 1','Skill 2','Skill 3']).map(t=>`<span class="tag" contenteditable="true">${esc(t)}</span>`).join('');
    return `<div class="sk" data-skill-extra-id="${esc(o.id)}"><button type="button" class="admin-remove-item-btn" onclick="akRemoveSkillExtra('${esc(o.id)}')">Remove</button><span class="sk-icon" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.icon||'🛠️')}</span><div class="sk-title" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.title||'New Skill')}</div><div class="tags">${tags}</div></div>`;
  }
  function baseSkills(){
    const c=skillContainer(); if(!c) return [];
    return $$('.sk',c).filter(el=>!el.dataset.skillExtraId);
  }
  function baseKey(el){return 'skills_'+baseSkills().indexOf(el);}
  function collectVisibleSkillNames(){
    const names=[];
    const c=skillContainer(); if(!c) return names;
    $$('.sk',c).forEach(el=>{
      if(el.classList.contains('ak-hidden-by-admin')) return;
      const title=$('.sk-title',el)?.innerText?.trim();
      if(title) names.push(title);
    });
    return names;
  }
  function updateHomeSkillVisualFromGrid(){
    const names=collectVisibleSkillNames().slice(0,6);
    const defaults=[95,90,88,85,80,75];
    $$('[data-skill-row]').forEach((row,i)=>{
      if(names[i]){
        const nameEl=$('.home-skill-name',row); if(nameEl) nameEl.textContent=names[i];
        row.style.display='block';
      }else{
        row.style.display='none';
      }
      const percent=$('.home-skill-percent',row);
      const fill=$('.home-skill-fill',row);
      if(percent && !percent.dataset.customPct) percent.textContent=defaults[i]+'%';
      if(fill) fill.style.width=(parseInt(percent?.textContent)||defaults[i])+'%';
    });
    const radarTexts=$$('.radar-svg-home text');
    radarTexts.forEach((t,i)=>{ if(names[i]) t.textContent=names[i].replace(/\s*\/.*$/,'').slice(0,18); });
    if(typeof window.syncHomeSkillsVisual==='function') window.syncHomeSkillsVisual();
  }
  function renderDraftSkills(){
    ensureDraft();
    const c=skillContainer(); if(!c) return;
    $$('[data-skill-extra-id]',c).forEach(e=>e.remove());
    draftSkills.forEach(o=>c.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend',makeSkill(o)));
    baseSkills().forEach(el=>{
      if(!el.dataset.baseRemoveKey) el.dataset.baseRemoveKey=baseKey(el);
      el.classList.toggle('ak-hidden-by-admin',!!draftRemoved[el.dataset.baseRemoveKey]);
    });
    patchBaseSkillRemoveButtons();
    if(document.body.classList.contains('editing') && typeof window.enableInlineEditing==='function') window.enableInlineEditing();
    updateHomeSkillVisualFromGrid();
  }
  function syncDraftFromDOM(){
    ensureDraft();
    const data=[];
    $$('[data-skill-extra-id]').forEach(el=>{
      data.push({
        id:el.dataset.skillExtraId,
        icon:$('.sk-icon',el)?.innerText.trim()||'🛠️',
        title:$('.sk-title',el)?.innerText.trim()||'New Skill',
        tags:$$('.tag',el).map(t=>t.innerText.trim()).filter(Boolean)
      });
    });
    draftSkills=data;
  }
  function patchBaseSkillRemoveButtons(){
    baseSkills().forEach(el=>{
      if(!el.dataset.baseRemoveKey) el.dataset.baseRemoveKey=baseKey(el);
      let btn=$('.ak-base-remove-btn',el);
      if(!btn){
        btn=document.createElement('button');
        btn.type='button'; btn.className='ak-base-remove-btn'; btn.textContent='Remove';
        el.insertAdjacentElement('afterbegin',btn);
      }
      btn.onclick=function(ev){
        ev.preventDefault(); ev.stopPropagation();
        if(!document.body.classList.contains('editing')) return;
        if(!confirm('Remove this skill from preview? It will save permanently only after Save Permanently.')) return;
        ensureDraft();
        draftRemoved[el.dataset.baseRemoveKey]=true;
        skillsDirty=true;
        renderDraftSkills();
        toast('🗑️ Skill removed from preview. Click Save Permanently to keep this change.');
      };
    });
  }

  window.akAddSkillExtra=function(){
    if(!document.body.classList.contains('editing')) return toast('Please login first.');
    ensureDraft();
    draftSkills.push({id:uid(),icon:'🛠️',title:'New Skill',tags:['Skill 1','Skill 2','Skill 3']});
    skillsDirty=true;
    renderDraftSkills();
    toast('✅ Skill added in preview. Click Save Permanently to keep this change.');
  };
  window.akRemoveSkillExtra=function(itemId){
    if(!document.body.classList.contains('editing')) return;
    if(!confirm('Remove this added skill from preview? It will save permanently only after Save Permanently.')) return;
    ensureDraft();
    draftSkills=draftSkills.filter(x=>x.id!==itemId);
    skillsDirty=true;
    renderDraftSkills();
    toast('🗑️ Added skill removed from preview. Click Save Permanently to keep this change.');
  };
  window.akRestoreRemovedItems=function(){
    if(!document.body.classList.contains('editing')) return toast('Please login first.');
    ensureDraft();
    Object.keys(draftRemoved).forEach(k=>{ if(k.startsWith('skills_')) delete draftRemoved[k]; });
    skillsDirty=true;
    renderDraftSkills();
    toast('✅ Removed skills restored in preview. Click Save Permanently to keep this change.');
  };

  const oldSave=window.saveAdminChanges;
  window.saveAdminChanges=function(){
    ensureDraft();
    syncDraftFromDOM();
    write(SKILL_STORE,draftSkills);
    const savedRemoved=read(REMOVED_STORE,{});
    Object.keys(savedRemoved).forEach(k=>{ if(k.startsWith('skills_')) delete savedRemoved[k]; });
    Object.assign(savedRemoved,draftRemoved);
    write(REMOVED_STORE,savedRemoved);
    skipRevert=true;
    if(oldSave) oldSave(); else toast('✅ Saved successfully.');
    setTimeout(()=>{resetDraftFromSaved(); renderDraftSkills(); skipRevert=false; toast('✅ Skills saved permanently and website updated.');},300);
  };

  const oldClose=window.closeAdminModal;
  window.closeAdminModal=function(){
    if(!skipRevert && skillsDirty){
      resetDraftFromSaved();
      renderDraftSkills();
    }
    if(oldClose) oldClose();
  };
  const oldLogin=window.adminLogin;
  window.adminLogin=function(){
    if(oldLogin) oldLogin();
    if(document.body.classList.contains('editing')){ resetDraftFromSaved(); renderDraftSkills(); }
  };

  document.addEventListener('input',e=>{
    if(e.target.closest('.skills-grid')){
      if(document.body.classList.contains('editing')){ ensureDraft(); syncDraftFromDOM(); skillsDirty=true; updateHomeSkillVisualFromGrid(); }
    }
  });
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>setTimeout(()=>{resetDraftFromSaved(); renderDraftSkills();},700));
  window.addEventListener('load',()=>setTimeout(()=>{resetDraftFromSaved(); renderDraftSkills();},1000));
})();
</script>
<script id="ak-preview-project-cert-award-home-sync-final">
/* === PROJECT / CERTIFICATE / AWARD PREVIEW MODE + HOME RECENT SYNC ===
   Add/remove for Projects, Certificates and Awards updates the page instantly as PREVIEW.
   It is saved permanently only when Save Permanently is clicked.
   Home page recent project / latest achievement / certification KPIs update from the current preview.
*/
(function(){
  const EXTRA_STORE='akash_extra_edit_items_v3';
  const REMOVED_STORE='akash_removed_base_items_v1';
  const TYPES=['projects','certs','awards'];
  const CONTAINERS={projects:'.projects-grid',certs:'.certs-grid',awards:'.awards-grid'};
  const BASE_SELECTORS={projects:'.projects-grid .proj',certs:'.certs-grid .cert-card',awards:'.awards-grid .award-card'};
  const IMG_PLACEHOLDER='data:image/svg+xml;charset=UTF-8,'+encodeURIComponent(`<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="900" height="520" viewBox="0 0 900 520"><rect width="900" height="520" rx="28" fill="#101422"/><rect x="30" y="30" width="840" height="460" rx="24" fill="#0c0f1a" stroke="#e8530a" stroke-opacity=".35"/><text x="450" y="245" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e8530a" font-family="Arial" font-size="30" font-weight="700">Image Preview</text><text x="450" y="290" text-anchor="middle" fill="#8892a4" font-family="Arial" font-size="18">Edit Mode → click image to change/remove</text></svg>`);
  let draftExtras=null;
  let draftRemoved=null;
  let dirty=false;
  let saving=false;
  const $=(s,r=document)=>r.querySelector(s), $$=(s,r=document)=>Array.from(r.querySelectorAll(s));
  const toast=m=>typeof showToast==='function'?showToast(m):alert(m);
  const read=(k,d)=>{try{return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(k)||JSON.stringify(d))}catch(e){return d}};
  const write=(k,v)=>localStorage.setItem(k,JSON.stringify(v));
  const uid=(p)=>p+'_'+Date.now().toString(36)+'_'+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,7);
  const esc=s=>String(s??'').replace(/[&<>'"]/g,c=>({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;',"'":'&#39;','"':'&quot;'}[c]));
  function normalizedExtras(){const d=read(EXTRA_STORE,{projects:[],experience:[],certs:[],awards:[]}); return {projects:[...(d.projects||[])], experience:[...(d.experience||[])], certs:[...(d.certs||[])], awards:[...(d.awards||[])]};}
  function ensureDraft(){if(!draftExtras) draftExtras=normalizedExtras(); if(!draftRemoved) draftRemoved={...read(REMOVED_STORE,{})};}
  function resetDraft(){draftExtras=normalizedExtras(); draftRemoved={...read(REMOVED_STORE,{})}; dirty=false;}
  function makeProject(o){return `<div class="proj" data-extra-type="projects" data-extra-id="${esc(o.id)}"><button type="button" class="admin-remove-item-btn" onclick="akRemoveExtraItem('projects','${esc(o.id)}')">Remove</button><div class="cert-wrap" style="height:135px;margin-bottom:.8rem;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04)"><img class="ak-extra-img" src="${esc(o.img||IMG_PLACEHOLDER)}" alt="Project image"></div><div class="proj-type" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.type||'Power BI · SQL · Analytics')}</div><div class="proj-title" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.title||'New Project Title')}</div><p class="proj-desc" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.desc||'Add project details, impact, tools used and business value here.')}</p></div>`}
  function makeCert(o){return `<div class="cert-card" data-extra-type="certs" data-extra-id="${esc(o.id)}"><button type="button" class="admin-remove-item-btn" onclick="akRemoveExtraItem('certs','${esc(o.id)}')">Remove</button><div class="cert-card-badge" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.badge||'2025')}</div><div class="cert-wrap"><img class="cert-img ak-extra-img" src="${esc(o.img||IMG_PLACEHOLDER)}" alt="Certificate image"></div><div class="cert-body"><div class="cert-org" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.org||'🏢 Organization')}</div><div class="cert-name" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.name||'New Certificate Name')}</div><div class="cert-meta"><span class="cert-year" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.year||'✦ Month 2025')}</span><span class="cert-level" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.level||'Level')}</span></div></div></div>`}
  function makeAward(o){return `<div class="award-card" data-extra-type="awards" data-extra-id="${esc(o.id)}"><button type="button" class="admin-remove-item-btn" onclick="akRemoveExtraItem('awards','${esc(o.id)}')">Remove</button><div class="award-wrap"><img class="ak-extra-img" src="${esc(o.img||IMG_PLACEHOLDER)}" alt="Award image"></div><div class="award-body"><div class="award-badge" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.badge||'🏆 Recognition')}</div><div class="award-title" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.title||'New Award Title')}</div><div class="award-desc" contenteditable="true">${esc(o.desc||'Add award/appreciation details and impact here.')}</div></div></div>`}
  const makers={projects:makeProject,certs:makeCert,awards:makeAward};
  function getBaseList(type){return $$(BASE_SELECTORS[type]).filter(x=>!x.dataset.extraId && !x.dataset.skillExtraId && !x.dataset.extraType);}
  function baseKey(type,el){return type+'_'+getBaseList(type).indexOf(el);}
  function ensureBaseKeys(){TYPES.forEach(type=>getBaseList(type).forEach(el=>{if(!el.dataset.baseRemoveKey) el.dataset.baseRemoveKey=baseKey(type,el);}));}
  function ensureAddBars(){TYPES.forEach(type=>{const c=$(CONTAINERS[type]); if(!c) return; let prev=c.previousElementSibling; const label={projects:'Project',certs:'Certificate',awards:'Award'}[type]; if(prev&&prev.classList&&prev.classList.contains('admin-add-more-bar')&&prev.dataset.previewBar===type) return; const bar=document.createElement('div'); bar.className='admin-add-more-bar'; bar.dataset.previewBar=type; bar.innerHTML=`<button type="button" class="admin-add-more-btn" onclick="akAddExtraItem('${type}')">➕ Add More ${label}</button><span style="font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:700">Preview now · permanent after Save</span>`; c.parentNode.insertBefore(bar,c);});}
  function ensureBaseRemoveButtons(){TYPES.forEach(type=>getBaseList(type).forEach(el=>{if(!el.dataset.baseRemoveKey) el.dataset.baseRemoveKey=baseKey(type,el); let btn=$('.ak-base-remove-btn',el); if(!btn){btn=document.createElement('button'); btn.type='button'; btn.className='ak-base-remove-btn'; btn.textContent='Remove'; el.insertAdjacentElement('afterbegin',btn);} btn.onclick=function(ev){ev.preventDefault(); ev.stopPropagation(); if(!document.body.classList.contains('editing'))return; if(!confirm('Remove this existing item from preview? It saves permanently only after Save Permanently.'))return; ensureDraft(); draftRemoved[el.dataset.baseRemoveKey]=true; dirty=true; renderDraft(); toast('🗑️ Removed from preview. Click Save Permanently to keep this change.');};}));}
  function applyRemoved(){ensureDraft(); TYPES.forEach(type=>getBaseList(type).forEach(el=>{if(!el.dataset.baseRemoveKey) el.dataset.baseRemoveKey=baseKey(type,el); el.classList.toggle('ak-hidden-by-admin',!!draftRemoved[el.dataset.baseRemoveKey]);}));}
  function renderDraft(){ensureDraft(); TYPES.forEach(type=>{const c=$(CONTAINERS[type]); if(!c)return; $$(`[data-extra-type="${type}"]`,c).forEach(e=>e.remove()); (draftExtras[type]||[]).forEach(o=>c.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend',makers[type](o)));}); ensureBaseKeys(); applyRemoved(); ensureBaseRemoveButtons(); ensureAddBars(); if(document.body.classList.contains('editing')&&typeof enableInlineEditing==='function') enableInlineEditing(); updateHomeRecentDetails();}
  function captureDraftFromDOM(){ensureDraft(); TYPES.forEach(type=>{draftExtras[type]=[]; $$(`[data-extra-type="${type}"]`).forEach(el=>{const obj={id:el.dataset.extraId}; if(type==='projects'){obj.img=$('img',el)?.src||''; obj.type=$('.proj-type',el)?.innerText.trim(); obj.title=$('.proj-title',el)?.innerText.trim(); obj.desc=$('.proj-desc',el)?.innerText.trim();} if(type==='certs'){obj.img=$('img',el)?.src||''; obj.badge=$('.cert-card-badge',el)?.innerText.trim(); obj.org=$('.cert-org',el)?.innerText.trim(); obj.name=$('.cert-name',el)?.innerText.trim(); obj.year=$('.cert-year',el)?.innerText.trim(); obj.level=$('.cert-level',el)?.innerText.trim();} if(type==='awards'){obj.img=$('img',el)?.src||''; obj.badge=$('.award-badge',el)?.innerText.trim(); obj.title=$('.award-title',el)?.innerText.trim(); obj.desc=$('.award-desc',el)?.innerText.trim();} draftExtras[type].push(obj);});});}
  function visibleItems(type){const c=$(CONTAINERS[type]); if(!c)return []; let sel=type==='projects'?'.proj':type==='certs'?'.cert-card':'.award-card'; return $$(sel,c).filter(el=>!el.classList.contains('ak-hidden-by-admin'));}
  function updateHomeRecentDetails(){
    // Recent project on home page
    const p=visibleItems('projects')[0];
    if(p){const t=$('.proj-title',p)?.innerText.trim(); const d=$('.proj-desc',p)?.innerText.trim(); const type=$('.proj-type',p)?.innerText.trim(); const homeTitle=$('.project-mini .mini-title'); const homeDesc=$('.project-mini .mini-desc'); const homePill=$('.project-mini .section-pill'); if(homeTitle&&t)homeTitle.textContent=t; if(homeDesc&&d)homeDesc.textContent=d; if(homePill&&type)homePill.textContent=type.split('·')[0].trim()||'Featured Project';}
    // Latest achievement on home page
    const a=visibleItems('awards')[0];
    if(a){const title=$('.award-title',a)?.innerText.trim(); const desc=$('.award-desc',a)?.innerText.trim(); const badge=$('.award-badge',a)?.innerText.trim(); const cards=$$('.feature-card-v2'); const ach=cards.find(x=>(x.textContent||'').toLowerCase().includes('latest achievement'))||cards[cards.length-1]; if(ach){const mt=$('.mini-title',ach); const md=$('.mini-desc',ach); const sp=$('.section-pill',ach); if(mt&&title)mt.textContent=title; if(md&&desc)md.textContent=desc; if(sp&&badge)sp.textContent=badge.replace(/^[^A-Za-z0-9]+/,'')||'Latest Achievement';}}
    // Certificate dashboard stats + growth cert KPI
    const certCount=visibleItems('certs').length; const certStat=$('.cert-dashboard-top .cert-stat-val,.cert-hero-stats .cert-stat-val'); if(certStat)certStat.textContent=certCount; $$('[data-growth-kpi="certs"], .growth-kpi-number').forEach(el=>{const label=el.closest('.growth-kpi-card,.gkpi')?.textContent?.toLowerCase()||''; if(label.includes('cert')) el.textContent=certCount;});
    // AI bot knowledge base, if present
    if(window.KB){const projects=visibleItems('projects').map((el,i)=>`${i+1}. ${$('.proj-title',el)?.innerText.trim()||'Project'} — ${$('.proj-desc',el)?.innerText.trim()||''}`).join('\n'); const certs=visibleItems('certs').map((el,i)=>`• ${$('.cert-name',el)?.innerText.trim()||'Certificate'} (${$('.cert-org',el)?.innerText.trim()||''})`).join('\n'); const awards=visibleItems('awards').map(el=>`• ${$('.award-title',el)?.innerText.trim()||'Award'} — ${$('.award-desc',el)?.innerText.trim()||''}`).join('\n'); if(projects)KB.projects='Key projects:\n'+projects; if(certs)KB.certs=certCount+' certifications:\n'+certs; if(awards)KB.awards='Awards:\n'+awards;}
  }
  window.akAddExtraItem=function(type){if(!document.body.classList.contains('editing'))return toast('Please login and enable Edit Mode first.'); if(!TYPES.includes(type)){return;} ensureDraft(); draftExtras[type]=draftExtras[type]||[]; draftExtras[type].push({id:uid(type)}); dirty=true; renderDraft(); toast('✅ Added in preview. Edit it and click Save Permanently to keep this change.');};
  window.akRemoveExtraItem=function(type,itemId){if(!document.body.classList.contains('editing'))return; if(!TYPES.includes(type))return; if(!confirm('Remove this added item from preview? It saves permanently only after Save Permanently.'))return; ensureDraft(); draftExtras[type]=(draftExtras[type]||[]).filter(x=>x.id!==itemId); dirty=true; renderDraft(); toast('🗑️ Removed from preview. Click Save Permanently to keep this change.');};
  document.addEventListener('input',e=>{if(e.target.closest('.projects-grid,.certs-grid,.awards-grid')){if(document.body.classList.contains('editing')){ensureDraft(); captureDraftFromDOM(); dirty=true; updateHomeRecentDetails();}}});
  document.addEventListener('click',function(e){if(!document.body.classList.contains('editing'))return; const img=e.target.closest('.ak-extra-img'); if(!img || !img.closest('[data-extra-type]')) return; e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); const change=confirm('Click OK to change image. Click Cancel to remove image.'); if(change){const input=document.createElement('input'); input.type='file'; input.accept='image/*'; input.onchange=()=>{const f=input.files[0]; if(!f)return; const r=new FileReader(); r.onload=ev=>{img.src=ev.target.result; captureDraftFromDOM(); dirty=true; updateHomeRecentDetails(); toast('✅ Image updated in preview. Click Save Permanently.');}; r.readAsDataURL(f);}; input.click();}else{img.src=IMG_PLACEHOLDER; captureDraftFromDOM(); dirty=true; updateHomeRecentDetails(); toast('🗑️ Image removed in preview. Click Save Permanently.');}},true);
  const oldSave=window.saveAdminChanges;
  window.saveAdminChanges=function(){ensureDraft(); captureDraftFromDOM(); const saved=normalizedExtras(); TYPES.forEach(t=>saved[t]=draftExtras[t]||[]); write(EXTRA_STORE,saved); const savedRemoved=read(REMOVED_STORE,{}); TYPES.forEach(t=>Object.keys(savedRemoved).forEach(k=>{if(k.startsWith(t+'_'))delete savedRemoved[k];})); Object.assign(savedRemoved,draftRemoved); write(REMOVED_STORE,savedRemoved); saving=true; if(oldSave)oldSave(); else toast('✅ Saved successfully.'); setTimeout(()=>{resetDraft(); renderDraft(); saving=false; toast('✅ Projects, certificates, awards and homepage recent details saved.');},350);};
  const oldClose=window.closeAdminModal;
  window.closeAdminModal=function(){if(!saving && dirty){resetDraft(); renderDraft();} if(oldClose)oldClose();};
  const oldLogin=window.adminLogin;
  window.adminLogin=function(){if(oldLogin)oldLogin(); if(document.body.classList.contains('editing')){resetDraft(); renderDraft();}};
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>setTimeout(()=>{resetDraft(); renderDraft(); updateHomeRecentDetails();},900));
  window.addEventListener('load',()=>setTimeout(()=>{resetDraft(); renderDraft(); updateHomeRecentDetails();},1200));
})();
</script>
<style>
/* === Dynamic latest home cards + thought refresh polish === */
.project-mini .mini-kpi-row,.home-award-kpi-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.35rem;margin:.55rem 0 .2rem}
.project-mini .mini-kpi,.home-award-kpi{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.25rem;padding:.18rem .55rem;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(232,83,10,.10);border:1px solid rgba(232,83,10,.25);color:var(--orange);font-size:.58rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.01em}
.thought-refresh-home{margin-top:.6rem;background:rgba(232,83,10,.10);border:1px solid rgba(232,83,10,.28);color:var(--orange);border-radius:9px;padding:.38rem .75rem;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:.65rem;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.3rem}
.thought-refresh-home:hover{background:rgba(232,83,10,.18);transform:translateY(-1px)}
.feature-card-v2.project-mini .mini-desc,.feature-card-v2 .mini-desc{display:-webkit-box;-webkit-line-clamp:3;-webkit-box-orient:vertical;overflow:hidden}
</style>
<script>
/* === FINAL FIX: Home must show LATEST Project/Award dynamically + auto thought refresh === */
(function(){
  const q=(s,r=document)=>r.querySelector(s);
  const qa=(s,r=document)=>Array.from(r.querySelectorAll(s));
  const clean=s=>String(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();
  const trim=(s,n=115)=>clean(s).length>n?clean(s).slice(0,n-1)+'…':clean(s);
  const isVisible=el=>el && !el.classList.contains('ak-hidden-by-admin') && el.offsetParent!==null;
  function visibleProjects(){return qa('.projects-grid .proj').filter(isVisible)}
  function visibleAwards(){return qa('.awards-grid .award-card').filter(isVisible)}
  function latest(arr){return arr.length?arr[arr.length-1]:null}
  function projectTools(type){return clean(type).split(/·|,|\||-/).map(x=>clean(x)).filter(Boolean).slice(0,3)}
  function ensureProjectKpi(card){
    let row=q('.mini-kpi-row',card); if(!row){row=document.createElement('div');row.className='mini-kpi-row'; const desc=q('.mini-desc',card); if(desc)desc.insertAdjacentElement('afterend',row); else card.appendChild(row);} return row;
  }
  function ensureAwardKpi(card){
    let row=q('.home-award-kpi-row',card); if(!row){row=document.createElement('div');row.className='home-award-kpi-row'; const desc=q('.mini-desc',card); if(desc)desc.insertAdjacentElement('afterend',row); else card.appendChild(row);} return row;
  }
  window.updateHomeLatestProjectAward=function(){
    const p=latest(visibleProjects());
    const projectCard=q('.project-mini');
    if(projectCard && p){
      const title=clean(q('.proj-title',p)?.innerText)||'Latest Project';
      const desc=clean(q('.proj-desc',p)?.innerText)||'Latest project details will appear here.';
      const type=clean(q('.proj-type',p)?.innerText)||'Project';
      const img=q('img',p)?.src;
      const pill=q('.section-pill',projectCard); if(pill) pill.textContent='Latest Project';
      const t=q('.mini-title',projectCard); if(t) t.textContent=title;
      const d=q('.mini-desc',projectCard); if(d) d.textContent=trim(desc,150);
      const thumb=q('.chart-thumb',projectCard); if(thumb && img && !img.startsWith('data:image/svg+xml')){thumb.style.backgroundImage=`url("${img}")`;thumb.style.backgroundSize='cover';thumb.style.backgroundPosition='center';thumb.textContent='';}
      const row=ensureProjectKpi(projectCard);
      const tools=projectTools(type);
      const words=desc.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length;
      row.innerHTML=`<span class="mini-kpi">🆕 Latest</span>${tools.map(x=>`<span class="mini-kpi">${x}</span>`).join('')}<span class="mini-kpi">${Math.max(1,Math.round(words/18))} key pts</span>`;
    }
    const a=latest(visibleAwards());
    const awardCard=qa('.feature-card-v2').find(x=>(x.textContent||'').toLowerCase().includes('latest achievement') || (x.textContent||'').toLowerCase().includes('recognition'));
    if(awardCard && a){
      const title=clean(q('.award-title',a)?.innerText)||'Latest Recognition';
      const desc=clean(q('.award-desc',a)?.innerText)||'Latest recognition details will appear here.';
      const badge=clean(q('.award-badge',a)?.innerText)||'Recognition';
      const sp=q('.section-pill',awardCard); if(sp) sp.textContent='Latest Recognition';
      const mt=q('.mini-title',awardCard); if(mt) mt.textContent=title;
      const md=q('.mini-desc',awardCard); if(md) md.textContent=trim(desc,130);
      const row=ensureAwardKpi(awardCard);
      row.innerHTML=`<span class="home-award-kpi">🏆 Latest</span><span class="home-award-kpi">${badge.replace(/^[^A-Za-z0-9]+/,'')||'Recognition'}</span>`;
    }
  };
  const THOUGHTS2=[
    ['Information is the oil of the 21st century, and analytics is the combustion engine.','Peter Sondergaard'],
    ['Without data, you are just another person with an opinion.','W. Edwards Deming'],
    ['Data beats emotions when decisions need direction.','Analytics Mindset'],
    ['Great dashboards do not just show numbers; they guide action.','BI Principle'],
    ['Automate the repeatable, analyze the valuable, and improve the measurable.','Data Leadership'],
    ['The goal is not more charts. The goal is better decisions.','BI Thought'],
    ['Good data turns questions into strategy and strategy into action.','Data Intelligence']
  ];
  let thoughtTimer=null, lastThought=-1;
  window.refreshHomeThought=function(){
    const card=qa('.feature-card-v2').find(x=>(x.textContent||'').toLowerCase().includes('thought of the day'));
    if(!card) return;
    let i=Math.floor(Math.random()*THOUGHTS2.length); if(THOUGHTS2.length>1 && i===lastThought) i=(i+1)%THOUGHTS2.length; lastThought=i;
    const [quote,author]=THOUGHTS2[i];
    const qel=q('.quote-v2',card); if(qel) qel.textContent='“'+quote+'”';
    const ael=q('.quote-author-v2',card); if(ael) ael.textContent='— '+author;
  };
  function ensureThoughtRefresh(){
    const card=qa('.feature-card-v2').find(x=>(x.textContent||'').toLowerCase().includes('thought of the day'));
    if(!card) return;
    if(!q('.thought-refresh-home',card)){
      const btn=document.createElement('button'); btn.className='thought-refresh-home'; btn.type='button'; btn.innerHTML='🔄 Refresh Thought'; btn.onclick=function(e){e.preventDefault(); window.refreshHomeThought();};
      card.appendChild(btn);
    }
    if(thoughtTimer) clearInterval(thoughtTimer);
    thoughtTimer=setInterval(window.refreshHomeThought,18000);
  }
  function runAll(){window.updateHomeLatestProjectAward(); ensureThoughtRefresh();}
  const oldHome=window.updateHomeRecentDetails;
  window.updateHomeRecentDetails=function(){ if(typeof oldHome==='function') oldHome(); window.updateHomeLatestProjectAward(); };
  document.addEventListener('input',e=>{if(e.target.closest('.projects-grid,.awards-grid')) setTimeout(window.updateHomeLatestProjectAward,80);});
  document.addEventListener('click',e=>{if(e.target.closest('.admin-remove-item-btn,.ak-base-remove-btn,.admin-add-more-btn')) setTimeout(window.updateHomeLatestProjectAward,220);});
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{setTimeout(runAll,800);setTimeout(window.refreshHomeThought,1000);});
  window.addEventListener('load',()=>{setTimeout(runAll,1200);setTimeout(window.updateHomeLatestProjectAward,1800);});
})();
</script>
<style id="ak-final-thought-skill-fix-style">
/* Final fix: third home KPI always Thought of the Day, skills home visuals follow Skills tab */
.feature-grid-v2 .feature-card-v2.home-thought-card{text-align:left!important;position:relative;}
.feature-grid-v2 .feature-card-v2.home-thought-card .section-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.35rem;}
.feature-grid-v2 .feature-card-v2.home-thought-card .quote-v2{font-style:italic;line-height:1.65;margin:.65rem 0 .35rem;color:#e8ecf5;}
.feature-grid-v2 .feature-card-v2.home-thought-card .quote-author-v2{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:800;}
.feature-grid-v2 .feature-card-v2.home-thought-card .thought-refresh-home{margin-top:.75rem;}
.tech-list-v2 .tech-pill-v2.ak-dynamic-skill-pill small{color:var(--muted);}
</style>
<script id="ak-final-thought-skill-fix">
(function(){
  const $=(s,r=document)=>r.querySelector(s);
  const $$=(s,r=document)=>Array.from(r.querySelectorAll(s));
  const clean=s=>String(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();
  const visible=el=>el && !el.classList.contains('ak-hidden-by-admin') && getComputedStyle(el).display!=='none';
  const iconPool=['📊','🗄️','🐍','☁️','📈','⚙️','🧠','🔄','📌','🚀'];
  const defaultPct=[95,90,88,85,80,75,72,70,68,65];
  const thoughts=[
    ['Information is the oil of the 21st century, and analytics is the combustion engine.','Peter Sondergaard'],
    ['Without data, you are just another person with an opinion.','W. Edwards Deming'],
    ['Great dashboards do not just show numbers; they guide action.','BI Principle'],
    ['Data beats emotions when decisions need direction.','Analytics Mindset'],
    ['Automate the repeatable, analyze the valuable, and improve the measurable.','Data Leadership'],
    ['The goal is not more charts. The goal is better decisions.','BI Thought'],
    ['Good data turns questions into strategy and strategy into action.','Data Intelligence']
  ];
  let lastThought=-1, timer=null;

  function getSkillData(){
    const items=[];
    $$('.skills-grid .sk').forEach((el,i)=>{
      if(!visible(el)) return;
      const title=clean($('.sk-title',el)?.innerText)||clean(el.innerText).split('\n')[0]||'Skill';
      let pct=defaultPct[items.length]||70;
      const txt=clean(el.innerText);
      const found=txt.match(/(\d{2,3})\s*%/);
      if(found) pct=Math.max(1,Math.min(100,parseInt(found[1],10)));
      const icon=clean($('.sk-icon',el)?.innerText)||iconPool[items.length%iconPool.length];
      const tags=$$('.tag',el).map(t=>clean(t.innerText)).filter(Boolean);
      items.push({title,pct,icon,tags});
    });
    if(!items.length){
      ['Power BI / DAX','SQL / MySQL','Python / ETL','Tableau','Azure / Cloud','Data Modeling'].forEach((title,i)=>items.push({title,pct:defaultPct[i],icon:iconPool[i],tags:[]}));
    }
    return items;
  }

  function syncHomeSkillAreas(){
    const skills=getSkillData();
    const top=skills.slice(0,6);
    const techList=$('.tech-list-v2');
    if(techList){
      techList.innerHTML=top.map((s,i)=>`<div class="tech-pill-v2 ak-dynamic-skill-pill"><span>${s.icon||iconPool[i]}</span><div><b>${s.title}</b><small>${s.pct>=90?'Expert':s.pct>=80?'Advanced':'Intermediate'} · ${s.pct}%</small></div></div>`).join('');
    }
    const rows=$$('[data-skill-row]');
    rows.forEach((row,i)=>{
      const s=top[i];
      if(!s){row.style.display='none';return;}
      row.style.display='grid';
      const name=$('.home-skill-name',row); if(name) name.textContent=s.title;
      const pct=$('.home-skill-percent',row); if(pct) pct.textContent=s.pct+'%';
      const fill=$('.home-skill-fill',row); if(fill){fill.style.setProperty('--w',s.pct+'%');fill.style.width=s.pct+'%';}
    });
    $$('.radar-svg-home text').forEach((t,i)=>{ if(top[i]) t.textContent=top[i].title.replace(/\s*\/.*$/,'').slice(0,18); });
  }

  function makeThoughtCard(){
    const cards=$$('.feature-grid-v2 .feature-card-v2');
    const card=cards[2];
    if(!card) return null;
    card.classList.add('home-thought-card');
    card.style.textAlign='left';
    card.innerHTML=`<div class="section-pill">Thought of the Day</div><p class="quote-v2"></p><p class="quote-author-v2"></p><button class="thought-refresh-home" type="button">🔄 Refresh Thought</button>`;
    $('.thought-refresh-home',card).onclick=function(e){e.preventDefault();refreshThought();};
    return card;
  }
  function refreshThought(){
    const card=$$('.feature-grid-v2 .feature-card-v2')[2]||makeThoughtCard();
    if(!card) return;
    if(!card.classList.contains('home-thought-card') || !$('.quote-v2',card)) makeThoughtCard();
    let i=Math.floor(Math.random()*thoughts.length); if(thoughts.length>1 && i===lastThought) i=(i+1)%thoughts.length; lastThought=i;
    const [q,a]=thoughts[i];
    const qel=$('.quote-v2',card); if(qel) qel.textContent='“'+q+'”';
    const ael=$('.quote-author-v2',card); if(ael) ael.textContent='— '+a;
  }

  function run(){
    makeThoughtCard();
    refreshThought();
    syncHomeSkillAreas();
    if(timer) clearInterval(timer);
    timer=setInterval(refreshThought,18000);
  }
  window.refreshHomeThought=refreshThought;
  window.akSyncHomeSkillAreas=syncHomeSkillAreas;

  document.addEventListener('input',e=>{ if(e.target.closest('.skills-grid')) setTimeout(syncHomeSkillAreas,60); });
  document.addEventListener('click',e=>{
    if(e.target.closest('.admin-remove-item-btn,.ak-base-remove-btn,.admin-add-more-btn,[onclick*="akAddSkill"],[onclick*="akRemoveSkill"],[onclick*="akRestoreRemovedItems"]')) setTimeout(syncHomeSkillAreas,180);
  });
  const oldSave=window.saveAdminChanges;
  window.saveAdminChanges=function(){
    if(oldSave) oldSave.apply(this,arguments);
    setTimeout(syncHomeSkillAreas,300);
  };
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>setTimeout(run,800));
  window.addEventListener('load',()=>setTimeout(run,1200));
})();
</script>
<style id="ak-project-recognition-skill-fill-final-style">
/* Final UI polish requested: fixed KPI headings and percentage-based skill fills */
.home-skill-fill{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--skillColor,#e8530a),var(--skillColor2,#f26b2a))!important;box-shadow:0 0 15px var(--skillGlow,rgba(232,83,10,.35))!important;}
.radar-poly-home{fill:var(--radarFill,rgba(232,83,10,.18))!important;stroke:var(--radarStroke,#e8530a)!important;}
.radar-dot-home{fill:#fff;stroke:var(--radarStroke,#e8530a);stroke-width:4;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 6px var(--skillGlow,rgba(232,83,10,.45)));}
.feature-grid-v2 .feature-card-v2 .section-pill{font-weight:900;}
</style>
<script id="ak-project-recognition-skill-fill-final">
(function(){
  const $=(s,r=document)=>r.querySelector(s);
  const $$=(s,r=document)=>Array.from(r.querySelectorAll(s));
  const clean=s=>String(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();
  const visible=el=>el && !el.classList.contains('ak-hidden-by-admin') && getComputedStyle(el).display!=='none';
  const defaultPct=[95,90,88,85,80,75,72,70,68,65];
  const iconPool=['📊','🗄️','🐍','☁️','📈','⚙️','🧠','🔄','📌','🚀'];
  function pctColor(p){
    p=Number(p)||0;
    if(p>=90) return ['#16c76a','#45e08f','rgba(22,199,106,.38)'];
    if(p>=80) return ['#e8530a','#ff8c52','rgba(232,83,10,.38)'];
    if(p>=70) return ['#f5a623','#ffd166','rgba(245,166,35,.35)'];
    return ['#ff4d5e','#ff8a95','rgba(255,77,94,.34)'];
  }
  function getSkillData(){
    const items=[];
    $$('.skills-grid .sk').forEach((el,i)=>{
      if(!visible(el)) return;
      const title=clean($('.sk-title',el)?.innerText)||clean(el.innerText).split('\n')[0]||'Skill';
      let pct=defaultPct[items.length]||70;
      const found=clean(el.innerText).match(/(\d{2,3})\s*%/);
      if(found) pct=Math.max(1,Math.min(100,parseInt(found[1],10)));
      const icon=clean($('.sk-icon',el)?.innerText)||iconPool[items.length%iconPool.length];
      items.push({title,pct,icon});
    });
    if(!items.length){['Power BI / DAX','SQL / MySQL','Python / ETL','Tableau','Azure / Cloud','Data Modeling'].forEach((title,i)=>items.push({title,pct:defaultPct[i],icon:iconPool[i]}));}
    return items;
  }
  function syncSkillProficiencyWithPercentFill(){
    const top=getSkillData().slice(0,6);
    const rows=$$('[data-skill-row]');
    rows.forEach((row,i)=>{
      const s=top[i];
      if(!s){row.style.display='none';return;}
      row.style.display='grid';
      const [c1,c2,glow]=pctColor(s.pct);
      const name=$('.home-skill-name',row); if(name) name.textContent=s.title;
      const pct=$('.home-skill-percent',row); if(pct){pct.textContent=s.pct+'%';pct.style.color=c1;}
      const fill=$('.home-skill-fill',row); if(fill){fill.style.width=s.pct+'%';fill.style.setProperty('--w',s.pct+'%');fill.style.setProperty('--skillColor',c1);fill.style.setProperty('--skillColor2',c2);fill.style.setProperty('--skillGlow',glow);}
    });
    const techList=$('.tech-list-v2');
    if(techList){
      techList.innerHTML=top.map((s,i)=>`<div class="tech-pill-v2 ak-dynamic-skill-pill"><span>${s.icon||iconPool[i]}</span><div><b>${s.title}</b><small>${s.pct>=90?'Expert':s.pct>=80?'Advanced':'Intermediate'} · ${s.pct}%</small></div></div>`).join('');
    }
    updateRadar(top);
  }
  function updateRadar(skills){
    const poly=$('#homeRadarPoly'); if(!poly||!skills.length) return;
    const cx=160, cy=125;
    const max=[[160,42],[236,86],[236,164],[160,208],[84,164],[84,86]];
    const vals=max.map((pt,i)=>Math.max(1,Math.min(100,(skills[i]||skills[skills.length-1]||{pct:70}).pct)));
    const pts=max.map((pt,i)=>{
      const r=vals[i]/100;
      return [Math.round(cx+(pt[0]-cx)*r),Math.round(cy+(pt[1]-cy)*r)].join(',');
    }).join(' ');
    poly.setAttribute('points',pts);
    const avg=Math.round(vals.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/vals.length);
    const [c1,,glow]=pctColor(avg);
    poly.style.setProperty('--radarStroke',c1);
    poly.style.setProperty('--skillGlow',glow);
    poly.style.setProperty('--radarFill',`color-mix(in srgb, ${c1} ${Math.max(18,Math.min(42,avg/2))}%, transparent)`);
    // Fallback for browsers without color-mix
    if(!CSS.supports('color','color-mix(in srgb, red 20%, transparent)')) poly.style.setProperty('--radarFill', avg>=90?'rgba(22,199,106,.24)':avg>=80?'rgba(232,83,10,.24)':avg>=70?'rgba(245,166,35,.22)':'rgba(255,77,94,.2)');
    const dots=$('#homeRadarDots');
    if(dots){dots.innerHTML=pts.split(' ').map(p=>{const [x,y]=p.split(',');return `<circle class="radar-dot-home" cx="${x}" cy="${y}" r="6"></circle>`}).join('');}
    $$('.radar-svg-home text').forEach((t,i)=>{ if(skills[i]) t.textContent=skills[i].title.replace(/\s*\/.*$/,'').slice(0,18); });
  }
  function latestVisible(sel){const arr=$$(sel).filter(visible);return arr.length?arr[arr.length-1]:null;}
  function updateLatestHeadingsAndCards(){
    const cards=$$('.feature-grid-v2 .feature-card-v2');
    const projectCard=$('.feature-card-v2.project-mini')||cards[0];
    const awardCard=cards[1];
    if(projectCard){
      const pill=$('.section-pill',projectCard); if(pill) pill.textContent='Latest Project';
      const p=latestVisible('.projects-grid .proj');
      if(p){
        const title=clean($('.proj-title',p)?.innerText)||'Latest Project';
        const desc=clean($('.proj-desc',p)?.innerText)||'Latest project details will appear here.';
        const type=clean($('.proj-type',p)?.innerText)||'Project';
        const mt=$('.mini-title',projectCard); if(mt) mt.textContent=title;
        const md=$('.mini-desc',projectCard); if(md) md.textContent=desc.length>150?desc.slice(0,147)+'...':desc;
        let row=$('.mini-kpi-row',projectCard); if(!row){row=document.createElement('div');row.className='mini-kpi-row';($('.mini-desc',projectCard)||projectCard).insertAdjacentElement('afterend',row);}
        const tools=type.split(/·|,|\||-/).map(x=>clean(x)).filter(Boolean).slice(0,3);
        row.innerHTML=`<span class="mini-kpi">🆕 Latest</span>${tools.map(x=>`<span class="mini-kpi">${x}</span>`).join('')}<span class="mini-kpi">${Math.max(1,Math.round(desc.split(/\s+/).length/18))} key pts</span>`;
      }
    }
    if(awardCard){
      const pill=$('.section-pill',awardCard); if(pill) pill.textContent='Latest Recognition';
      const a=latestVisible('.awards-grid .award-card');
      if(a){
        const title=clean($('.award-title',a)?.innerText)||'Latest Recognition';
        const desc=clean($('.award-desc',a)?.innerText)||'Latest recognition details will appear here.';
        const badge=clean($('.award-badge',a)?.innerText)||'Recognition';
        const mt=$('.mini-title',awardCard); if(mt) mt.textContent=title;
        const md=$('.mini-desc',awardCard); if(md) md.textContent=desc.length>130?desc.slice(0,127)+'...':desc;
        let row=$('.home-award-kpi-row',awardCard); if(!row){row=document.createElement('div');row.className='home-award-kpi-row';($('.mini-desc',awardCard)||awardCard).insertAdjacentElement('afterend',row);}
        row.innerHTML=`<span class="home-award-kpi">🏆 Latest</span><span class="home-award-kpi">${badge.replace(/^[^A-Za-z0-9]+/,'')||'Recognition'}</span>`;
      }
    }
  }
  function runFinalPolish(){syncSkillProficiencyWithPercentFill();updateLatestHeadingsAndCards();}
  window.akFinalHomePolish=runFinalPolish;
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>setTimeout(runFinalPolish,1000));
  window.addEventListener('load',()=>{setTimeout(runFinalPolish,1400);setTimeout(runFinalPolish,2400);});
  document.addEventListener('input',e=>{if(e.target.closest('.skills-grid,.projects-grid,.awards-grid')) setTimeout(runFinalPolish,80);});
  document.addEventListener('click',e=>{if(e.target.closest('.admin-remove-item-btn,.ak-base-remove-btn,.admin-add-more-btn,.thought-refresh-home,[onclick*="akAdd"],[onclick*="akRemove"]')) setTimeout(runFinalPolish,220);});
  const oldSave=window.saveAdminChanges;
  window.saveAdminChanges=function(){ if(oldSave) oldSave.apply(this,arguments); setTimeout(runFinalPolish,350); };
})();
</script>
<script>
/* === FINAL PATCH: fill skill proficiency lines with color according to percentage === */
(function(){
  function skillColorByPercent(p){
    p=Number(String(p).replace(/[^0-9]/g,''))||0;
    if(p>=90) return ['#16c76a','#34d677','rgba(22,199,106,.45)'];
    if(p>=80) return ['#e8530a','#ff8c52','rgba(232,83,10,.45)'];
    if(p>=70) return ['#f5a623','#ffcc66','rgba(245,166,35,.42)'];
    return ['#ff4d5e','#ff8a95','rgba(255,77,94,.42)'];
  }
  function applySkillLineColors(){
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-skill-row]').forEach(function(row){
      var pctEl=row.querySelector('.home-skill-percent');
      var fill=row.querySelector('.home-skill-fill');
      if(!pctEl||!fill) return;
      var p=Number((pctEl.textContent||'').replace(/[^0-9]/g,''))||0;
      var c=skillColorByPercent(p);
      pctEl.style.color=c[0];
      fill.style.width=p+'%';
      fill.style.setProperty('--w',p+'%');
      fill.style.setProperty('--skillColor',c[0]);
      fill.style.setProperty('--skillColor2',c[1]);
      fill.style.setProperty('--skillGlow',c[2]);
      fill.style.background='linear-gradient(90deg,'+c[0]+','+c[1]+')';
      fill.style.boxShadow='0 0 16px '+c[2];
    });
  }
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){setTimeout(applySkillLineColors,200);setTimeout(applySkillLineColors,900);});
  window.addEventListener('load',function(){setTimeout(applySkillLineColors,300);});
  window.applySkillLineColors=applySkillLineColors;
  var old=window.syncSkillProficiencyWithPercentFill;
  if(typeof old==='function'){
    window.syncSkillProficiencyWithPercentFill=function(){old.apply(this,arguments);setTimeout(applySkillLineColors,20);};
  }
})();
</script>
<!-- === FINAL FIX: Editable Social Icons + Links (LinkedIn/GitHub/Gmail/WhatsApp) === -->
<style>
.social-row-v2 a.soc-li{background:#0077b5!important}
.social-row-v2 a.soc-gh{background:#24292e!important}
.social-row-v2 a.soc-em{background:var(--orange)!important}
.social-row-v2 a.soc-wa{background:#25d366!important}
.social-row-v2 a svg,.soc-n svg{width:16px;height:16px;display:block}
.admin-social-note{font-size:.66rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:.25rem;line-height:1.45}
</style>
<script>
(function(){
  const STORE='akash_portfolio_saved_profile_v1';
  const DEFAULTS={
    linkedin:'linkedin.com/in/akashkourav',
    github:'github.com/akashkourav',
    email:'akashkourav7566@gmail.com',
    whatsapp:'917509762086',
    phone:'+91 75097 62086'
  };
  function qsa(s,r=document){return Array.from(r.querySelectorAll(s));}
  function byId(id){return document.getElementById(id);}
  function load(){try{return Object.assign({},DEFAULTS,JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(STORE)||'{}'));}catch(e){return Object.assign({},DEFAULTS);}}
  function save(data){localStorage.setItem(STORE,JSON.stringify(Object.assign(load(),data||{})));}
  function cleanPhone(v){return (v||'').replace(/[^0-9+]/g,'').replace(/^\+/,'');}
  function url(v,domain){
    v=(v||'').trim(); if(!v) return '';
    if(v.startsWith('http://')||v.startsWith('https://')) return v;
    if(domain && !v.includes(domain)) v=domain.replace(/^https?:\/\//,'')+'/'+v.replace(/^@/,'');
    return 'https://'+v.replace(/^\/+/,'');
  }
  function currentSocialData(){
    const d=load();
    return {
      linkedin:(byId('editLinkedin')?.value||d.linkedin||DEFAULTS.linkedin).trim(),
      github:(byId('editGithub')?.value||d.github||DEFAULTS.github).trim(),
      email:(byId('editEmail')?.value||d.email||DEFAULTS.email).trim(),
      whatsapp:(byId('editWhatsapp')?.value||d.whatsapp||d.phone||DEFAULTS.whatsapp).trim()
    };
  }
  window.applySocialLinks=function(data){
    data=Object.assign(currentSocialData(),data||{});
    const linkedInUrl=url(data.linkedin,'linkedin.com/in');
    const githubUrl=url(data.github,'github.com');
    const emailHref='mailto:'+data.email;
    const waHref='https://wa.me/'+cleanPhone(data.whatsapp||data.phone);

    // Profile-card social row: same icons and correct redirect functionality
    qsa('.social-row-v2').forEach(row=>{
      let links=qsa('a',row);
      while(links.length<4){const a=document.createElement('a');row.appendChild(a);links.push(a);}
      const config=[
        ['soc-n soc-li','LinkedIn',linkedInUrl,'_blank'],
        ['soc-n soc-gh','GitHub',githubUrl,'_blank'],
        ['soc-n soc-em','Gmail',emailHref,''],
        ['soc-n soc-wa','WhatsApp',waHref,'_blank']
      ];
      links.slice(0,4).forEach((a,i)=>{
        a.className=config[i][0];
        a.title=config[i][1];
        a.href=config[i][2];
        if(config[i][3]) a.target=config[i][3]; else a.removeAttribute('target');
        a.setAttribute('aria-label',config[i][1]);
      });
    });

    qsa('a.soc-li,a[href*="linkedin.com"]').forEach(a=>{a.href=linkedInUrl; if(!a.target)a.target='_blank';});
    qsa('a.soc-gh,a[href*="github.com"]').forEach(a=>{a.href=githubUrl; if(!a.target)a.target='_blank';});
    qsa('a.soc-em,a[href^="mailto:"]').forEach(a=>{a.href=emailHref;});
    qsa('a.soc-wa,a[href*="wa.me"]').forEach(a=>{a.href=waHref; if(!a.target)a.target='_blank';});

    qsa('.contact-email,.info-email').forEach(el=>el.textContent=data.email);
    qsa('.contact-linkedin,.info-linkedin').forEach(el=>el.textContent=data.linkedin.replace(/^https?:\/\//,''));
    if(typeof injectSocialLogos==='function') injectSocialLogos();
  };

  function ensureAdminSocialFields(){
    if(byId('editGithub')) return;
    const linkedin=byId('editLinkedin');
    if(!linkedin) return;
    const parent=linkedin.closest('.admin-field');
    if(!parent) return;
    parent.insertAdjacentHTML('afterend', `
      <div class="admin-field"><label>GitHub Link</label><input id="editGithub" placeholder="github.com/akashkourav"><div class="admin-social-note">This updates all GitHub icons.</div></div>
      <div class="admin-field"><label>WhatsApp Number / Link</label><input id="editWhatsapp" placeholder="917509762086"><div class="admin-social-note">This updates all WhatsApp icons.</div></div>
    `);
  }

  const oldFill=window.fillAdminForm;
  window.fillAdminForm=function(){
    ensureAdminSocialFields();
    if(oldFill) oldFill();
    const d=load();
    if(byId('editGithub')) byId('editGithub').value=d.github||DEFAULTS.github;
    if(byId('editWhatsapp')) byId('editWhatsapp').value=d.whatsapp||d.phone||DEFAULTS.whatsapp;
    if(byId('editLinkedin') && !byId('editLinkedin').value) byId('editLinkedin').value=d.linkedin||DEFAULTS.linkedin;
    if(byId('editEmail') && !byId('editEmail').value) byId('editEmail').value=d.email||DEFAULTS.email;
  };

  const oldApply=window.applyPortfolioData;
  window.applyPortfolioData=function(data){
    if(oldApply) oldApply(data);
    if(data) save(data);
    applySocialLinks(data||load());
  };

  window.saveAdminChanges=function(){
    const old=load();
    const data={
      name:(byId('editName')?.value||old.name||'').trim(),
      role:(byId('editRole')?.value||old.role||'').trim(),
      email:(byId('editEmail')?.value||old.email||DEFAULTS.email).trim(),
      phone:(byId('editPhone')?.value||old.phone||DEFAULTS.phone).trim(),
      location:(byId('editLocation')?.value||old.location||'').trim(),
      linkedin:(byId('editLinkedin')?.value||old.linkedin||DEFAULTS.linkedin).trim(),
      github:(byId('editGithub')?.value||old.github||DEFAULTS.github).trim(),
      whatsapp:(byId('editWhatsapp')?.value||old.whatsapp||old.phone||DEFAULTS.whatsapp).trim(),
      desc:(byId('editDesc')?.value||old.desc||'').trim(),
      dashboards:(byId('editDashboards')?.value||old.dashboards||'').trim(),
      experience:(byId('editExperience')?.value||old.experience||'').trim(),
      rating:(byId('editRating')?.value||old.rating||'').trim(),
      photo:old.photo||''
    };
    const finish=(photo)=>{
      if(photo) data.photo=photo;
      save(data);
      if(window.applyPortfolioData) window.applyPortfolioData(data);
      if(typeof window.saveInlineEdits==='function') window.saveInlineEdits();
      if(typeof window.syncHomeSkillsVisual==='function') window.syncHomeSkillsVisual();
      if(typeof window.refreshHomeLatestCards==='function') window.refreshHomeLatestCards();
      if(typeof window.disableInlineEditing==='function') window.disableInlineEditing();
      document.body.classList.remove('editing');
      if(typeof closeAdminModal==='function') closeAdminModal();
      if(typeof showToast==='function') showToast('✅ Saved successfully! Social links, details and visuals updated.');
    };
    const file=byId('editPhoto')?.files?.[0];
    if(file){const r=new FileReader(); r.onload=e=>finish(e.target.result); r.readAsDataURL(file);} else finish();
  };

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>setTimeout(()=>{ensureAdminSocialFields();applySocialLinks(load());},250));
  window.addEventListener('load',()=>setTimeout(()=>{ensureAdminSocialFields();applySocialLinks(load());},700));
})();
</script>
<script>
/* === MARKET HEADER TEXT FIX: replace old manual-effort KPI with Latest Tech Update === */
(function(){
  function replaceTextNodes(root){
    const walker=document.createTreeWalker(root||document.body,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT,{acceptNode(n){
      const t=(n.nodeValue||'').trim();
      if(!t) return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;
      if(/REDUCED\s+MANUAL|MANUAL\s+REPORT\s+WORK|COST\s+SAVINGS|^30%$/i.test(t)) return NodeFilter.FILTER_ACCEPT;
      return NodeFilter.FILTER_REJECT;
    }});
    const nodes=[]; while(walker.nextNode()) nodes.push(walker.currentNode);
    nodes.forEach(n=>{
      const t=(n.nodeValue||'').trim();
      if(/REDUCED\s+MANUAL|MANUAL\s+REPORT\s+WORK/i.test(t)) n.nodeValue=n.nodeValue.replace(/.*REDUCED\s+MANUAL.*|.*MANUAL\s+REPORT\s+WORK.*/i,'LATEST TECH UPDATE');
      else if(/^30%$/i.test(t)) n.nodeValue=n.nodeValue.replace(/30%/i,'10');
      else if(/COST\s+SAVINGS/i.test(t)) n.nodeValue=n.nodeValue.replace(/Cost\s+Savings/i,'Recent Updates');
    });
  }
  window.fixMarketLatestTechHeader=function(){
    const market=document.getElementById('page-market')||document.body;
    const h2=market.querySelector('h2'); if(h2 && /latest tech updates/i.test(h2.textContent)) h2.textContent='Latest Tech Update';
    const overview=market.querySelector('.market-overview-box h3'); if(overview) overview.textContent='🚀 Latest Tech Update Overview';
    replaceTextNodes(market);
    // Also fix any accidentally rendered top KPI before market section
    replaceTextNodes(document.body);
  };
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>setTimeout(window.fixMarketLatestTechHeader,300));
  window.addEventListener('load',()=>setTimeout(window.fixMarketLatestTechHeader,700));
  const oldShow=window.showPage;
  window.showPage=function(){
    const r=oldShow?oldShow.apply(this,arguments):undefined;
    setTimeout(window.fixMarketLatestTechHeader,100);
    return r;
  };
})();
</script>
<script>
/* === DYNAMIC GROWTH DASHBOARD: reads live portfolio data === */
(function(){
  const ORANGE='#e8530a', ORANGE2='#f26b2a', BLUE='#3d7fff', GREEN='#16c76a', PURPLE='#9d6ef5', AMBER='#f5a623';
  function text(el){return (el&&el.textContent||'').trim().replace(/\s+/g,' ')}
  function pctColor(v){v=Number(v)||0; if(v>=90)return GREEN; if(v>=80)return ORANGE; if(v>=70)return AMBER; return BLUE;}
  function getSkills(){
    const fromBars=[...document.querySelectorAll('.skill-bar-label')].map(l=>{const spans=l.querySelectorAll('span');return {name:text(spans[0])||text(l).replace(/\d+%/,'').trim(),value:parseInt(text(spans[1])||text(l).match(/\d+/)?.[0]||0)}}).filter(s=>s.name&&s.value);
    if(fromBars.length) return fromBars.slice(0,10);
    const cards=[...document.querySelectorAll('.sk')].map(c=>({name:text(c.querySelector('.sk-title'))||text(c).slice(0,25),value:parseInt(text(c).match(/(\d{2,3})%/)?.[1]||80)})).filter(s=>s.name);
    if(cards.length) return cards.slice(0,10);
    return [{name:'Power BI',value:95},{name:'SQL',value:90},{name:'Python / ETL',value:80},{name:'Azure / Cloud',value:70},{name:'Data Modeling',value:88}];
  }
  function getItems(sel,titleSel,descSel){return [...document.querySelectorAll(sel)].map(c=>({title:text(c.querySelector(titleSel))||text(c).slice(0,60),desc:text(c.querySelector(descSel))||''})).filter(x=>x.title)}
  function portfolioData(){
    const skills=getSkills();
    const projects=getItems('.proj,.project-card,.project-item','.proj-title,.project-title,h3,h4','.proj-desc,.project-desc,p');
    const certs=getItems('.cert-card','.cert-name,h3,h4','.cert-org,.cert-stat-sub,p');
    const awards=getItems('.award-card','.award-title,h3,h4','.award-desc,p');
    const avg=Math.round(skills.reduce((a,b)=>a+b.value,0)/(skills.length||1));
    const top=[...skills].sort((a,b)=>b.value-a.value)[0]||{name:'Power BI',value:95};
    const low=[...skills].sort((a,b)=>a.value-b.value)[0]||{name:'Advanced BI',value:70};
    const readiness=Math.min(99,Math.round((avg*.68)+Math.min(projects.length,12)*1.2+Math.min(certs.length,10)*1.1+Math.min(awards.length,8)*.8));
    return {skills,projects,certs,awards,avg,top,low,readiness};
  }
  function set(id,v){const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el)el.textContent=v;}
  function setHTML(id,v){const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el)el.innerHTML=v;}
  function options(extra={}){return Object.assign({responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{labels:{color:'#8892a4',usePointStyle:true,pointStyle:'circle',padding:12,font:{family:'DM Sans',size:11}}},tooltip:{backgroundColor:'rgba(7,9,15,.96)',borderColor:'rgba(232,83,10,.25)',borderWidth:1,titleColor:'#fff',bodyColor:'#dfe6f2',padding:10}},scales:{y:{beginAtZero:true,ticks:{color:'#50596b'},grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.035)'}},x:{ticks:{color:'#8892a4'},grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.025)'}}}},extra)}
  function destroy(){(window.growthCharts||[]).forEach(c=>{try{c.destroy()}catch(e){}}); window.growthCharts=[];}
  window.initGrowthChart=function(){
    if(!document.getElementById('growthTrendChart')||!window.Chart)return;
    const d=portfolioData(); destroy();
    set('growthSkillAvg',d.avg+'%'); set('growthProjectCount',d.projects.length+'+'); set('growthCertCount',d.certs.length); set('growthAwardCount',d.awards.length);
    set('growthTopSkillNote',`Top skill: ${d.top.name} (${d.top.value}%).`);
    set('growthLatestProjectNote',(d.projects.at(-1)?.title||'Add latest project')+' updates this KPI.');
    set('growthLatestCertNote',(d.certs.at(-1)?.title||'Add latest certification')+' updates this KPI.');
    set('growthLatestAwardNote',(d.awards.at(-1)?.title||'Add latest recognition')+' updates this KPI.');
    set('growthReadinessScore',d.readiness+'%'); const badge=document.querySelector('.growth-score-badge'); if(badge) badge.style.setProperty('--score',d.readiness+'%');
    set('growthOverviewTitle',`${d.top.name} focused BI growth with ${d.projects.length} projects, ${d.certs.length} certifications and ${d.awards.length} recognitions`);
    set('growthOverviewText',`Current portfolio shows ${d.skills.length} skills with ${d.avg}% average proficiency. Latest project, certificate and award sections are connected dynamically, so edits reflect here after preview/save.`);
    set('growthLatestProject',d.projects.at(-1)?.title||'No project added yet'); set('growthLatestProjectDesc',d.projects.at(-1)?.desc||'Add a project from Edit Mode to show latest delivery summary.');
    set('growthLatestCert',d.certs.at(-1)?.title||'No certification added yet'); set('growthLatestCertDesc',d.certs.at(-1)?.desc||'Add certificate details from Edit Mode.');
    set('growthLatestAward',d.awards.at(-1)?.title||'No recognition added yet'); set('growthLatestAwardDesc',d.awards.at(-1)?.desc||'Add award details from Edit Mode.');
    set('growthNextFocus',d.low.name+' Improvement'); set('growthNextFocusDesc',`Lowest current score is ${d.low.value}%, so this is the next recommended focus area.`);
    set('growthSkillCountLabel',d.skills.length+' Skills'); set('growthMixLabel',`${d.projects.length+d.certs.length+d.awards.length} Items`); set('growthUpdated','Updated Now');
    const years=['2022','2023','2024','2025','2026'];
    const skillTrend=[Math.max(5,d.skills.length-4),Math.max(7,d.skills.length-2),d.skills.length,Math.round(d.avg/8),Math.round(d.avg/7)];
    const deliveryTrend=[Math.max(1,d.projects.length-3),Math.max(2,d.projects.length-2),Math.max(3,d.projects.length-1),d.projects.length,Math.max(d.projects.length+1,d.projects.length)];
    const learningTrend=[Math.max(1,d.certs.length-3),Math.max(1,d.certs.length-2),Math.max(2,d.certs.length-1),d.certs.length,Math.max(d.certs.length+1,d.certs.length)];
