    window.growthCharts.push(new Chart(document.getElementById('growthTrendChart'),{type:'line',data:{labels:years,datasets:[{label:'Skill Growth',data:skillTrend,borderColor:ORANGE,backgroundColor:'rgba(232,83,10,.12)',fill:true,tension:.42,pointRadius:4,pointBackgroundColor:ORANGE},{label:'Projects',data:deliveryTrend,borderColor:BLUE,backgroundColor:'rgba(61,127,255,.08)',fill:true,tension:.42,pointRadius:4,pointBackgroundColor:BLUE},{label:'Certifications',data:learningTrend,borderColor:GREEN,backgroundColor:'rgba(22,199,106,.08)',fill:true,tension:.42,pointRadius:4,pointBackgroundColor:GREEN}]},options:options()}));
    window.growthCharts.push(new Chart(document.getElementById('growthReadinessChart'),{type:'doughnut',data:{labels:['Skills','Projects','Certs','Awards'],datasets:[{data:[d.skills.length,d.projects.length||1,d.certs.length||1,d.awards.length||1],backgroundColor:[ORANGE,BLUE,PURPLE,AMBER],borderColor:'rgba(7,9,15,.9)',borderWidth:3,hoverOffset:8}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,cutout:'65%',plugins:{legend:{position:'bottom',labels:{color:'#8892a4',usePointStyle:true,font:{size:10,family:'DM Sans'}}},tooltip:{backgroundColor:'rgba(7,9,15,.96)'}}}}));
    const skillLabels=d.skills.slice(0,8).map(s=>s.name.length>14?s.name.slice(0,14)+'…':s.name); const skillVals=d.skills.slice(0,8).map(s=>s.value);
    window.growthCharts.push(new Chart(document.getElementById('growthSkillChart'),{type:'bar',data:{labels:skillLabels,datasets:[{label:'Proficiency %',data:skillVals,backgroundColor:skillVals.map(pctColor),borderRadius:9,barThickness:18}]},options:options({plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{y:{max:100,ticks:{color:'#50596b'},grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.035)'}},x:{ticks:{color:'#8892a4'},grid:{display:false}}}})}));
    window.growthCharts.push(new Chart(document.getElementById('growthImpactChart'),{type:'radar',data:{labels:['Skills','Projects','Certs','Awards','Readiness'],datasets:[{label:'Impact Score',data:[d.avg,Math.min(100,d.projects.length*12),Math.min(100,d.certs.length*16),Math.min(100,d.awards.length*20),d.readiness],backgroundColor:'rgba(232,83,10,.14)',borderColor:ORANGE,borderWidth:2.5,pointBackgroundColor:[ORANGE,BLUE,PURPLE,AMBER,GREEN],pointBorderColor:'#fff',pointRadius:4}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{r:{min:0,max:100,ticks:{display:false},grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.06)'},angleLines:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.06)'},pointLabels:{color:'#8892a4',font:{size:10,family:'DM Sans',weight:'700'}}}}}}));
  };
  window.refreshGrowthAPI=async function(){
    const status=document.getElementById('growthApiStatus'); if(status)status.textContent='● API Loading...';
    try{const user=(document.querySelector('a[href*="github.com/"]')?.href.split('github.com/')[1]||'akashkourav').replace('/','').trim();const res=await fetch('https://api.github.com/users/'+encodeURIComponent(user),{cache:'no-store'});if(!res.ok)throw new Error('API unavailable');const profile=await res.json();set('growthProjectCount',(profile.public_repos||portfolioData().projects.length)+'+');const rt=document.getElementById('growthProjectTrend'); if(rt)rt.textContent='GitHub API'; if(status)status.textContent='● API Connected'; if(window.showToast)showToast('✅ Growth dashboard refreshed from GitHub API');}
    catch(e){if(status)status.textContent='● Local Portfolio Data'; if(window.showToast)showToast('⚠️ API unavailable, using local portfolio data');}
    window.initGrowthChart();
  };
  const oldShow=window.showPage; window.showPage=function(page,btn,mobile){ if(oldShow)oldShow(page,btn,mobile); if(page==='growth')setTimeout(window.initGrowthChart,120); };
  const oldSave=window.saveAdminChanges; window.saveAdminChanges=function(){ const r=oldSave&&oldSave.apply(this,arguments); setTimeout(window.initGrowthChart,300); return r; };
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>setTimeout(window.initGrowthChart,400));
  window.addEventListener('storage',()=>setTimeout(window.initGrowthChart,200));
})();
</script>
<style id="professional-growth-visuals-css">
/* === PROFESSIONAL VISUAL UPGRADE: Growth charts === */
.growth-visual-card{
  position:relative;
  background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(18,22,34,.96),rgba(9,12,20,.96)) !important;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12) !important;
  box-shadow:0 18px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.42), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.06) !important;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.growth-visual-card::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 15% 8%,rgba(232,83,10,.16),transparent 32%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 85% 15%,rgba(61,127,255,.13),transparent 34%),
    linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.035),transparent 45%);
}
.growth-visual-card::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;left:0;right:0;top:0;height:2px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--orange),#ff8c52,#3d7fff,#16c76a);
  opacity:.9;
}
.growth-card-title,.growth-chart-box{position:relative;z-index:2;}
.growth-card-title h3{letter-spacing:-.02em;font-size:.95rem !important;}
.growth-card-title span{color:#ff8c52 !important;font-weight:800 !important;}
.growth-chart-box{background:rgba(255,255,255,.018);border-radius:14px;padding:.45rem;}
.growth-chart-box canvas{filter:drop-shadow(0 10px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.18));}
.growth-kpi-card,.growth-mini-card{
  background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(19,23,36,.96),rgba(11,14,23,.96)) !important;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.11) !important;
  box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.28) !important;
}
</style>
<script id="professional-growth-visuals-js">
/* === PROFESSIONAL CHART.JS VISUALS: realistic line, doughnut, bar and radar === */
(function(){
  const C={orange:'#ff5a12',orange2:'#ff8a3d',blue:'#3d7fff',blue2:'#6aa8ff',green:'#16c76a',green2:'#57e39a',purple:'#9d6ef5',amber:'#f5a623',red:'#ff4d4d',text:'#dfe6f2',muted:'#8c96aa',grid:'rgba(255,255,255,.07)',card:'#080b12'};
  function t(el){return (el&&el.textContent||'').trim().replace(/\s+/g,' ')}
  function getPct(txt, fallback=80){const m=String(txt||'').match(/(\d{1,3})\s*%/);return m?Math.min(100,parseInt(m[1])):fallback;}
  function pctColor(v){v=Number(v)||0; if(v>=90)return C.green; if(v>=85)return C.orange2; if(v>=80)return C.orange; if(v>=70)return C.amber; return C.blue;}
  function getSkills(){
    let skills=[...document.querySelectorAll('.skill-bar-label')].map(l=>{const s=l.querySelectorAll('span');return {name:t(s[0])||t(l).replace(/\d+%/,'').trim(),value:getPct(t(s[1])||t(l),0)}}).filter(x=>x.name&&x.value);
    if(!skills.length){
      skills=[...document.querySelectorAll('.sk')].map(c=>({name:t(c.querySelector('.sk-title'))||t(c).slice(0,22),value:getPct(t(c),80)})).filter(x=>x.name);
    }
    if(!skills.length) skills=[{name:'Power BI / DAX',value:95},{name:'SQL / MySQL',value:90},{name:'Python / ETL',value:80},{name:'Tableau',value:85},{name:'Azure / Cloud',value:70},{name:'Data Modeling',value:88}];
    return skills.slice(0,10);
  }
  function getItems(sel,titleSel,descSel){return [...document.querySelectorAll(sel)].map(c=>({title:t(c.querySelector(titleSel))||t(c).slice(0,60),desc:t(c.querySelector(descSel))||''})).filter(x=>x.title)}
  function data(){
    const skills=getSkills();
    const projects=getItems('.proj,.project-card,.project-item','.proj-title,.project-title,h3,h4','.proj-desc,.project-desc,p');
    const certs=getItems('.cert-card','.cert-name,h3,h4','.cert-org,.cert-stat-sub,p');
    const awards=getItems('.award-card','.award-title,h3,h4','.award-desc,p');
    const avg=Math.round(skills.reduce((a,b)=>a+b.value,0)/(skills.length||1));
    const top=[...skills].sort((a,b)=>b.value-a.value)[0]||{name:'Power BI',value:95};
    const low=[...skills].sort((a,b)=>a.value-b.value)[0]||{name:'Azure',value:70};
    const readiness=Math.min(99,Math.round(avg*.64+Math.min(projects.length,14)*1.35+Math.min(certs.length,12)*1.15+Math.min(awards.length,10)*.85));
    return {skills,projects,certs,awards,avg,top,low,readiness};
  }
  function set(id,v){const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el)el.textContent=v;}
  function gradient(ctx,area,top,bottom){const g=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,area.top,0,area.bottom);g.addColorStop(0,top);g.addColorStop(1,bottom);return g;}
  function baseOptions(extra={}){return Object.assign({
    responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,animation:{duration:1200,easing:'easeOutQuart'},
    interaction:{mode:'index',intersect:false},
    plugins:{legend:{position:'top',align:'end',labels:{color:C.muted,usePointStyle:true,pointStyle:'circle',boxWidth:8,boxHeight:8,padding:14,font:{family:'DM Sans',size:11,weight:'700'}}},
      tooltip:{enabled:true,backgroundColor:'rgba(6,8,14,.96)',titleColor:'#fff',bodyColor:'#dfe6f2',borderColor:'rgba(255,120,45,.35)',borderWidth:1,cornerRadius:12,padding:12,displayColors:true,boxPadding:6,callbacks:{label:(c)=>` ${c.dataset.label||c.label}: ${c.formattedValue}`}}
    },
    scales:{x:{ticks:{color:C.muted,font:{family:'DM Sans',size:11,weight:'700'}},grid:{display:false},border:{display:false}},
      y:{beginAtZero:true,ticks:{color:'#677084',font:{family:'DM Sans',size:10},padding:8},grid:{color:C.grid,drawBorder:false},border:{display:false}}
    }
  },extra)}
  function destroy(){(window.growthCharts||[]).forEach(c=>{try{c.destroy()}catch(e){}});window.growthCharts=[];}
  function buildLine(ctx,d){
    const area=ctx.chartArea||{top:0,bottom:260};
    const skillsNow=d.skills.length, pNow=d.projects.length, cNow=d.certs.length;
    const years=['2021','2022','2023','2024','2025','2026'];
    const skillTrend=[Math.max(2,skillsNow-7),Math.max(4,skillsNow-5),Math.max(6,skillsNow-3),Math.max(8,skillsNow-1),skillsNow,Math.max(skillsNow+1,skillsNow)];
    const deliveryTrend=[Math.max(1,pNow-6),Math.max(2,pNow-4),Math.max(3,pNow-3),Math.max(5,pNow-1),pNow,Math.max(pNow+1,pNow)];
    const learningTrend=[Math.max(1,cNow-5),Math.max(1,cNow-4),Math.max(2,cNow-2),Math.max(3,cNow-1),cNow,Math.max(cNow+1,cNow)];
    return new Chart(ctx,{type:'line',data:{labels:years,datasets:[
      {label:'Skills Mastered',data:skillTrend,borderColor:C.orange,backgroundColor:(x)=>x.chart.chartArea?gradient(x.chart.ctx,x.chart.chartArea,'rgba(255,90,18,.30)','rgba(255,90,18,.02)'):'rgba(255,90,18,.15)',fill:true,tension:.42,borderWidth:3,pointRadius:4,pointHoverRadius:7,pointBackgroundColor:'#fff',pointBorderColor:C.orange,pointBorderWidth:3},
      {label:'Projects Delivered',data:deliveryTrend,borderColor:C.blue,backgroundColor:(x)=>x.chart.chartArea?gradient(x.chart.ctx,x.chart.chartArea,'rgba(61,127,255,.22)','rgba(61,127,255,.02)'):'rgba(61,127,255,.12)',fill:true,tension:.42,borderWidth:3,pointRadius:4,pointHoverRadius:7,pointBackgroundColor:'#fff',pointBorderColor:C.blue,pointBorderWidth:3},
      {label:'Learning Assets',data:learningTrend,borderColor:C.green,backgroundColor:(x)=>x.chart.chartArea?gradient(x.chart.ctx,x.chart.chartArea,'rgba(22,199,106,.22)','rgba(22,199,106,.02)'):'rgba(22,199,106,.12)',fill:true,tension:.42,borderWidth:3,pointRadius:4,pointHoverRadius:7,pointBackgroundColor:'#fff',pointBorderColor:C.green,pointBorderWidth:3}
    ]},options:baseOptions({plugins:{...baseOptions().plugins,subtitle:{display:true,text:'Portfolio progress trend based on current saved/preview data',color:'#697386',align:'start',font:{family:'DM Sans',size:11}}}})});
  }
  function buildDoughnut(ctx,d){
    const values=[d.skills.length||1,d.projects.length||1,d.certs.length||1,d.awards.length||1];
    return new Chart(ctx,{type:'doughnut',data:{labels:['Skills','Projects','Certifications','Recognitions'],datasets:[{data:values,backgroundColor:[C.orange,C.blue,C.purple,C.amber],borderColor:'rgba(7,9,15,.95)',borderWidth:5,hoverOffset:12,spacing:3}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,cutout:'68%',animation:{animateRotate:true,duration:1200},plugins:{legend:{position:'bottom',labels:{color:C.muted,usePointStyle:true,pointStyle:'circle',padding:14,font:{family:'DM Sans',size:11,weight:'700'}}},tooltip:{backgroundColor:'rgba(6,8,14,.96)',borderColor:'rgba(255,120,45,.35)',borderWidth:1,cornerRadius:12,padding:12},title:{display:true,text:`Readiness Score: ${d.readiness}%`,color:'#fff',font:{family:'Syne',size:16,weight:'800'},padding:{bottom:8}}}}});
  }
  function buildBar(ctx,d){
    const rows=d.skills.slice(0,8);
    return new Chart(ctx,{type:'bar',data:{labels:rows.map(s=>s.name.length>16?s.name.slice(0,16)+'…':s.name),datasets:[{label:'Proficiency %',data:rows.map(s=>s.value),backgroundColor:(x)=>{
      const chart=x.chart, area=chart.chartArea, v=x.raw; if(!area)return pctColor(v); const g=chart.ctx.createLinearGradient(0,area.bottom,0,area.top); g.addColorStop(0,pctColor(v)); g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(255,255,255,.88)'); return g;
    },borderColor:rows.map(s=>pctColor(s.value)),borderWidth:1,borderRadius:{topLeft:10,topRight:10,bottomLeft:4,bottomRight:4},barPercentage:.62,categoryPercentage:.58}]},options:baseOptions({plugins:{legend:{display:false},tooltip:baseOptions().plugins.tooltip},scales:{y:{min:0,max:100,ticks:{color:'#677084',callback:v=>v+'%'},grid:{color:C.grid},border:{display:false}},x:{ticks:{color:C.muted,font:{family:'DM Sans',size:10,weight:'800'}},grid:{display:false},border:{display:false}}}})});
  }
  function buildRadar(ctx,d){
    const v=[d.avg,Math.min(100,d.projects.length*14),Math.min(100,d.certs.length*16),Math.min(100,d.awards.length*18),d.readiness];
    return new Chart(ctx,{type:'radar',data:{labels:['Skill Depth','Delivery','Learning','Recognition','Readiness'],datasets:[{label:'Impact Score',data:v,backgroundColor:'rgba(255,90,18,.20)',borderColor:C.orange,borderWidth:3,pointRadius:5,pointHoverRadius:8,pointBackgroundColor:[C.orange,C.blue,C.purple,C.amber,C.green],pointBorderColor:'#fff',pointBorderWidth:2},{label:'Target Benchmark',data:[90,80,75,70,92],backgroundColor:'rgba(61,127,255,.08)',borderColor:'rgba(61,127,255,.55)',borderWidth:2,borderDash:[5,5],pointRadius:0}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,animation:{duration:1200,easing:'easeOutQuart'},plugins:{legend:{position:'bottom',labels:{color:C.muted,usePointStyle:true,font:{family:'DM Sans',size:11,weight:'700'}}},tooltip:{backgroundColor:'rgba(6,8,14,.96)',borderColor:'rgba(255,120,45,.35)',borderWidth:1,cornerRadius:12,padding:12}},scales:{r:{min:0,max:100,ticks:{display:false,stepSize:20},grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.075)'},angleLines:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.08)'},pointLabels:{color:C.muted,font:{family:'DM Sans',size:11,weight:'800'}}}}}});
  }
  window.initGrowthChart=function(){
    if(!document.getElementById('growthTrendChart')||!window.Chart)return;
    const d=data(); destroy();
    set('growthSkillAvg',d.avg+'%'); set('growthProjectCount',d.projects.length+'+'); set('growthCertCount',d.certs.length); set('growthAwardCount',d.awards.length);
    set('growthTopSkillNote',`Top skill: ${d.top.name} (${d.top.value}%).`);
    set('growthLatestProjectNote',(d.projects.at(-1)?.title||'Add latest project')+' updates this KPI.');
    set('growthLatestCertNote',(d.certs.at(-1)?.title||'Add latest certification')+' updates this KPI.');
    set('growthLatestAwardNote',(d.awards.at(-1)?.title||'Add latest recognition')+' updates this KPI.');
    set('growthReadinessScore',d.readiness+'%'); const badge=document.querySelector('.growth-score-badge'); if(badge) badge.style.setProperty('--score',d.readiness+'%');
    set('growthOverviewTitle',`${d.top.name} growth dashboard — ${d.projects.length} projects, ${d.certs.length} certifications, ${d.awards.length} recognitions`);
    set('growthOverviewText',`Professional view of your current portfolio: ${d.skills.length} active skills, ${d.avg}% average proficiency, strongest area ${d.top.name}, and next focus ${d.low.name}. All visuals update after edit preview/save.`);
    set('growthLatestProject',d.projects.at(-1)?.title||'No project added yet'); set('growthLatestProjectDesc',d.projects.at(-1)?.desc||'Add a project from Edit Mode to show latest delivery summary.');
    set('growthLatestCert',d.certs.at(-1)?.title||'No certification added yet'); set('growthLatestCertDesc',d.certs.at(-1)?.desc||'Add certificate details from Edit Mode.');
    set('growthLatestAward',d.awards.at(-1)?.title||'No recognition added yet'); set('growthLatestAwardDesc',d.awards.at(-1)?.desc||'Add award details from Edit Mode.');
    set('growthNextFocus',d.low.name+' Improvement'); set('growthNextFocusDesc',`Current focus recommendation: raise ${d.low.name} from ${d.low.value}% toward 85%+ with one practical project/certification.`);
    set('growthSkillCountLabel',d.skills.length+' Skills'); set('growthMixLabel',`${d.projects.length+d.certs.length+d.awards.length} Items`); set('growthUpdated','Updated Now'); set('growthImpactLabel','Benchmark');
    window.growthCharts.push(buildLine(document.getElementById('growthTrendChart'),d));
    window.growthCharts.push(buildDoughnut(document.getElementById('growthReadinessChart'),d));
    window.growthCharts.push(buildBar(document.getElementById('growthSkillChart'),d));
    window.growthCharts.push(buildRadar(document.getElementById('growthImpactChart'),d));
  };
  const oldRefresh=window.refreshGrowthAPI;
  window.refreshGrowthAPI=async function(){
    const status=document.getElementById('growthApiStatus'); if(status)status.textContent='● API Refreshing...';
    if(oldRefresh){try{await oldRefresh();}catch(e){}}
    setTimeout(()=>{if(status)status.textContent='● Visuals Ready'; window.initGrowthChart();},350);
  };
  const oldShow=window.showPage;
  window.showPage=function(page,btn,mobile){const r=oldShow?oldShow.apply(this,arguments):undefined;if(page==='growth')setTimeout(window.initGrowthChart,180);return r;};
  const oldSave=window.saveAdminChanges;
  window.saveAdminChanges=function(){const r=oldSave&&oldSave.apply(this,arguments);setTimeout(window.initGrowthChart,450);return r;};
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>setTimeout(window.initGrowthChart,650));
  window.addEventListener('storage',()=>setTimeout(window.initGrowthChart,250));
})();
</script>
<!-- === FINAL ADD: Editable Naukri Profile + Smart Bot For All Website Tabs === -->
<style>
.soc-naukri{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6246ea,#1b8cff)!important;color:#fff!important}
.social-row-v2{grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr)!important}
.social-row-v2 a.soc-naukri{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6246ea,#1b8cff)!important}
.soc-naukri svg,.social-row-v2 .soc-naukri svg{width:16px;height:16px;display:block}
.admin-social-note{font-size:.66rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:.25rem;line-height:1.45}
@media(max-width:700px){.social-row-v2{grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr)!important}}


/* =========================================================
   GITHUB 100% VIEW FIX — prevents card/text clipping on laptop
   and GitHub Pages default browser zoom.
   ========================================================= */
.home-v2,
.home-shell,
.main-stack,
.left-stack,
.glass-card,
.hero-banner-v2,
.tech-strip-v2,
.feature-grid-v2,
.feature-card-v2,
.project-mini{
  min-width:0 !important;
}

.home-shell{
  width:100% !important;
  max-width:1320px !important;
  grid-template-columns:minmax(230px,285px) minmax(0,1fr) !important;
}

.main-stack{width:100% !important;overflow:visible !important;}
.glass-card{max-width:100% !important;}

/* Core Technologies should wrap instead of squeezing/cutting text */
.tech-list-v2{
  display:grid !important;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(150px,1fr)) !important;
  gap:.65rem !important;
}
.tech-pill-v2{min-width:0 !important;overflow:hidden !important;}
.tech-pill-v2 div{min-width:0 !important;}
.tech-pill-v2 b,.tech-pill-v2 small{max-width:100% !important;}
.tech-head-v2{flex-wrap:wrap !important;}

/* Feature cards: no horizontal text clipping */
.feature-grid-v2{
  display:grid !important;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
  gap:clamp(.75rem,1.3vw,1rem) !important;
  align-items:stretch !important;
}
.feature-card-v2{
  min-height:unset !important;
  height:auto !important;
  overflow:hidden !important;
  padding:clamp(.9rem,1.2vw,1.15rem) !important;
}
.project-mini{
  grid-template-columns:1fr !important;
  gap:.85rem !important;
  align-items:start !important;
}
.chart-thumb{
  width:100% !important;
  max-width:190px !important;
  height:120px !important;
  margin:0 auto !important;
  flex-shrink:0 !important;
}
.mini-title,
.mini-desc,
.quote-v2,
.quote-author-v2,
.section-pill{
  max-width:100% !important;
  white-space:normal !important;
  overflow:visible !important;
  text-overflow:clip !important;
  overflow-wrap:break-word !important;
}
.mini-btn,.thought-refresh-home{
  max-width:100% !important;
  white-space:normal !important;
  word-break:normal !important;
}
.award-medal{max-width:120px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;}

/* Laptop width: keep clean two/one column layout */
@media(max-width:1280px){
  .home-shell{grid-template-columns:1fr !important;max-width:1040px !important;}
  .left-stack{display:grid !important;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;gap:1rem !important;}
  .feature-grid-v2{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;}
}

@media(max-width:1050px){
  .feature-grid-v2{grid-template-columns:1fr !important;}
  .project-mini{grid-template-columns:minmax(120px,180px) minmax(0,1fr) !important;}
  .chart-thumb{max-width:180px !important;margin:0 !important;}
}

@media(max-width:760px){
  .home-shell{grid-template-columns:1fr !important;}
  .left-stack{display:flex !important;flex-direction:column !important;}
  .tech-list-v2{grid-template-columns:1fr !important;}
  .feature-grid-v2{grid-template-columns:1fr !important;}
  .project-mini{grid-template-columns:1fr !important;}
  .chart-thumb{max-width:100% !important;margin:0 auto !important;}
}
</style>
<script>
(function(){
  const STORE='akash_portfolio_saved_profile_v1';
  const DEFAULTS={
    name:'Akash Kourav',
    role:'Power BI Developer & BI Analyst',
    email:'akashkourav7566@gmail.com',
    phone:'+91 75097 62086',
    whatsapp:'917509762086',
    linkedin:'linkedin.com/in/akashkourav',
    github:'github.com/akashkourav',
    naukri:'https://www.naukri.com/mnjuser/profile'
  };
  const NAUKRI_LOGO='<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M4 4.5h4.1l6.2 8.9V4.5H20v15h-4.1L9.7 10.7v8.8H4v-15z"/></svg>';
  function qsa(s,r=document){return Array.from(r.querySelectorAll(s));}
  function byId(id){return document.getElementById(id);}
  function load(){try{return Object.assign({},DEFAULTS,JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(STORE)||'{}'));}catch(e){return Object.assign({},DEFAULTS);}}
  function save(data){localStorage.setItem(STORE,JSON.stringify(Object.assign(load(),data||{})));}
  function cleanPhone(v){return (v||'').replace(/[^0-9+]/g,'').replace(/^\+/,'');}
  function fullUrl(v,domain){
    v=(v||'').trim(); if(!v) return '#';
    if(v.startsWith('mailto:')||v.startsWith('tel:')||v.startsWith('http://')||v.startsWith('https://')) return v;
    if(domain && !v.includes(domain)) v=domain.replace(/^https?:\/\//,'')+'/'+v.replace(/^@/,'').replace(/^\/+/, '');
    return 'https://'+v.replace(/^\/+/, '');
  }
  function ensureNaukriAnchors(){
    qsa('.socials-nav,.mobile-socials').forEach(row=>{
      if(!row.querySelector('.soc-naukri')){
        const a=document.createElement('a');
        a.className='soc-n soc-naukri'; a.title='Naukri'; a.target='_blank'; a.setAttribute('aria-label','Naukri'); a.innerHTML=NAUKRI_LOGO;
        const resume=row.querySelector('.btn-resume,.nav-edit-btn');
        row.insertBefore(a,resume||null);
      }
    });
    qsa('.social-row-v2').forEach(row=>{
      if(!row.querySelector('.soc-naukri')){
        const a=document.createElement('a');
        a.className='soc-n soc-naukri'; a.title='Naukri'; a.target='_blank'; a.setAttribute('aria-label','Naukri'); a.innerHTML=NAUKRI_LOGO;
        row.appendChild(a);
      }
    });
  }
  function ensureNaukriAdminField(){
    if(byId('editNaukri')) return;
    const after=byId('editGithub') || byId('editLinkedin') || byId('editEmail');
    if(!after) return;
    const field=after.closest('.admin-field');
    if(!field) return;
    field.insertAdjacentHTML('afterend','<div class="admin-field"><label>Naukri Profile Link</label><input id="editNaukri" placeholder="https://www.naukri.com/mnjuser/profile"><div class="admin-social-note">This updates all Naukri icons and redirects to your Naukri profile.</div></div>');
  }
  function applyNaukriAndSocials(data){
    data=Object.assign(load(),data||{});
    ensureNaukriAnchors();
    const naukriUrl=fullUrl(data.naukri||DEFAULTS.naukri,'naukri.com');
    qsa('a.soc-naukri').forEach(a=>{a.href=naukriUrl;a.target='_blank';a.title='Naukri';a.setAttribute('aria-label','Naukri');a.innerHTML=NAUKRI_LOGO;});
    const li=fullUrl(data.linkedin||DEFAULTS.linkedin,'linkedin.com/in');
    const gh=fullUrl(data.github||DEFAULTS.github,'github.com');
    const em='mailto:'+(data.email||DEFAULTS.email);
    const wa='https://wa.me/'+cleanPhone(data.whatsapp||data.phone||DEFAULTS.whatsapp);
    qsa('a.soc-li,a[href*="linkedin.com"]').forEach(a=>{a.href=li;if(!a.target)a.target='_blank';});
    qsa('a.soc-gh,a[href*="github.com"]').forEach(a=>{a.href=gh;if(!a.target)a.target='_blank';});
    qsa('a.soc-em,a[href^="mailto:"]').forEach(a=>{a.href=em;});
    qsa('a.soc-wa,a[href*="wa.me"]').forEach(a=>{a.href=wa;if(!a.target)a.target='_blank';});
    if(typeof injectSocialLogos==='function') injectSocialLogos();
    qsa('a.soc-naukri').forEach(a=>a.innerHTML=NAUKRI_LOGO);
  }
  window.applyNaukriAndSocials=applyNaukriAndSocials;

  const oldFill=window.fillAdminForm;
  window.fillAdminForm=function(){
    if(oldFill) oldFill();
    ensureNaukriAdminField();
    const d=load();
    if(byId('editNaukri')) byId('editNaukri').value=d.naukri||DEFAULTS.naukri;
    if(byId('editGithub') && !byId('editGithub').value) byId('editGithub').value=d.github||DEFAULTS.github;
    if(byId('editWhatsapp') && !byId('editWhatsapp').value) byId('editWhatsapp').value=d.whatsapp||d.phone||DEFAULTS.whatsapp;
    applyNaukriAndSocials(d);
  };

  const oldSave=window.saveAdminChanges;
  window.saveAdminChanges=function(){
    const d={
      naukri:(byId('editNaukri')?.value||load().naukri||DEFAULTS.naukri).trim(),
      github:(byId('editGithub')?.value||load().github||DEFAULTS.github).trim(),
      linkedin:(byId('editLinkedin')?.value||load().linkedin||DEFAULTS.linkedin).trim(),
      email:(byId('editEmail')?.value||load().email||DEFAULTS.email).trim(),
      whatsapp:(byId('editWhatsapp')?.value||load().whatsapp||load().phone||DEFAULTS.whatsapp).trim()
    };
    save(d);
    if(oldSave) oldSave();
    setTimeout(()=>applyNaukriAndSocials(load()),150);
  };

  // Smart bot: reads visible website tab content and replies in short attractive answers.
  function txt(el){return (el?.innerText||el?.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();}
  function shortLines(text,max=4){
    const parts=text.split(/(?<=[.!?])\s+|\n+/).map(x=>x.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    return parts.slice(0,max).join('\n');
  }
  function cardTexts(selector,max=5){
    return qsa(selector).slice(0,max).map((el,i)=>'• '+txt(el).slice(0,220)).filter(x=>x.length>3).join('\n');
  }
  function sectionText(pageId){
    const page=byId('page-'+pageId); if(!page) return '';
    return txt(page).slice(0,1800);
  }
  function latestCards(){
    const proj=txt(document.querySelector('.project-mini,.proj,.projects-grid .proj'));
    const award=txt(document.querySelector('.feature-card-v2:nth-child(2),.award-card,.awards-grid .award-card'));
    return {proj,award};
  }
  function contactBlock(){
    const d=load();
    return `📩 Contact Admin:\nEmail: ${d.email||DEFAULTS.email}\nWhatsApp: +${cleanPhone(d.whatsapp||d.phone||DEFAULTS.whatsapp)}\nLinkedIn: ${d.linkedin||DEFAULTS.linkedin}`;
  }
  window.getBotReply=function(msg){
    const m=(msg||'').toLowerCase();
    const d=load();
    if(/^(hi|hello|hey)\b/.test(m)) return `Hey! 👋 I’m Akash’s portfolio bot. Ask me about Home, About, Skills, Projects, Experience, Growth, Market, Certs, Awards, Resume, or Contact.`;
    if(m.includes('contact')||m.includes('email')||m.includes('whatsapp')||m.includes('hire')||m.includes('connect')) return `Absolutely! 🚀\n${contactBlock()}\nNaukri: ${d.naukri||DEFAULTS.naukri}`;
    if(m.includes('naukri')) return `Here is Akash’s Naukri profile link 👇\n${d.naukri||DEFAULTS.naukri}`;
    if(m.includes('resume')) return `Akash’s resume is available from the Resume button. If it is not uploaded yet, please contact admin.\n${contactBlock()}`;
    if(m.includes('home')||m.includes('summary')||m.includes('overview')){
      const l=latestCards();
      return `Quick portfolio snapshot ✨\n${d.name||DEFAULTS.name} — ${d.role||DEFAULTS.role}\nLatest Project: ${shortLines(l.proj||'Project details available in Projects tab.',2)}\nLatest Recognition: ${shortLines(l.award||'Recognition details available in Awards tab.',2)}`;
    }
    if(m.includes('about')||m.includes('who is')) return `About Akash 👤\n${shortLines(sectionText('about')||'Power BI Developer & BI Analyst focused on dashboards, analytics and automation.',4)}`;
    if(m.includes('skill')||m.includes('technology')||m.includes('tool')) return `Core skills 🛠\n${cardTexts('#page-skills .sk,.tech-pill-v2,.skill-row,.skill-bar-label',6) || shortLines(sectionText('skills'),5)}`;
    if(m.includes('project')||m.includes('work')||m.includes('dashboard')) return `Projects 💼\n${cardTexts('#page-projects .proj,.projects-grid .proj',5) || shortLines(sectionText('projects'),5)}`;
    if(m.includes('experience')||m.includes('career')||m.includes('job')) return `Experience 📋\n${cardTexts('#page-experience .exp-card,.exp-item',4) || shortLines(sectionText('experience'),5)}`;
    if(m.includes('growth')||m.includes('impact')||m.includes('visual')||m.includes('chart')) return `Growth dashboard 📈\n${shortLines(sectionText('growth')||'Growth tab shows dashboards delivered, automation impact, certifications and project progress with visuals.',5)}`;
    if(m.includes('market')||m.includes('tech update')||m.includes('latest update')) return `Latest tech updates 🛰️\n${cardTexts('#page-market .market-card',5) || shortLines(sectionText('market'),5)}`;
    if(m.includes('cert')||m.includes('certificate')||m.includes('credential')) return `Certifications 🎓\n${cardTexts('#page-certs .cert-card',5) || shortLines(sectionText('certs'),5)}`;
    if(m.includes('award')||m.includes('recognition')||m.includes('achievement')) return `Awards & recognition 🏆\n${cardTexts('#page-awards .award-card',5) || shortLines(sectionText('awards'),5)}`;
    return `Ohh ho 😄 sorry, I don’t know this detail yet. Please contact my admin for the exact info.\n${contactBlock()}`;
  };

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>setTimeout(()=>{ensureNaukriAdminField();applyNaukriAndSocials(load());},250));
  window.addEventListener('load',()=>setTimeout(()=>{ensureNaukriAdminField();applyNaukriAndSocials(load());},700));
})();
</script>
<!-- === FINAL UPDATE: Home order + full width cards requested by user === -->
<style>
/* Move layout into a wider, clean full-page dashboard look */
.home-v2{padding-left:clamp(14px,2vw,32px)!important;padding-right:clamp(14px,2vw,32px)!important;}
.home-shell{max-width:1780px!important;width:100%!important;grid-template-columns:minmax(255px,330px) minmax(0,1fr)!important;gap:clamp(14px,1.5vw,24px)!important;}
.main-stack{width:100%!important;}
/* Data Analysis / What I Do row above Core Technologies */
.what-grid-v2{order:0!important;display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,minmax(0,1fr))!important;gap:.85rem!important;padding:1rem!important;}
.tech-strip-v2{order:1!important;width:100%!important;padding:1rem 1.1rem!important;}
.feature-grid-v2{order:2!important;width:100%!important;display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:1.25fr .95fr 1.05fr!important;gap:clamp(.9rem,1.3vw,1.25rem)!important;align-items:stretch!important;}
/* Core technology chips fill the complete row without overlapping */
.tech-list-v2{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,minmax(135px,1fr))!important;gap:.8rem!important;}
.tech-pill-v2{width:100%!important;min-height:62px!important;padding:.75rem .85rem!important;}
.tech-pill-v2 b{font-size:.76rem!important;}
.tech-pill-v2 small{font-size:.61rem!important;}
/* Latest project / recognition / thought should use full card space */
.feature-card-v2{min-height:240px!important;padding:1.35rem!important;display:flex!important;flex-direction:column!important;justify-content:center!important;}
.project-mini{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:minmax(130px,190px) minmax(0,1fr)!important;align-items:center!important;gap:1.1rem!important;}
.project-mini .chart-thumb{width:100%!important;max-width:190px!important;height:135px!important;margin:0!important;}
.feature-card-v2 .section-pill{font-size:clamp(.78rem,1vw,1rem)!important;margin-bottom:.7rem!important;}
.mini-title{font-size:clamp(.88rem,1vw,1.05rem)!important;}
.mini-desc{font-size:.78rem!important;line-height:1.55!important;}
.quote-v2{font-size:clamp(.95rem,1.05vw,1.1rem)!important;line-height:1.65!important;}
.award-medal{width:96px!important;height:96px!important;}
/* Improve service row */
.what-card-v2{border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08)!important;min-width:0!important;}
.what-card-v2:last-child{border-right:0!important;}
.what-card-v2 b,.what-card-v2 span{white-space:normal!important;overflow:visible!important;text-overflow:clip!important;}
@media(max-width:1450px){
  .home-shell{grid-template-columns:minmax(230px,300px) minmax(0,1fr)!important;}
  .tech-list-v2{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr))!important;}
  .what-grid-v2{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr))!important;}
  .feature-grid-v2{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr!important;}
  .feature-grid-v2 .feature-card-v2:last-child{grid-column:1/-1!important;}
}
@media(max-width:1100px){
  .home-shell{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;max-width:1040px!important;}
  .left-stack{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))!important;}
  .feature-grid-v2{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;}
  .feature-grid-v2 .feature-card-v2:last-child{grid-column:auto!important;}
  .project-mini{grid-template-columns:minmax(130px,200px) minmax(0,1fr)!important;}
}
@media(max-width:760px){
  .left-stack{display:flex!important;flex-direction:column!important;}
  .what-grid-v2,.tech-list-v2{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;}
  .feature-card-v2{min-height:unset!important;}
  .project-mini{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;}
  .project-mini .chart-thumb{max-width:100%!important;margin:0 auto!important;}
  .what-card-v2{border-right:0!important;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)!important;}
  .what-card-v2:last-child{border-bottom:0!important;}
}
</style>
<style>
/* === AKASH FINAL LAYOUT FIX: Core Technologies left + full-width latest cards === */
.home-v2{padding-left:clamp(14px,1.5vw,28px)!important;padding-right:clamp(14px,1.5vw,28px)!important;}
.home-shell{max-width:1780px!important;width:100%!important;margin:0 auto!important;grid-template-columns:minmax(300px,360px) minmax(0,1fr)!important;align-items:start!important;}
.left-stack{gap:.9rem!important;}
.left-stack .tech-strip-v2{order:3!important;width:100%!important;padding:1rem!important;}
.left-stack .tech-head-v2{align-items:center!important;gap:.5rem!important;}
.left-stack .tech-head-v2 .view-link-v2{font-size:.62rem!important;padding:.45rem .65rem!important;white-space:nowrap!important;}
.left-stack .tech-list-v2{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:1fr!important;gap:.65rem!important;}
.left-stack .tech-pill-v2{width:100%!important;min-height:60px!important;padding:.72rem .8rem!important;justify-content:flex-start!important;}

.left-stack .tech-pill-v2 small{font-size:.62rem!important;white-space:normal!important;}
.main-stack>.tech-strip-v2{display:none!important;}
.home-v2>.feature-grid-v2{max-width:1780px!important;width:100%!important;margin:1rem auto 0!important;display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:1.2fr 1fr 1fr!important;gap:clamp(.9rem,1.2vw,1.25rem)!important;align-items:stretch!important;}
.home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .feature-card-v2{min-height:230px!important;padding:1.35rem!important;display:flex!important;flex-direction:column!important;justify-content:center!important;}
.home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .project-mini{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:minmax(150px,220px) minmax(0,1fr)!important;gap:1.25rem!important;align-items:center!important;}
.home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .chart-thumb{width:100%!important;height:135px!important;margin:0!important;}
.home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .section-pill{font-size:clamp(.82rem,1vw,1rem)!important;margin-bottom:.75rem!important;}
.home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .mini-title{font-size:clamp(.9rem,1.05vw,1.08rem)!important;}
.home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .mini-desc{font-size:.78rem!important;line-height:1.58!important;}
.home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .quote-v2{font-size:clamp(.95rem,1.05vw,1.1rem)!important;line-height:1.65!important;}
@media(max-width:1450px){
  .home-shell{grid-template-columns:minmax(285px,330px) minmax(0,1fr)!important;}

}
@media(max-width:1100px){
  .home-shell{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;}
  .left-stack{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))!important;}
  .left-stack .tech-strip-v2{grid-column:1/-1!important;}
  .left-stack .tech-list-v2{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))!important;}
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;}

}

<!-- AKASH PATCH: MOBILE HEADER VISIBILITY FIX -->
<style id="akash-mobile-header-fix">
/* Keep header always visible on mobile/tablet after GitHub publish */
nav{
  display:flex!important;
  position:fixed!important;
  top:0!important;left:0!important;right:0!important;
  z-index:99999!important;
  height:58px!important;
  min-height:58px!important;
  background:rgba(7,9,15,.985)!important;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.10)!important;
  box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.35)!important;
}
.nav-brand{display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;min-width:0!important;}
.nav-logo{flex:0 0 auto!important;}
.nav-name{display:inline-block!important;color:var(--text)!important;}
.page{padding-top:58px!important;}
.mobile-drawer{display:block!important;z-index:99998!important;}

@media(max-width:1100px){
  nav{height:56px!important;min-height:56px!important;padding:0 14px!important;}
  .nav-tabs,.nav-actions{display:none!important;}
  .nav-hamburger{display:flex!important;margin-left:auto!important;flex:0 0 auto!important;}
  .page{padding-top:56px!important;}
  .mobile-drawer{top:56px!important;}
}

@media(max-width:700px){
  nav{height:54px!important;min-height:54px!important;padding:0 12px!important;}
  .nav-logo{width:30px!important;height:30px!important;border-radius:8px!important;font-size:.68rem!important;}
  .nav-name{font-size:.78rem!important;max-width:62vw!important;white-space:nowrap!important;overflow:hidden!important;text-overflow:ellipsis!important;}
  .nav-hamburger{display:flex!important;}
  .nav-hamburger span{display:block!important;background:#edf0f7!important;}
  .page{padding-top:54px!important;}
  .mobile-drawer{top:54px!important;}
  .home-v2{padding-top:12px!important;}
}
</style>



<!-- AKASH PATCH: DESKTOP / MACBOOK FULLSCREEN DASHBOARD FIX -->
<style id="akash-desktop-fullscreen-dashboard-fix">
/* Desktop and laptop: show full header and use the complete screen width */
@media (min-width:1101px){
  html,body{width:100%!important;max-width:100%!important;overflow-x:hidden!important;}
  nav{
    display:flex!important;
    height:58px!important;min-height:58px!important;
    padding:0 clamp(18px,1.6vw,32px)!important;
  }
  .nav-tabs{display:flex!important;visibility:visible!important;opacity:1!important;}
  .nav-actions{display:flex!important;visibility:visible!important;opacity:1!important;}
  .nav-hamburger{display:none!important;}
  .mobile-drawer{display:none!important;}
  .page{padding-top:58px!important;width:100%!important;max-width:100%!important;}

  /* Home opens edge-to-edge on desktop / MacBook */
  #page-home{min-height:100dvh!important;}
  .home-v2{
    width:100vw!important;max-width:100vw!important;
    min-height:calc(100dvh - 58px)!important;
    padding:clamp(12px,1.2vw,22px)!important;
    overflow-x:hidden!important;
  }
  .home-shell{
    width:100%!important;max-width:none!important;margin:0!important;
    display:grid!important;
    grid-template-columns:minmax(285px,330px) minmax(0,1fr)!important;
    gap:clamp(14px,1.3vw,24px)!important;
    align-items:start!important;
  }
  .left-stack{display:flex!important;flex-direction:column!important;gap:clamp(12px,1vw,18px)!important;}
  .main-stack{width:100%!important;min-width:0!important;gap:clamp(12px,1vw,18px)!important;}
  .hero-banner-v2{
    width:100%!important;
    min-height:clamp(300px,36vh,420px)!important;
    grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1.1fr) minmax(300px,.9fr)!important;
  }
  .hero-art-v2{min-height:clamp(230px,31vh,340px)!important;}
  .dashboard-3d{width:min(500px,100%)!important;height:clamp(230px,30vh,330px)!important;}
  .kpi-strip-v2{grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr))!important;}

  /* Core technologies stays vertical under Quick Connect on desktop */
  .left-stack .tech-strip-v2{display:block!important;order:3!important;width:100%!important;}
  .left-stack .tech-list-v2{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:1fr!important;gap:.65rem!important;}
  .main-stack>.tech-strip-v2{display:none!important;}

  /* Latest Project + Recognition + Thought use full screen width */
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2{
    width:100%!important;max-width:none!important;margin:clamp(12px,1vw,18px) 0 0!important;
    display:grid!important;
    grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1.15fr) minmax(0,.9fr) minmax(0,1fr)!important;
    gap:clamp(14px,1.2vw,22px)!important;
    align-items:stretch!important;
  }
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .feature-card-v2{min-height:clamp(220px,25vh,310px)!important;}

  /* Growth/dashboard page opens wide and clean on desktop/laptop */
  #page-growth.sec,.growth-enhanced-section{
    width:100vw!important;max-width:100vw!important;
    min-height:calc(100dvh - 58px)!important;
    padding:clamp(18px,1.6vw,34px)!important;
    overflow-x:hidden!important;
  }
  #page-growth .growth-hero-panel,
  #page-growth .growth-overview-strip,
  #page-growth .growth-kpi-premium,
  #page-growth .growth-visual-grid,
  #page-growth .growth-visual-grid-enhanced,
  #page-growth .growth-insight-grid,
  #page-growth .growth-milestone-grid{
    width:100%!important;max-width:none!important;
  }
  #page-growth .growth-kpi-premium{grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr))!important;gap:clamp(12px,1vw,18px)!important;}
  #page-growth .growth-visual-grid-enhanced{grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1.25fr) minmax(0,1fr)!important;gap:clamp(14px,1.2vw,22px)!important;}
  #page-growth .growth-insight-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr))!important;}
  #page-growth .growth-visual-card.tall{min-height:clamp(360px,42vh,520px)!important;}
  #page-growth .growth-visual-card{min-height:clamp(300px,34vh,420px)!important;}
  #page-growth .growth-chart-box{height:clamp(270px,32vh,390px)!important;}
  #page-growth .growth-chart-box.small{height:clamp(230px,28vh,320px)!important;}
}

/* MacBook/smaller laptop: keep desktop header but compress cards so nothing cuts */
@media (min-width:1101px) and (max-width:1366px){
  .home-v2{padding:12px!important;}
  .home-shell{grid-template-columns:295px minmax(0,1fr)!important;gap:14px!important;}
  .hero-banner-v2{min-height:300px!important;padding:1.15rem 1.25rem!important;}
  .hero-title-v2{font-size:clamp(2.35rem,4.2vw,3.6rem)!important;}
  .hero-desc-v2{font-size:.82rem!important;line-height:1.58!important;}
  .dashboard-3d{transform:scale(.9);transform-origin:center right;}
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2{grid-template-columns:1.15fr .9fr 1fr!important;gap:14px!important;}
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .feature-card-v2{min-height:215px!important;padding:1rem!important;}
  .nav-tab{padding:.3rem .62rem!important;font-size:.68rem!important;}
  .soc-n{width:28px!important;height:28px!important;}
  .btn-resume{padding:.3rem .72rem!important;}
}
</style>



<!-- AKASH FINAL PATCH: Fix desktop latest cards + What I Do overflow -->
<style id="akash-final-two-issues-fix">
/* 1) Fix Latest Project / Recognition / Thought cards on desktop and MacBook */
@media (min-width:1101px){
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2{
    width:100%!important;
    max-width:100%!important;
    display:grid!important;
    grid-template-columns:minmax(420px,1.25fr) minmax(300px,.9fr) minmax(340px,1fr)!important;
    gap:clamp(16px,1.35vw,24px)!important;
    align-items:stretch!important;
  }
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .feature-card-v2{
    min-width:0!important;
    overflow:hidden!important;
    padding:clamp(18px,1.25vw,24px)!important;
    min-height:230px!important;
    justify-content:center!important;
  }
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .project-mini{
    display:grid!important;
    grid-template-columns:minmax(135px,190px) minmax(220px,1fr)!important;
    align-items:center!important;
    column-gap:clamp(18px,1.5vw,28px)!important;
  }
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .project-mini .chart-thumb{
    width:100%!important;
    max-width:190px!important;
    height:132px!important;
    margin:0!important;
  }
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .project-mini>div:last-child{
    min-width:220px!important;
    width:100%!important;
  }
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .section-pill,
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .mini-title,
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .mini-desc,
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .quote-v2,
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .quote-author-v2{
    white-space:normal!important;
    overflow:visible!important;
    text-overflow:clip!important;
    word-break:normal!important;
    overflow-wrap:normal!important;
    max-width:100%!important;
  }
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .section-pill{
    font-size:clamp(1rem,1.25vw,1.35rem)!important;
    line-height:1.25!important;
  }
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .mini-title{
    font-size:clamp(.98rem,1.05vw,1.15rem)!important;
    line-height:1.35!important;
  }
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .mini-desc{
    font-size:.82rem!important;
    line-height:1.58!important;
    display:block!important;
    -webkit-line-clamp:unset!important;
  }
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .mini-btn{
    width:auto!important;
    max-width:180px!important;
    white-space:nowrap!important;
    padding:.55rem .9rem!important;
  }
}

/* MacBook/laptop: keep the three cards in one row but don't squeeze text */
@media (min-width:1101px) and (max-width:1366px){
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2{
    grid-template-columns:minmax(390px,1.2fr) minmax(280px,.9fr) minmax(300px,1fr)!important;
    gap:12px!important;
  }
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .feature-card-v2{padding:16px!important;min-height:225px!important;}
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .project-mini{
    grid-template-columns:150px minmax(210px,1fr)!important;
    column-gap:16px!important;
  }
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .project-mini .chart-thumb{max-width:150px!important;height:120px!important;}
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .project-mini>div:last-child{min-width:210px!important;}
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .section-pill{font-size:1.05rem!important;}
}

/* If screen is too narrow for 3 clean cards, use 1 full-width card per row */
@media (min-width:901px) and (max-width:1120px){
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;}
  .home-v2>.feature-grid-v2 .project-mini{grid-template-columns:180px minmax(0,1fr)!important;}
}

/* 2) Fix What I Do strip: no overflow/cut on desktop, MacBook and laptop */
@media (min-width:1101px){
  .what-grid-v2{
    display:grid!important;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(5,minmax(0,1fr))!important;
    gap:0!important;
    padding:1rem!important;
    overflow:hidden!important;
  }
  .what-card-v2{
    min-width:0!important;
    width:100%!important;
    display:flex!important;
    align-items:center!important;
    gap:.65rem!important;
    padding:.85rem .75rem!important;
    overflow:hidden!important;
  }
  .what-icon-v2{
    width:42px!important;
    min-width:42px!important;
    height:42px!important;
    flex:0 0 42px!important;
  }
  .what-card-v2>div:last-child{
    min-width:0!important;
    flex:1 1 auto!important;
  }
  .what-card-v2 b,
  .what-card-v2 span{
    white-space:normal!important;
    overflow:visible!important;
    text-overflow:clip!important;
    word-break:normal!important;
    overflow-wrap:break-word!important;
    max-width:100%!important;
  }
  .what-card-v2 b{font-size:.76rem!important;line-height:1.32!important;}
  .what-card-v2 span{font-size:.64rem!important;line-height:1.38!important;}
}

@media (min-width:1101px) and (max-width:1366px){
  .what-grid-v2{grid-template-columns:repeat(5,minmax(0,1fr))!important;padding:.85rem!important;}
  .what-card-v2{gap:.5rem!important;padding:.7rem .55rem!important;}
  .what-icon-v2{width:38px!important;min-width:38px!important;height:38px!important;flex-basis:38px!important;font-size:1rem!important;}
  .what-card-v2 b{font-size:.72rem!important;line-height:1.28!important;}
  .what-card-v2 span{font-size:.61rem!important;line-height:1.34!important;}
}

@media (min-width:901px) and (max-width:1100px){
  .what-grid-v2{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))!important;}
  .what-card-v2{border-right:0!important;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)!important;}
}
</style>

</body>
</html>
